clean_body: Please read the message below from our sponsor, 4Patriots. Steve Thompson, Editor | HIGH ALERT: Shocking Meat Shortages Are Coming – Prepare Now The USDA predicts meat production shortages for the first time since 2014, and the U.N. warns of "an unprecedented global hunger crisis". Which means 2 dangerous things for you: 1\. Higher prices at the grocery store 2\. Less meat available That's why meat must be a vital part of your survival food stockpile. But there is a catch. Not all protein is created equal. And this is so critical to understand, especially in a crisis. See, your protein needs to meet 4 critical requirements: It needs to: Last a while Taste great Store without refrigeration Can't break the bank Spoiler alert: most protein options fall short! Take peanut butter. Sure, most people see it as a survival food protein staple. But did you know most cans are full of added sugars? Plus, they don't last more than a few months. A year tops. Grocery store meat doesn't work either. First, it's expensive. If you've been to the grocery store recently, you know what I'm talking about. Meat prices are up big time over the past year. But it also needs to be refrigerated. So if a blackout hits and cuts power to your home, you might as well use it as a paperweight. But don't worry friend. There is a protein option that checks all four boxes: This option is guaranteed to last at least 5 years. It doesn't need to be refrigerated. And it come with an easy payment plan so it won't break the bank. And most importantly, it tastes delicious! Introducing for the first time ever... And, you can score an introductory price plus some amazing FREE gifts. Now, there is one thing you should know. Every time we've offered meat in the past, we've SOLD OUT. So when people find out about this brand-NEW Ultimate Meat Survival Food Kit, we could see a huge rush. I don't want to alarm you, but there are no IOUs or rain checks on this meat kit. It's first-come, first-served. So if you're going to reserve your kit, . For starters, you get 5 meat options. Chicken, beef, pork, turkey and ground beef. So you aren't stuck with 1 or 2 types of protein. And the variety means you can use it in a ton of recipes. Chicken salad, burgers, tacos, you name it. You're in control, not the stock boy at the grocery store. Plus, you can actually pronounce the ingredients that we use. That's because there are only 2. Meat, of course, and salt for preservation. That's it! No funky chemicals. No artificial gunk. The only things in your food are food. Now, you may be wondering how we guarantee such a long shelf life for canned foods. It comes from our special, old-fashioned retort canning process. We use small-batch retorts to cook your meat right inside the can. That means 2 important things. First, your meat is slow cooked, so it retains all its natural juices and flavor. And it's ready to go right out of the can. And second, it kills off any germs in the can that might harm the shelf life. Sometimes, the old-fashioned way is the right way. And guess what? This is all done right here in the US of A. Our survival meats are home raised here in the states. So you know exactly where your food comes from. And as a family-owned, American business, we take a lot of pride in that. Look friend, there's no better time to claim your Ultimate Meat Survival Food Kit than now. Meat is one of the first things to go in a crisis. Wildfires, hurricanes, cyberattacks or something else. And the last thing I want for you is to miss out. Or worse, leave you and your family stuck with a subpar protein option. Here at 4Patriots, our mission is to champion freedom and self-reliance for all Americans. And with everything going on in the world, it's clear that survival food is no longer a luxury. It's a necessity. Ask anyone who's lived through a crisis. There's no warning. You won't see a big billboard that says "emergency coming in 5 days! Stock up before then." Disasters come out of nowhere. And if you aren't prepared when it hits, it's too late. I mean, just imagine standing in line at your local supermarket. Shelves picked bare. And the people who didn't prepare scrambling and hoarding what little food they can find. All while you pray there's a sliver of meat left for you and your family. name: Hillsdale College via Trump Train News
subject: Own “The American Left: From Liberalism toDespotism” on DVD
body:
In this eleven-lecture course, Dr. Kevin Slack, associate professor of politics at Hillsdale College, examines the transformation in American politics since World War II.

| | | This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zljpnae33vk5btucq2uhh5ahfmrucsafqij9dkpg_rp22sh2s8i6eo35ctgm1ob7clh2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

I am excited to announce that Hillsdale's online course, ["The American Left: From Liberalism to Despotism,"](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z9dlk79nfko0bfesm79pfj0utrdt4vhdhv4ik8u0_rp22sh2s8i6eo35ctgm1ob7clh2bs) is now available to own on DVD.

In this eleven-lecture course, Dr. Kevin Slack, associate professor of politics at Hillsdale College, examines the transformation in American politics since World War II.

He explains the origins of 1960s radicalism and its rejection of midcentury liberalism; he reveals how these radicals came to dominate government and the universities beginning in the late 1970s; and he explores the rise of a neoliberal oligarchy in America and that oligarchy's alliance with the cultural Left in President Obama's second term.

This course seeks to understand the key people, ideas, and aims of the modern Left and to provide solutions for defending the American way of life today.

Will you partner with us to promote this free online course and expand other educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty? As a token of our appreciation for your support, we'll send you the DVD Box Set of the course for a gift of $100 or more.

**Click the link below to help support this course and get your copy of "The American Left: From Liberalism to Despotism" on DVD.**

[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/american-left-support-dvd](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zp8uv847vcf0b9sp02cvntaora2f46fq2n74o9mg_rp22sh2s8i6eo35ctgm1ob7clh2bs)

Warm Regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

name: ICYMI News
subject: Who controls whom?
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

| | | This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2ztgi3lrl84git5v4gcon13j7j0e8e52bdlkifh0o_rp22sh2s8i6eo35ctgm1ob5chh2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection **by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zo6p867tn8j8j7ifav2284ul4to9i5en50nm96t8_rp22sh2s8i6eo35ctgm1ob5chh2bs)**
## Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?
[YES](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zt3fjgtkt8i69lmuj08usi6qqo7ra11f5m3qsuqo_rp22sh2s8i6eo35ctgm1ob5chh2bs) [NO](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zuohkkqqoddfc2v85mq24k8kvpli4rot0v9psq30_rp22sh2s8i6eo35ctgm1ob5chh2bs) For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale’s American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z710t7a9kpvkqltlvtho53059pifh1eas1ehuoa0_rp22sh2s8i6eo35ctgm1ob5chh2bs)**
** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

---

ICYMI News
---
_PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zuq7ububepgv5feudamn03krd5f1r65tujt47kv8_rp22sh2s8i6eo35ctgm1ob5chh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq9dhkumqb7d9neppqcdtlmuin7djle8r7ccjkm8qjf9v56ngj0trkm6or9djjctg1eddk6ior79hnmmpi9df4c9j60pr4cth2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zju9avbrv1ur7u5ktmgbq00gc0uutcj3690pqqv8_rp22sh2s8i6eo35ctgm1ob5chh2bs)_

Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include: Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;” Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty; Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people; Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale’s American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers. Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future. So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below: And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 ICYMI News PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

body:
In this eleven-lecture course, Dr. Kevin Slack, associate professor of politics at Hillsdale College, examines the transformation in American politics since World War II.

| | | This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z8ug8dpp3pqdgft6hv1amim2pfoha7grhghm2jc8_rp22sh2s8i6eo35ctgm1ob6clh2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

I am excited to announce that Hillsdale's online course, ["The American Left: From Liberalism to Despotism,"](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zojoc2ga9tqql6f5ujmeo448jsil9h3dk51ma5hg_rp22sh2s8i6eo35ctgm1ob6clh2bs) is now available to own on DVD.

In this eleven-lecture course, Dr. Kevin Slack, associate professor of politics at Hillsdale College, examines the transformation in American politics since World War II.

He explains the origins of 1960s radicalism and its rejection of midcentury liberalism; he reveals how these radicals came to dominate government and the universities beginning in the late 1970s; and he explores the rise of a neoliberal oligarchy in America and that oligarchy's alliance with the cultural Left in President Obama's second term.

This course seeks to understand the key people, ideas, and aims of the modern Left and to provide solutions for defending the American way of life today.

Will you partner with us to promote this free online course and expand other educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty? As a token of our appreciation for your support, we'll send you the DVD Box Set of the course for a gift of $100 or more.

**Click the link below to help support this course and get your copy of "The American Left: From Liberalism to Despotism" on DVD.**

In this eleven-lecture course, Dr. Kevin Slack, associate professor of politics at Hillsdale College, examines the transformation in American politics since World War II.

In this eleven-lecture course, Dr. Kevin Slack, associate professor of politics at Hillsdale College, examines the transformation in American politics since World War II. He explains the origins of 1960s radicalism and its rejection of midcentury liberalism; he reveals how these radicals came to dominate government and the universities beginning in the late 1970s; and he explores the rise of a neoliberal oligarchy in America and that oligarchy’s alliance with the cultural Left in President Obama’s second term. This course seeks to understand the key people, ideas, and aims of the modern Left and to provide solutions for defending the American way of life today. Will you partner with us to promote this free online course and expand other educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty? As a token of our appreciation for your support, we’ll send you the DVD Box Set of the course for a gift of $100 or more. Click the link below to help support this course and get your copy of “The American Left: From Liberalism to Despotism” on DVD. Warm Regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College | | Your America News Your America News • PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Marjorie Dannenfelser
subject: I need you to help us stop this tragedy
body:
Did you know the United States has a human rights issue in common with countries like China and North Korea?

| [ ](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvvht2kl6ktg6o7529jm9p39fvfokedpfiv7lj40_rp22sh2s8i6eo35ctgm1pb2c5h2bs)
---
Fellow American,

Did you know the United States has a human rights issue in common with countries like China and North Korea?

**Becuase of the Biden Administration's commitment to the abortion industry, the United States is 1 of 7 countries in the world that allows abortion-on-demand.

** Abortion-on-demand is the ending of an unborn child's life and _ANY_ point of a woman's pregnancy. A baby, fully developed at 38-40 weeks, an be aborted should its mother detemine she does not want her child.

**This is an appalling tragedy happening in our country today and there are many abortionists willing to carry out this barbaric practice celebrated by Big Abortion.

** My heart breaks for the complete devastation and the utter devaluing of human life our own president and his administration is sworn to protect.

These abortion extremists have yet to name a single protection they would grant any unborn child and put it into law. In fact, they want to make abortion-on-demand the law of the land and write it into our own Constitution!

Babies in the womb are screaming in pain because they are being tortured to death and no one can hear them. They have no voice to cry out when they are viciously murdered.

**[We must cry out for them _now_.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zf0phe9j1umc6in883hikavhaeth6n4hf9rmm0eo_rp22sh2s8i6eo35ctgm1pb2c5h2bs) **

Stand with SBA Pro-Life America on the front lines in the fight for life and let the Biden Administration know you stand with the majority of Americans and do not support this deadly agenda. Join 72% of Americans who want pro-life protections for babies who can feel pain at 15 weeks in the womb.

Submit your name at the link below and put an end to abortion-on-demand in our country _today._

[SIGN YOUR NAME](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z550mm10o4vf5j8e9mtefq8kcuqk5rbv98b4a6po_rp22sh2s8i6eo35ctgm1pb2c5h2bs)
| We must be the voice for the unborn because our president and his administration have proven they will not protect these innocent children.
---
For LIFE,

Marjorie Dannenfelser
President, SBA Pro-Life America

Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America
2776 S. Arlington Mill Dr.
PO Box 803
Arlington, VA, 22206

American Action News

### _Friday, January 19, 2024_
The boys reminisce about their grade school days. Doug was in charge of closing windows during a tornado, and James had trouble spelling the word "bed". The NFL wild card weekend had some upsets, including the Green Bay Packers defeating the Cowboys and the Buccaneers demolishing a reeling Eagles team. Who had the worst weekend? The biggest NFL coaching search, in some time, is underway. Where do the guys see Belichick, Harbaugh, and Vrabel landing? ### _Wednesday, January 17, 2024_
Today on The Doug Collins Podcast, I breakdown the Time For Choosing Speech by former President Ronald Reagan. He gave a speech that resonates to this day and reminds us all that life is about making choices. [ ](http://click1.srnemail.com/pqjvmlrrmgybggkrbyyshbdgwmbclwwgqlskwqyjyjyhmc_tjwccbbhbzhpklmwvmvvcww.html)

## Vanguard vs. Fidelity vs. Schwab
---
| [Take Retirement Quiz](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1hel9uhbn2t0310bofhs3to3a866smo62pm3f1o_rp22sh2s8i6eo35ctim4o36cph2bs "Take Retirement Quiz")
---
| _Get matched with up to three advisors that serve your area, free!_
---
| Your advisor matches may not necessarily be associated with the above institutions
---
| | | SPONSORED BY SMARTASSET
---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z9vpqvb5hp710klrcsehouu6nbrcajeuqt6heqeo_rp22sh2s8i6eo35ctim4o36cph2bs)
---
|
---
| _Who are you partnered with?_ It’s no secret that Vanguard, Fidelity and Charles Schwab could be considered three of the most popular and well-known brokerage firms. Each offers a wide range of products and services, from banking and investment products to financial advisors and financial planning services.

However, there are some important differences, from fees to financial services to research resources, each of which could impact your customer experience. [Learn how these firms compare so you can decide on the right fit for you.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z3emiv36ugac76bckvu7n05ifqh2pb6vakgo4qu8_rp22sh2s8i6eo35ctim4o36cph2bs)

Ready to kickstart your retirement? Working with a financial advisor can be a crucial part of any healthy retirement plan. But with thousands of options available, it can seem daunting to choose one. That’s why SmartAsset created a [no-cost tool](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zonphl490judv4uul5f0fak9qmptbtmlfl06m73o_rp22sh2s8i6eo35ctim4o36cph2bs) to help match you with up to three financial advisors serving your area. All advisors on the platform are rigorously screened through a proprietary due diligence process and legally bound to work in your best interest.

While your advisor matches may not necessarily be associated with the above institutions, research suggests people who work with a financial advisor:
* feel more at ease about their finances
* could end up with about 15% more money to spend in retirement.1

It's never too late to work towards a comfortable retirement.

[See how Vanguard, Fidelity and Schwab stack up »](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z3lodlseqe8rhgps3g12l7plipuvrae6jc5fcpfo_rp22sh2s8i6eo35ctim4o36cph2bs)
---
|
---
| **Try SmartAsset's Financial Advisor Matching Tool**
Get retirement ready. Try this no-cost tool to get matched with up to 3 vetted financial advisors serving your area.
---
| [Get Started](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zhbti6fqip4gq31uq7teq32l9va4o8c2s2u8hj3o_rp22sh2s8i6eo35ctim4o36cph2bs "Get Started")
---
|
---

SmartAsset’s services are limited to referring users to third party advisers registered or chartered as fiduciaries ("Adviser(s)") with a regulatory body in the United States that have elected to participate in our matching platform based on information gathered from users through our online questionnaire. SmartAsset does not review the ongoing performance of any Adviser, participate in the management of any user’s account by an Adviser or provide advice regarding specific investments. We do not manage client funds or hold custody of assets, we help users connect with relevant financial advisors. SmartAsset.com is not intended to provide legal advice, tax advice, accounting advice or financial advice (Other than referring users to third party advisers registered or chartered as fiduciaries ("Adviser(s)") with a regulatory body in the United States). SmartAsset is not a financial planner, broker or tax adviser. The Service is intended only to assist you in your understanding of financial organization and decision-making and is broad in scope. Your personal financial situation is unique, and any information and investing strategies obtained through SmartAsset.com may not be appropriate for your situation. Accordingly, before making any final decisions or implementing any financial strategy, you should consider obtaining additional information and advice from your accountant or other financial advisers who are fully aware of your individual circumstances. ---
| This week, I was honored to receive and proud to see the Farmville Herald report that my team and I earned the Policy Maker of the Year Award in their paper. We put this award on the wall in our office next to our previously awarded Legislator of the Year Award. We have a great team. It really is amazing what we can achieve when we work together!
---
| Trump Wins Big
---
|
---
| | |
---|---
|
This past weekend, I was honored to speak with President Trump as I campaigned for him in Iowa. He won the caucus by the widest margin ever in a contested field. Last Monday, Conservatives spoke loudly and it is clear that Trump is the only person capable of Making America Great Again!

While away in Iowa on "Pressing Personal Business", I was helping President Trump win so we can Save America!

My opponent used this news to continue to spin his record. Bob Good says publicly he endorsed DeSantis because he just wants eight years. Privately, Bob keeps attacking Trump. | It was another busy week meeting with constituents, fellow lawmakers, and friends at the General Assembly. I'm honored to be able to meet so many extraordinary Virginians throughout my tenure. If you're ever in the area, feel free to drop by my office and either myself or one of my staff members would love to meet with you and here about your concerns.

| I was able to introduce legislation to strengthen voter ID laws in Virginia by requiring voters to produce a valid ID in order to vote. Presenting identification is a staple in life whether it be for driving, purchasing alcohol, or even collecting mail. Unfortunately, VA Dems who control the Senate would rather call such efforts racist and compromise the integrity of our elections than make sure Americans feel confident in their votes. Also, despite the Governor's best efforts along with all House and Senate Republicans, Democrats have stonewalled our efforts to decouple our state from California. As it stands Virginia's emissions standards are at the whims of an unelected board of California bureaucrats. Make no mistake we will continue to fight them tooth and nail on this until we reclaim the majorities.

We put this award on the wall in our office next to our previously awarded Legislator of the Year Award. We have a great team. It really is amazing what we can achieve when we work together! | Trump Wins Big | | | | ---|--- | This past weekend, I was honored to speak with President Trump as I campaigned for him in Iowa. He won the caucus by the widest margin ever in a contested field. Last Monday, Conservatives spoke loudly and it is clear that Trump is the only person capable of Making America Great Again! While away in Iowa on "Pressing Personal Business", I was helping President Trump win so we can Save America! My opponent used this news to continue to spin his record. Bob Good says publicly he endorsed DeSantis because he just wants eight years. Privately, Bob keeps attacking Trump. ==" | Recent News | == | Politico | | Meanwhile, Bob Good's Never Trump attitude is coming back to bite him. Trump campaign manager Chris LaCivita said, "Bob Good won't be electable when we get done with him." | 2024 Session Update Week 1 | | The General Assembly convened on January 10th. Governor Glenn Youngkin, Lieutenant Governor Winsome Sears, and fellow legislators are working hard to make Virginia the best place to live, work, and raise a family. Everything is more expensive. Can we convince Democrats in the House and the Senate to reduce taxes and give fellow Virginians a break? Here is some of what is on my mind and what we have been up to: | | Did you know that the 2024 Miss America pageant winner is also a current Air Force pilot? | Many Visitors this Week: | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | It was another busy week meeting with constituents, fellow lawmakers, and friends at the General Assembly. I'm honored to be able to meet so many extraordinary Virginians throughout my tenure. If you're ever in the area, feel free to drop by my office and either myself or one of my staff members would love to meet with you and here about your concerns. | | I was able to introduce legislation to strengthen voter ID laws in Virginia by requiring voters to produce a valid ID in order to vote. Presenting identification is a staple in life whether it be for driving, purchasing alcohol, or even collecting mail. Unfortunately, VA Dems who control the Senate would rather call such efforts racist and compromise the integrity of our elections than make sure Americans feel confident in their votes. Also, despite the Governor's best efforts along with all House and Senate Republicans, Democrats have stonewalled our efforts to decouple our state from California. As it stands Virginia's emissions standards are at the whims of an unelected board of California bureaucrats. Make no mistake we will continue to fight them tooth and nail on this until we reclaim the majorities. | Interns | | | I'm pleased to welcome Lucas and Brandon as my office's newest interns. Lucas is a freshman at The University of Richmond majoring in Biochemistry and Molecular Biology and Brandon is a junior at Virginia Commonwealth University studying Political Science. | | Thank you to all our men and women in uniform! | 2023 McGuire Legislative Agenda | Here is some of the legislation brought to me by constituents and sponsored by me to improve Virginia. Bills: | == == == == == == == == == == == == == == * == == for updates and other legislation we support | I'm running for Congress because the enemy isn't at the gate -- the enemy is THROUGH the gate and in our communities. Open borders, fentanyl, lawlessness, out of control spending, and more. Our country is in big trouble. I am running to represent the people of the 5th Congressional District because I am a conservative with a record of building teams to solve problems. We can do better than Good. I've been all over the district and I can tell you the 5th Congressional District loves Trump and the America First Agenda! I invite you and your friends to join me in this cause. Take care, please spread the word and I look forward to seeing you around the district! | == | | | | | | | For God and Country, Delegate John McGuire Soli Deo Gloria Republican Jesus is my Savior Husband Father Navy SEAL == Pro-Life == Pro-Gun (==) Pro-Israel (==) American Legion Member VFW (Life Member) NRA (Life Member) Highest Award for Conservatism (ACU/ CPAC) Family Foundation 100 VCDL 100 (Life Member) == The Spirit of Virginia == our Facebook Page Twitter: @JohnMcGuire4VA Instagram: JohnMcGuire4VA == == john@mcguireva.com www.mcguireva.com | | == | == | == | == == == | Paid for and Authorized by McGuire for Virginia | | McGuire for Virginia | McGuire for Virginia, PO Box 242, Manakin Sabot, VA 23103 | | Sent by mailto:john@mcguireva.com powered by

name: American Briefing
subject: Who controls whom?
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

| | | This sponsored message from American Briefing is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z4100nt4p2sntgfo2gt0va8ea29c6ll45f8u7k5o_rp22sh2s8i6eo35ctim4o31clh2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection **by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zgaftrudnbiv41ejknqnqt86lmhbreo4ork319vg_rp22sh2s8i6eo35ctim4o31clh2bs)**
## Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?
[YES](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z2ob70tpnhe0mumcqdvhi3el1uvbh7k1opvv8q98_rp22sh2s8i6eo35ctim4o31clh2bs) [NO](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zq1flh91g61najf2sk2jgae4t62grj4mn4brbpa8_rp22sh2s8i6eo35ctim4o31clh2bs) For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale’s American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zieqrkgishjisepcq9q2blmj1npq70pvgsl1jigg_rp22sh2s8i6eo35ctim4o31clh2bs)**
** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

---

American Briefing
---
_PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z1l2h89t0iaikik825dg6fgn1he958be3sdealf0_rp22sh2s8i6eo35ctim4o31clh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq8ddl69qbcd1jm8p79d9j6iprect66uqrf9bjmpqn4djm69qb4d9nkvijbo9getqb3cdkmppmeo0n6mq39cdjkorrbcp4mni64pj0cth69oh5u)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zkuh4hp8pbv58d8kro76hd83tolfki0m6meg90eg_rp22sh2s8i6eo35ctim4o31clh2bs)_

[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zv0hdnnjqm0gl4afm59gbqcai5f1304jpff2mk80_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28pr0cljmaoj0c5im49fg)

name: Pro Life Update
subject: Who controls whom?
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

| | | This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2ziearva7spvjqtrhh8djnl2jpiv9kl2jf7o7g6e8_rp22sh2s8i6eo35ctim4o36clh2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection **by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zf86vmfnblgdk75t20gidkp0f64b3r1op46u499g_rp22sh2s8i6eo35ctim4o36clh2bs)**
## Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?
[YES](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z56dvt4i73qgv480de7vu2sqqu98r8n4qi4od5j8_rp22sh2s8i6eo35ctim4o36clh2bs) [NO](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zlc7k76hv8pfalr3ten9dl6giamhvpiub2komhk0_rp22sh2s8i6eo35ctim4o36clh2bs) For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale’s American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z0tfvkhko901vqknpbh7o1cfrh4f222ce74itumo_rp22sh2s8i6eo35ctim4o36clh2bs)**
** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

---

Pro Life Update
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zs62n0cm3eak879rirsq4hnb9h430d3d2kq315qg_rp22sh2s8i6eo35ctim4o36clh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq0sjnm6qb6d9le1oj8cbl6ej3fddnklprctbi6pr34t5i6krqfp9ls4o7et5hm6qbcsr7c0bjbd1km6pqcdtlmcibbp32cpg6eoj3c8iv0)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z69cmrh7ade0m95ibj772mfc5lqcancntj28focg_rp22sh2s8i6eo35ctim4o36clh2bs)_

name: Larry Klayman
subject: BREAKING: FBI arrests Babylon Bee actor, terrifies his pregnant wife
body:
Just a short time ago, four FBI agents arrested my friend and client, Siaka Massaquoi, at the airport.

| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zashmfat5nq7312v9b6ng46ogppttp45c1rblmpo_rp22sh2s8i6eo35ctim4o31clh2bs)
---
| |
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zd163se0o5jo8cg48p047ps8qttdnfi6i4i094p8_rp22sh2s8i6eo35ctim4o31clh2bs)Dear Patriot,

**[Please give a crucial $25, $50, $100 or more right now to help Babylon Bee actor and patriot, Siaka Massaquoi, fight back against Joe Biden's FBI.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zu47nr82fccjumqsnvvbvrfbskr17fd1egjll990_rp22sh2s8i6eo35ctim4o31clh2bs)**

Just a short time ago, four FBI agents arrested my friend and client, Siaka Massaquoi, at the airport.

He was traveling home with his wife, Charlotte, and their unborn baby, after they attended an event hosted by the conservative news site, Daily Wire.

The FBI refused to show Charlotte the arrest warrant.

**Siaka was arrested because he 's a black patriot who can persuade many Democrat voters to vote against Joe Biden on Election Day. **

You see, not only is Siaka a gifted actor (he's starred in Babylon Bee's funny series, "Californians Adjust to New Life In Texas") ...

... He's also the Vice Chair of the Los Angeles County GOP and a peaceful patriot who briefly appeared at the peaceful protest the stolen presidential election at the U.S. Capitol on January 6, 2021.

Siaka is also bold as a lion about his faith in Jesus Christ, his love for his family, and his deep concern for our country.

Of course, all that makes him an enemy of Joe Biden's lawless administration.

**So the FBI arrested Siaka for spending 76 seconds inside the U.S. Capitol. And charged him with four misdemeanors! That 's right, MISDEMEANORS!**

What's more, this isn't the first time the FBI has stomped on Siaka's rights, either.

**Over twenty FBI agents raided Siaka 's home with drawn guns on June 10, 2021 at 5:45 AM, and handcuffed him, his best friend, and two other roommates. **

As you can imagine, his best friend's two little children, just three and seven years old, were _terrified._

And here's what happened next:

* The FBI agents refused to let Siaka speak to his lawyer
* The FBI agents refused to show him the arrest warrant
* The FBI agents grilled him and his friends for FIVE HOURS with no lawyers present!
* The FBI confiscated his cell phone, computer and his MAGA hat and has refused ever since to give them back!
* And we have reason to believe that Siaka and the other peaceful J-6 protesters were illegally and unconstitutionally surveilled!

**And because the FBI didn 't arrest or charge Siaka, he had no legal grounds to find out why they raided his home...terrorized him, his friends, his friend's little children... abused his Constitutionally protected rights...and stole his property.**

Can you imagine being abused like this... _as an American citizen in your own country?_

What the FBI did to my peaceful, innocent client in 2021 and just a short time ago is a CRIME.

**That 's why I've filed a crucial lawsuit that PROVES the FBI and other agencies carried out ILLEGAL SURVEILLANCE on January 6 patriots. That means their criminal convictions can be THROWN OUT. And their criminal trials MUST STOP.**

I'm Larry Klayman, founder and general counsel for Freedom Watch.

I'm a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who's fought for the American people for 46 years.

You've seen me on Fox News, and other cable news outlets.

I'm proud to say I won a court ruling that President Bill Clinton committed a crime when he illegally the White House files of Kathleen Willey. (I'm the only lawyer in American history to have a court rule that a sitting President had committed a crime)

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers during the impeachment of criminal Bill Clinton.

And I successfully represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents, and win.****And with this critically important case, I can PROVE IN COURT that Attorney General Merrick Garland, FBI Director Christopher Wray, their departments and agencies at the U.S. Department of Justice ordered and carried out ILLEGAL SURVEILLANCE OF LAW-ABIDING AMERICAN CITIZENS!**

Siaka wants to use this critically important lawsuit to speak up for other patriots, too, because he's alarmed at what Joe Biden and his friends are doing to our country.

He's deeply concerned that our country is going down a very dark road...and I agree.

I want to fix this horrifying situation peacefully and legally in the courts...before it's too late.

**[Patriot, I beg you to help me fight back for Siaka and ALL other January 6 peaceful protesters with your very best gift of $25, $50, $100, or more right now.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsspom5lv251lnveo569g9t452sq7jm2dkvesci0_rp22sh2s8i6eo35ctim4o31clh2bs)**

**If Joe Biden 's FBI and DOJ get away with crushing the rights and freedoms of Siaka and all the other peaceful patriots of January 6, they WILL come for you, me, our families, and our friends.**

**[So please don't delay - give your crucial gift of $25, $50, $100, or more IMMEDIATELY.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zf0vc19m0lbjk569tnvcd5adqndktus80b33jkd0_rp22sh2s8i6eo35ctim4o31clh2bs)**

Thank you so much!

In Justice,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

**P.S. Patriot, the FBI arrested my friend and client, Siaka Massaquoi, because he 's a political threat to Joe Biden's reelection. **They shamelessly arrested him in front of his pregnant wife, Charlotte. They terrified her and refused to show her the arrest warrant.

If the FBI gets away with this, they WILL be turned on you and me our families next.

**[Please support this critical lawsuit with your best gift of $25, $50, $100 or more immediately.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1jb9d11pa02i10pogsei34pobiai96acosf0f5g_rp22sh2s8i6eo35ctim4o31clh2bs)**

American Action News
---

name: Conservative Intel
subject: Victor Davis Hanson: Victory and the Savior Generals
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vs2UaKIiAN

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/os2UaKIiAN

Dear
Friend,

In the
annals of history, military triumphs and defeats have been
attributed to a host of factors-material resources, manpower,
pre-war strategies, and tactical doctrine all play a part in
determining the victors and the vanquished.

However,
as we delve deeper into the past, we uncover a truth that
surpasses conventional wisdom-a truth of extraordinary
significance.

Throughout pivotal moments in history, we have witnessed the
remarkable transformation of seemingly lost causes, orchestrated
by the savior generals-visionary leaders displaying unparalleled
expertise.

Today,
I'm pleased to share with you a free resource that will ignite
your curiosity and challenge your perceptions. Esteemed historian
and Hoover Senior Fellow, Victor Davis Hanson, has authored a
groundbreaking eBook-Victory and the Savior Generals-a
captivating exploration into the minds of these exceptional
leaders.

You can
secure your free copy today by clicking on this exclusive link:
https://resources.hoover.org/victory-and-the-savior-generals

Inside
its digital pages, you'll embark on a journey that uncovers the
defining traits of these savior generals. Their ingenuity,
contrarian spirit, and unwavering courage breathed new life into
seemingly lost causes. Their profound understanding of conflict,
rejection of complacency, adaptability to change, and alignment
with societal values contributed to their monumental successes.

This is
your opportunity to unravel the secrets of history's most
influential leaders, unlocking invaluable lessons that resonate
even in the present day.

Claim
your complimentary copy of Victory and the Savior Generals now
through this secure link:
https://resources.hoover.org/victory-and-the-savior-generals

Wishing
you a wonderful journey through the pages of history!

Greg

Greg
Stamps | Online Development
Hoover
Institution | Stanford University

With its
eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the
Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research
organization that seeks to improve the human condition by
advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national
security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred
years, Hoover's work has directly led to policies that have
produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the
United States and around the world.

Hoover
Institution 434 Galvez Mall Stanford University Stanford CA USA
94305

---
|
---
| _Who are you partnered with?_ It’s no secret that Vanguard, Fidelity and Charles Schwab could be considered three of the most popular and well-known brokerage firms. Each offers a wide range of products and services, from banking and investment products to financial advisors and financial planning services.

However, there are some important differences, from fees to financial services to research resources, each of which could impact your customer experience. [Learn how these firms compare so you can decide on the right fit for you.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38358%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=IgTe%2bsVFGypBduADIQxcrQ&sysid=1)

Ready to kickstart your retirement? Working with a financial advisor can be a crucial part of any healthy retirement plan. But with thousands of options available, it can seem daunting to choose one. That’s why SmartAsset created a [no-cost tool](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38359%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=IKJH7mdb6eJJjn0dfLn4Tw&sysid=1) to help match you with up to three financial advisors serving your area. All advisors on the platform are rigorously screened through a proprietary due diligence process and legally bound to work in your best interest.

While your advisor matches may not necessarily be associated with the above institutions, research suggests people who work with a financial advisor:
* feel more at ease about their finances
* could end up with about 15% more money to spend in retirement.1

It's never too late to work towards a comfortable retirement.

[See how Vanguard, Fidelity and Schwab stack up »](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38350%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=cQP%2bl4fxn23ua6TEgxYCmQ&sysid=1)
---
|
---
| **Try SmartAsset's Financial Advisor Matching Tool**
Get retirement ready. Try this no-cost tool to get matched with up to 3 vetted financial advisors serving your area.
---
| [Get Started](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38351%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=hkzqXIfOAl7FawD9BBgjvQ&sysid=1 "Get Started")

|

This article may potentially include a firm or firms that have a business relationship with SmartAsset, in which SmartAsset is compensated for lead referrals or cost per engagement. SmartAsset is not a client of the aforementioned firms. SmartAsset did not receive compensation for including any of the firms in the aforementioned article. This article contains links to SmartAsset’s financial advisor matching tool, which may or may not match you with the firms mentioned in this profile. The matching tool does not include all available advisors and firms and matches based on specific criteria (investable assets, geography, and willingness to work with a remote advisor). This is not an offer to buy or sell any security or interest. All investing involves risk, including loss of principal. Working with an adviser may come with potential downsides such as payment of fees (which will reduce returns). There are no guarantees that working with an adviser will yield positive returns. The existence of a fiduciary duty does not prevent the rise of potential conflicts of interest. SmartAsset Advisors, LLC ("SmartAsset"), a wholly owned subsidiary of Financial Insight Technology, is registered with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission as an investment adviser. SmartAsset’s services are limited to referring users to third party advisers registered or chartered as fiduciaries ("Adviser(s)") with a regulatory body in the United States that have elected to participate in our matching platform based on information gathered from users through our online questionnaire. SmartAsset does not review the ongoing performance of any Adviser, participate in the management of any user’s account by an Adviser or provide advice regarding specific investments. We do not manage client funds or hold custody of assets, we help users connect with relevant financial advisors. SmartAsset.com is not intended to provide legal advice, tax advice, accounting advice or financial advice (Other than referring users to third party advisers registered or chartered as fiduciaries ("Adviser(s)") with a regulatory body in the United States). SmartAsset is not a financial planner, broker or tax adviser. The Service is intended only to assist you in your understanding of financial organization and decision-making and is broad in scope. Your personal financial situation is unique, and any information and investing strategies obtained through SmartAsset.com may not be appropriate for your situation. Accordingly, before making any final decisions or implementing any financial strategy, you should consider obtaining additional information and advice from your accountant or other financial advisers who are fully aware of your individual circumstances. name: Marjorie Dannenfelser
subject: I need you to help us stop this tragedy
body:
Did you know the United States has a human rights issue in common with countries like China and North Korea?

| [ ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c681967%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=xBIuKyofmmvQPUiTG6%2f9pw&sysid=1)
---
Fellow American,

Did you know the United States has a human rights issue in common with countries like China and North Korea?

**Becuase of the Biden Administration's commitment to the abortion industry, the United States is 1 of 7 countries in the world that allows abortion-on-demand.

**Abortion-on-demand is the ending of an unborn child's life and _ANY_ point of a woman's pregnancy. A baby, fully developed at 38-40 weeks, an be aborted should its mother detemine she does not want her child.

**This is an appalling tragedy happening in our country today and there are many abortionists willing to carry out this barbaric practice celebrated by Big Abortion.

**My heart breaks for the complete devastation and the utter devaluing of human life our own president and his administration is sworn to protect.

These abortion extremists have yet to name a single protection they would grant any unborn child and put it into law. In fact, they want to make abortion-on-demand the law of the land and write it into our own Constitution!

Babies in the womb are screaming in pain because they are being tortured to death and no one can hear them. They have no voice to cry out when they are viciously murdered.

**[We must cry out for them _now_.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c681968%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=bHz6Tgq2HaDIri6nslrA%2bw&sysid=1) **

Stand with SBA Pro-Life America on the front lines in the fight for life and let the Biden Administration know you stand with the majority of Americans and do not support this deadly agenda. Join 72% of Americans who want pro-life protections for babies who can feel pain at 15 weeks in the womb.

Submit your name at the link below and put an end to abortion-on-demand in our country _today._
[SIGN YOUR NAME](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c681969%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=7AG6fqQycMJ0EpcLFnztOw&sysid=1)
| We must be the voice for the unborn because our president and his administration have proven they will not protect these innocent children.
---
For LIFE,

Marjorie Dannenfelser
President, SBA Pro-Life America

Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America
2776 S. Arlington Mill Dr.
PO Box 803
Arlington, VA, 22206

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: The truth is, no one knows for certain
body:
Have you ever wondered if things could return to God's original plan?

| | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zht0l3var6c6rb8tg5v19fdi2kr3sorvr3h1eou0_rp22sh2s8i6eo35ctimaor1c5h2bs)
---
Hello Friend,

Take a moment to look around. It's like we're living out Romans 1:25 - trading the truth of God for a lie and focusing on earthly things rather than our Creator.

Have you ever wondered if things could return to God's original plan?

I want to remind you, Friend, that this chaotic time is fleeting. The shadows will fade, and a new day will dawn. The King of Kings, our Savior, will return.

That's the heart of Revelation.

Each day on this earth shapes us for what's to come - a grand finale. Amidst today's messiness and uncertainty, remember the promise that our story's end is already secured, regardless of the present turmoil or future darkness.

Revelation intricately unveils where our stories lead.

It's a captivating book filled with symbols, creatures, and events yet to unfold. But remember Revelation 1:3 - there's a blessing for those who read, listen, and follow its words because the time is near.

This isn't just a prophecy; it's a blessing-filled journey.

Revelation isn't just about revealing future events; it's about revealing Jesus Christ.

When Jesus came as a man, His divine brilliance was veiled by humanity. It's like dimming a lamp's light. But when He returns, that veil will lift, and we'll see His true glory. That's Revelation's essence.

As the great reveal approaches, I'm here to guide you and your loved ones through the remarkable events preceding the revelation of our King.

In my brand-new book, _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ , I tackle five common questions about the end times. We'll delve into:

1\. America's Fate: Will America stand for Christ or fall for the Antichrist?
2\. The Day of the Lord: How should we live in anticipation of this apocalyptic event?
3\. The Marriage of the Lamb: What unfolds before and after the rapture?
4\. Gog and Magog: How can we honor God in our lives amid their appearance?
5\. The Tree of Life: What's the significance of this tree in the New Jerusalem?

Understanding these mysteries will anchor you in hope, bolster your trust in God's promises, and equip you to share with the unsure.

In addition to this new book, I would like to share with you "The Major Characters of the End Times," as a token of my gratitude for your support. This full-color, large print booklet introduces key players during the rapture, tribulation, second coming, and final judgment - vital for understanding the grand narrative.
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z9pi9edcles1tlr8gincuhiig687una5fh70gjao_rp22sh2s8i6eo35ctimaor1c5h2bs)I would like to send you my brand-new book _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ and my brand-new resource "The Major Characters of the End Times" as a thank you for your generous support of $10 or more to the ministry of _Pathway to Victory_.
Make your generous gift here: [https://secure.ptv.org/mysteries-of-the-end-times-generous-gift-1-dr-robert-jeffress](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z42pklojgv00b2iimlgihmt1va9t9unkihe8rcu8_rp22sh2s8i6eo35ctimaor1c5h2bs)

_Pathway to Victory_ is committed to equipping believers with biblical teaching and reaching the unsaved by spreading the Good News of Jesus Christ through the most effective means available: radio, television, digital, and print. Your gifts fuel that important work and enable people worldwide to experience an intimate walk with Christ. Thank you for your faithful support.

May our study of Revelation prepare, strengthen, and inspire you. Come quickly, Lord Jesus.

Sharing the Truth of God's Word, ____
---
| | Dr. Robert Jeffress Senior Pastor, First Baptist Dallas
---

Trump Train News
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ztqqojosm56dn8fn6opovoq8cv1njesg00dbqdbg_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjk5p7atdge5p78d5jmeqjetjjkorrbdt5eer7ashmeop79chl6ujuadf161rn9cdhmir76pr02sqr8d5hmej3fddj4iqu8oj6c1jmcpr246h22sh2s8i6eo35ctimaor1c5h2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zuof2ai50ue9skc79j67q2l32u09cic17jmla1gg_rp22sh2s8i6eo35ctimaor1c5h2bs)_

name: American Action News
subject: Who controls whom?
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

| | | This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zl6ddsk1n9un30tpj7d298hnp31hlgiit9u4l9a0_rp22sh2s8i6eo35ctimaor5cdh2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection **by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1vggk39fpvmp6atmk50nlc7ubak95b4njbeu1g8_rp22sh2s8i6eo35ctimaor5cdh2bs)**
## Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?
[YES](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zkpotvgslatuih488h4b3fkarfmpivu2rsqm2fo0_rp22sh2s8i6eo35ctimaor5cdh2bs) [NO](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zh5326ila54g7aefi0u61j3v56e4s398jabgdt18_rp22sh2s8i6eo35ctimaor5cdh2bs) For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale’s American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8h3p8imuf483fkq832allcb22l4k5k4gjj0tg08_rp22sh2s8i6eo35ctimaor5cdh2bs)**
** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

---

American Action News
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2rcf7ssllf8k4v7b2e0uirjpmc9qlb3u1vm0eb8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkgqracjkmoq37d1m65qbfctjmkrncst66uqrf9bjmpqn4djm69qb4d9nkvijbo9getqb3cdkmppmeo0n6mq39cdjkorrbcp4mni64pj0ctj69oh1k8gn48n24hjm0pb7clim6pb3c8iv0)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztqh0dtmdvgpgdro6hb07fq4ud52cjgd7m79gvbg_rp22sh2s8i6eo35ctimaor5cdh2bs)_

name: Amanda Chase
subject: Virginians Are Going to be Forced to Buy Electric Cars
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Amanda Chase
body:
EVERY Virginian MUST WATCH!
| | | | Virginians are being forced to drive electric vehicles by Senate Democrats. Time is ticking.
---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001QBiQnbd6L7LiCmj6UCBZy2IpYtGP5Xa_tQynWLII168OcDtl6d5_e-U4QZs2wbeGoerq0vYVg-Zc7Fe7xHRUorol5-JcUVYSkkpk4zRaJ4hMH5eLqNoLW7NXzOysNy8lbswZD8oOUbFH4EOhM_zNTcqI0GVWLjcWlylte_8wkpfPanUB4rJ27A==&c=5xFlQDyctClD9vPeyj8S4xhWT9o9z4_SUYX4L633Z2wbacByVGcGvA==&ch=Z8tXXJ4p8nvnZT4Tmq2vGbyl10YyG2x21XgY6M_LsD5IXvFcqs8iRQ==)
---
---
| Senate Democrats Are Forcing You to Buy an Electric Car
---
| Dear Friends, This is probably one of the most pressing issues before the General Assembly this year.
This one issue alone could change the life of every Virginian, and I want to sound the alarm.
The Virginia Democrat Senate and House Leadership want to dictate what car you can drive by 2035. They passed the legislation in 2021 and Republicans have been trying to repeal this legislation ever since, including last week.
The mandate will phase in for new cars, pickup trucks, and SUVs -- ordering 35% of those sold in Virginia with a 2025 model year to be electric and 100% of new models to be so by 2035.
Legislators passed the Clean Car law in 2021, signed by former Democratic Gov. Ralph Northam and adopted from California's controversial standard that dozens of states have taken up.
Americans expect freedom and choice, not mandates and forced compliance through financial penalties. Yet just as Democrats shoved Obamacare on us, they are now doing the same with the vehicles you drive.
You have to watch this video.
This past week, Senators Richard Stuart, Ryan McDougle and John McGuire presented SB3, to repeal the "Californication" of Virginia's vehicle emissions standards.
Unfortunately, the bill failed and Virginians are facing a ticking time bomb, costing thousands to those who fail to comply.
The "Californication of Virginia" vehicles bill, HB1965, passed in 2021, currently bans gas-powered cars by 2035.
It must be repealed.
I hope you will call all Democrats in the General Assembly and demand that they repeal this onerous mandate on Virginians who want to choose what type of car they drive.
---
|
---

name: John Pierce
subject: J6: “Thousands more” to be arrested . . .
body:
So far, more than 1,200 Americans have been arrested. Through my organization, the National Constitutional Law Union (NCLU), I’m currently representing 30 of these defendants.

| | | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38361%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=9lx%2bNzTD4Wuw8pwlPy2SJA&sysid=1)
Dear Patriot,

[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38362%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=fsqvBJ%2bTQnJ5MtcigrcWUw&sysid=1) The U.S. Attorney for the District of Columbia recently stood behind a podium and announced the DOJ planned to charge “thousands” more Americans who were present during the January 6th protests.

So far, more than 1,200 Americans have been arrested. Through my organization, the National Constitutional Law Union (NCLU), **I’m currently representing 30 of these defendants.**

My trial schedule is PACKED, and **[I need your continued support](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38363%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8eJB4J0uciG7Gfb6O08rig&sysid=1).**

My name is John Pierce. After my tour in the United States Army, I pursued a law degree at Harvard University. I was also one of the few conservative editors of the _Harvard Law Review_ (after Obama served in that role).

We need TOUGH and relentless warriors who defend the Constitution, and that's why I gave up my lucrative law practice to pursue Constitutional Law. I never expected this to happen.

In my wildest dreams, I could not have imagined our government rounding up and arresting Americans who attended a political protest.

**During the BLM riots, federal buildings were BURNED, police were assaulted _en masse,_ and God knows how many Americans were hurt. And what happened? The Department of Justice dropped all charges against anyone involved. **

But for the January 6th protesters, our government wants to send a clear message: **Stand up to your masters and pay the price!**

I just returned to D.C. for a hearing, and my funds are running low. The cost of airfare and hotels alone for myself, the defendants, and their families are burning through funds.

Criminal litigation is EXPENSIVE, and I’m pushing the limits of my Harvard Law degree to represent these Americans who need our help.

**[Will you help keep us going?](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38364%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=CuyKw3%2fLSZU0cUajxGjpmg&sysid=1)**

I have spent countless hours with these defendants and their families. Jobs and homes have been lost. Families have been destroyed. **The DOJ's goal is to terrorize these people to set an example for us all.**

What we see today are the same tactics King George III used before the Revolutionary War started. The British Crown used "writs of assistance" to carry out wide-ranging searches and arrests of anyone for anything. The tactic inspired James Madison to write the Fourth Amendment to our Constitution to protect our privacy.

Today, our government uses high-tech methods to do the same, tracking down anyone who stepped foot on Capitol grounds on January 6th and then using "anonymous" tips to determine their crimes.

Just as King George III abused his power to quell a rebellion among the colonists, our government is abusing its power to do the same.

It's 1776 all over again, and the defendants I represent are the last, best hope that our nation can continue to trust in our Constitution to keep our government in check.

My fight for these men and women isn't just about keeping them out of jail; it's about preserving the framework of our Republic. **[Please help me keep fighting](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38375%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6caCbuGBvlvAO6TH02odIg&sysid=1).**

Over the next three weeks, I must raise $58,000 to cover our expenses. Travel, hotels, paralegals, researchers, and assisting attorneys all need to be paid. My credit cards are MAXED out, and I'm relying on you and a handful of other patriots to help. **[Will you chip in today?](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38376%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=EBlUR9kdqaAfjqq9y0uo3g&sysid=1)**

Every dollar helps and is greatly appreciated.

Thank you for your time, support, and prayers.

In Vigilance,

John M. Pierce
Chairman and Founder
National Constitutional Law Union

DONATIONS TO THE NCLU ARE NOT TAX-DEDUCTIBLE
THE NCLU IS A NON-PROFIT SOCIAL WELFARE ORGANIZATION THAT IS IN THE PROCESS OF APPLYING FOR 501(C)(4) TAX-EXEMPT STATUS. IT IS ANTICIPATED THAT A SUBSTANTIAL AMOUNT OF FUNDS RAISED BY THE NCLU WILL BE PAID TO A LAW FIRM OWNED AND/OR CONTROLLED BY THE FOUNDER, CHAIRMAN OF THE BOARD AND CEO OF THE NCLU FOR LEGAL SERVICES AND COSTS INCURRED BY CLIENTS OF THE FIRM IN CONNECTION WITH LITIGATIONS WITHIN THE FULL MISSION STATEMENT AS DETERMINED IN THE SOLE DISCRETION OF THE NCLU BOARD OF DIRECTORS AND AS APPROVED FOR PAYMENT BY THOSE CLIENTS.

clean_body: So far, more than 1,200 Americans have been arrested. Through my organization, the National Constitutional Law Union (NCLU), I’m currently representing 30 of these defendants. | | | Dear Patriot, The U.S. Attorney for the District of Columbia recently stood behind a podium and announced the DOJ planned to charge “thousands” more Americans who were present during the January 6th protests. So far, more than 1,200 Americans have been arrested. Through my organization, the National Constitutional Law Union (NCLU), I’m currently representing 30 of these defendants. My trial schedule is PACKED, and . My name is John Pierce. After my tour in the United States Army, I pursued a law degree at Harvard University. I was also one of the few conservative editors of the Harvard Law Review (after Obama served in that role). We need TOUGH and relentless warriors who defend the Constitution, and that's why I gave up my lucrative law practice to pursue Constitutional Law. I never expected this to happen. In my wildest dreams, I could not have imagined our government rounding up and arresting Americans who attended a political protest. During the BLM riots, federal buildings were BURNED, police were assaulted en masse, and God knows how many Americans were hurt. And what happened? The Department of Justice dropped all charges against anyone involved. But for the January 6th protesters, our government wants to send a clear message: Stand up to your masters and pay the price! I just returned to D.C. for a hearing, and my funds are running low. The cost of airfare and hotels alone for myself, the defendants, and their families are burning through funds. Criminal litigation is EXPENSIVE, and I’m pushing the limits of my Harvard Law degree to represent these Americans who need our help. I have spent countless hours with these defendants and their families. Jobs and homes have been lost. Families have been destroyed. The DOJ's goal is to terrorize these people to set an example for us all. What we see today are the same tactics King George III used before the Revolutionary War started. The British Crown used "writs of assistance" to carry out wide-ranging searches and arrests of anyone for anything. The tactic inspired James Madison to write the Fourth Amendment to our Constitution to protect our privacy. Today, our government uses high-tech methods to do the same, tracking down anyone who stepped foot on Capitol grounds on January 6th and then using "anonymous" tips to determine their crimes. Just as King George III abused his power to quell a rebellion among the colonists, our government is abusing its power to do the same. It's 1776 all over again, and the defendants I represent are the last, best hope that our nation can continue to trust in our Constitution to keep our government in check. My fight for these men and women isn't just about keeping them out of jail; it's about preserving the framework of our Republic. . Over the next three weeks, I must raise $58,000 to cover our expenses. Travel, hotels, paralegals, researchers, and assisting attorneys all need to be paid. My credit cards are MAXED out, and I'm relying on you and a handful of other patriots to help. Every dollar helps and is greatly appreciated. Thank you for your time, support, and prayers. In Vigilance, John M. Pierce Chairman and Founder National Constitutional Law Union DONATIONS TO THE NCLU ARE NOT TAX-DEDUCTIBLE THE NCLU IS A NON-PROFIT SOCIAL WELFARE ORGANIZATION THAT IS IN THE PROCESS OF APPLYING FOR 501(C)(4) TAX-EXEMPT STATUS. IT IS ANTICIPATED THAT A SUBSTANTIAL AMOUNT OF FUNDS RAISED BY THE NCLU WILL BE PAID TO A LAW FIRM OWNED AND/OR CONTROLLED BY THE FOUNDER, CHAIRMAN OF THE BOARD AND CEO OF THE NCLU FOR LEGAL SERVICES AND COSTS INCURRED BY CLIENTS OF THE FIRM IN CONNECTION WITH LITIGATIONS WITHIN THE FULL MISSION STATEMENT AS DETERMINED IN THE SOLE DISCRETION OF THE NCLU BOARD OF DIRECTORS AND AS APPROVED FOR PAYMENT BY THOSE CLIENTS. | | * | (C) 2024 NCLU 10908 Courthouse Road, Suite 102164 Fredericksburg, VA 22408 To opt-out of marketing emails like these, please unsubscribe below.
