name: The Liberty Ledger
subject: The history of capitalism and socialism
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.libertyledger.)
---
| | Dear Friend,Over the last century, free-market capitalism and socialism have provided the dominant interpretations, and conflicting visions, of political and economic freedom. In the past few years, we’ve seen a growing trend among young Americans in favor of socialism and against capitalism.
---
| [](http://trk.libertyledger.-FS5g)
---
| | **But do they truly understand the history and outcomes of socialism and capitalism?** This is _precisely_ why we put together this brand new eBook, **[_The History Of Socialism And Capitalism_](http://trk.libertyledger.)**[](http://trk.libertyledger.), from Hoover Institution senior fellows Niall Ferguson and Victor Davis Hanson. This eBook consists of two papers—one from each scholar—written in conjunction with _The Human Prosperity Project on Socialism and Free-Market Capitalism_. This project provides objective and scholarly analyses of free-market capitalism, socialism, and hybrid systems and provides evidence on the effectiveness of the various systems on outcomes that affect prosperity and well-being. I think you will find this new eBook particularly important and timely, given the recent interest in policies that are radical from a US historical perspective, some of which are advocated by political leaders. **[Simply click here to request your free copy of _The History Of Socialism And Capitalism_.](http://trk.libertyledger.)** Thanks,Greg Greg Stamps | Online DevelopmentHoover Institution | Stanford University
---
_With its eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research organization that seeks to improve the human condition by advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred years, Hoover’s work has directly led to policies that have produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the United States and around the world._
---
Liberty Ledger P.O. Box 455 Leesburg, VA 20178 If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.libertyledger.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MjE2Mjk1NiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjI0MDIwLThjNzU1MTIyZDVkMjQ2ODI5MGQ5Y2NlN2Q5MzEwNzgzIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlfQ/7vPwWVc42l25nUKVEswpJQ) to unsubscribe.
---

I’ve been down to the border multiple times and seen it firsthand. I’ve met with border patrol, local law enforcement, and residents of these border communities. The situation is not only heartbreaking….it’s incredibly dangerous. But this isn’t just an issue for border states. Joe Biden and his open-border policies have made every community in America a border town….and we are all less safe because of Biden’s failure to secure the border. There are no consequences for what the cartels are doing in the southern border. We have a current administration that refuses to acknowledge that there's a crisis….they refuse to acknowledge that the border is wide open. That’s why Republicans in Congress have acted on real, serious legislation that would actually address the problem and create real and serious consequences for the drug cartels and those who cross our border illegally. But our efforts remain blocked by Joe Biden in the White House and Democrats controlling the Senate. Right now, the House is the only line of defense against the ridiculous open border policies. That’s why I’m reaching out to you today. Democrats have made me their #1 target, and they know that if they beat me in this election that the entire House of Representatives could flip to the Democrats. They are doing everything they can to defeat me. https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=e5f60be79c5b9565c6828549ba63f3b3ccbfd81bf95786a40515d4b66d264a3607fd0e1b7de0783ab661744caeed5200e9f938ff3695d077 So if you care about securing the border and want to make sure Republicans continue to control the House, I’m personally asking you to make a donation today. https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=e5f60be79c5b9565c6828549ba63f3b3ccbfd81bf95786a40515d4b66d264a3607fd0e1b7de0783ab661744caeed5200e9f938ff3695d077 Whether you can spare $100 or just $1, every single donation will allow me to keep fighting for border security in Congress. If we lose this race, Joe Biden and the Democrats will have another loyal foot soldier who will turn a blind eye to the border catastrophe. We cannot allow that to happen. So please, I’m pleading with you to https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=e5f60be79c5b9565c6828549ba63f3b3ccbfd81bf95786a40515d4b66d264a3607fd0e1b7de0783ab661744caeed5200e9f938ff3695d077 make a donation of any amount today to help us secure our border and keep the American people safe. Thanks for your help. I’m counting on you!! -Jen https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=e5f60be79c5b9565e008a38184d7e61317d13aaef314e712136575c370f7ee7be06fe1822b9d940d6b79b9a7a9634ed640205fdc2c241a06 JEN KIGGANS is running for Congress in the most competitive House race in the entire country, and she needs our urgent support. The federal debt recently hit yet another all-time high, a staggering $34 trillion as of December 2023, propelled by a $1.7 trillion deficit between revenue and expenditures. Deficits propel debt, it’s true, but spending is the fuel.
http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z1dfreheb55lfftlpeu5nlv6ggipgdv7bl99d6kg_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t46mqj4t5m6gpr4cjkmkpj9ctn6ej3fddnk2qj4t9memjn1d1hemib2td7eior3dd1egrbadd1euqq8dhhelq33cdkumj7fcdjekqq8ddl69qbcd1memgjachhemg74tti66qjbdt246h22sh2s8i6eo35cthm4ob0s5h2bs

Here’s What It Will Take To Actually Solve America’s Debt Problem

name: Elise Stefanik
subject: The corrupt lap dog of the illegitimate Trump impeachment is coming for me now…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
He just fast-tracked a formal censure vote against me.

| |

---
| | | Friend - I’m fuming.

_The corrupt lap dog behind the sham Trump impeachment is plowing ahead with a plot to CENSURE ME in the U.S. House of Representatives! _

These Radical Democrats hate me for standing with Trump.

They hate me for leading the fight to secure our elections.

They hate me for exposing the corruption surrounding the Biden Family.

They hate me for humiliating the presidents of Harvard, MIT, and Penn on national TV.

**Now they’re rushing to PUNISH me in the congressional record. **

Going head-to-head with the well-funded, Trump-hating Democrats will be a HUGE undertaking, but I’m not afraid to stand up to them. And I have a hunch you aren't either.

_**[So here’s my plan: I set a goal of mobilizing 15,000 Conservative donors between now and the sham censure vote. I'd be honored to have your support.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c681975%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=CUPYmWKYT%2b6Ev%2feQp9gNNw&sysid=1 "So here’s my plan: I set a
goal of mobilizing 15,000 Conservative donors between now and the sham censure
vote. I'd be honored to have your support.")**_
---
| | | [DEFEND ELISE STEFANIK](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c681976%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=epE0XacmGGKrQFk5us8VZg&sysid=1 "DEFEND ELISE STEFANIK")
---
Together, we’ll make these Trump-hating Democrats REGRET their plot to silence me and undermine everything I’ve worked for.

But if we fall short of this goal, any one of my Pro-Trump colleagues could be next.

_**[PLEASE: I’m counting on you to help me fight back.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c681977%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=E%2fvCnmsu2BUKR03ufh%2bjaQ&sysid=1 "PLEASE: I’m counting on
you to help me fight back.")**_

Thank you,
Elise Stefanik

---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c681978%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=GO7RUIfrRjxAba6w7WgnGQ&sysid=1 "Elise Stefanik")
---

| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c681979%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=nMoXtGeXQVi5MPylS3tmUQ&sysid=1 "Please take my Majority Leader Survey!")

This is Steve Scalise.

As your Majority Leader, I’m respectfully asking you to fill out my _**[MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c681970%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=SQ4x9jxlblLgEXkJa2bpsg&sysid=1 "MAJORITY LEADER
SURVEY")**_ at your earliest convenience. It’s important. I want to have your goals, your concerns, and your priorities in mind before I do anything else.

The federal government has spent over $1 million to develop and test a web-accessible video game that aims to help LGBTQ youth stop “binge drinking,” a federal grant database shows. The National Institutes of Health (NIH) has approved $1,075,660 in grant funding since 2016 to develop and test the effectiveness of a Japanese role-playing game-inspired web app in reducing binge []

Piers Morgan said Friday Democrats need to “wake up fast,” noting President Joe Biden’s declining poll numbers and the results of the Iowa caucuses. Biden has a 40% approval rating according to the RealClearPolitics average of polls from Dec. 26 to Jan. 18. Morgan said Trump’s landslide victory in Monday’s Iowa caucuses should be a warning about Biden’s chances in November.

Last night, I was in Plymouth supporting my friend Kari MacRae, who is a Republican candidate for State Senate. Even though Plymouth is outside of my State Committee district, I am dedicated to supporting Republican candidates all across the Commonwealth who share our values.
[Support Kari's campaign. Click Here.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001IpC2D0VGhoyfxhA1NEOrGvQo7BZKzdY3Y7mKtunl_-Y59Ha2pcWOULjF2mEg8ijg7XLuLCbCDLUa7KNkOANjwRGivhKyh3rgmZj5UxMauynoU2b83jzq7c2dAe5RJ9tuWjciAQx3Ut-DnybnnDUOTgU7cKH4aZUwtHP639tNFM2XOyXS4iSHmjyehENWEQGZaD7I5Oh8lsEahEyYfYzuwQ==&c=LzFw-ytI4SQOT-jaZuNWkc70C6vcxxPmDiQ_HW9shyr2T6Z_Wh3Hnw==&ch=ge5wHjKCycNdmbOJa8L-HrusQ7lI1cfeccbUoK9HtgOvQ7KQ35cttg==)
Candidates like Kari are not career politicians, they are hardworking concerned citizens like you who decide to take a stand and put their lives on hold to run for public office, to fight for a better Massachusetts. These candidates not only deserve our support, they need our support.
KathyJo and I are tirelessly dedicated to supporting Republican candidates, and in our roles in the Republican State Committee, we will always fight to ensure great candidates like Kari are receiving the resources and support they need.
If you are willing to support me and KathyJo's race for the State Committee, so we can continue to fight for our candidates, you can do so here: [https://secure.winred.com/diehl-boss-for-state-committee/donate-today](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001IpC2D0VGhoyfxhA1NEOrGvQo7BZKzdY3Y7mKtunl_-Y59Ha2pcWOUMtcxPiLLM5Xm6u0B2mkm1I7pgg_6kOIbnDhTUyQFmkaAWrzWOjg0bBk2uX7sxD3rgIvmy-OFl47sNNjrlahH-o2-nupgH6z-5pSmGtJfO5F3Da7JoYGcQKrcu3Eumdf1uFEv_-HVkne_vUczhJMJ3YbgTeHoLHytw==&c=LzFw-ytI4SQOT-jaZuNWkc70C6vcxxPmDiQ_HW9shyr2T6Z_Wh3Hnw==&ch=ge5wHjKCycNdmbOJa8L-HrusQ7lI1cfeccbUoK9HtgOvQ7KQ35cttg==)
As always, thank you for your support.
Geoff Diehl

name: Conservatives Give
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

| | This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1506dc12f7984d70b8d42cb1d5b7bb7f&_e=jPvHYIUF_Tpky0rmZFO0aV2hTnwGTIf0UGzRMFzNfaMV9RGtKWj1B-oMZEIFRO-SaZ2aJstoIigv8D90sembbG6zfoHBPxaKJf2I37BeQfvWOoTJGGcbZBa8f22suvd6j83TaXsEHXedeRo2tKAFTUQZamZEX8xFjjiXErNw3NhBK997Ov88fQvQ5jxWj7duul_nOZ6DY5qSyqcjaMr6PMzrOVZN76Zi--OK8xGE7_E-jg91pDU1zCsmLMlrzpXjeRTD6EnDOQ029zctYXBTSD5zq_MdeyX7q3dhyn6yE118ywJWh-foG-3tP-JrPXXKUPzDCRjYNsGbgypDU51YGLmoNE8eYvQon8tSosRoHgYL3bieRI5yVqnzGoeL6ZHVLgLn4rL45vQ8AXu1jDDMWPkvk--7QESc__m3W-QnuAc%3D)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection **by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1506dc12f7984d70b8d42cb1d5b7bb7f&_e=jPvHYIUF_Tpky0rmZFO0aV2hTnwGTIf0UGzRMFzNfaMV9RGtKWj1B-oMZEIFRO-SaZ2aJstoIigv8D90sembbG6zfoHBPxaKJf2I37BeQfvWOoTJGGcbZBa8f22suvd6j83TaXsEHXedeRo2tKAFTUQZamZEX8xFjjiXErNw3NhBK997Ov88fQvQ5jxWj7duul_nOZ6DY5qSyqcjaMr6PMzrOVZN76Zi--OK8xGE7_E-jg91pDU1zCsmLMlrzpXj8MWCvADuXfzKMScu7lth4--ywhVk6ZU49nbMSoZ9e3pOv1ebf-Kon4-NMR1lg6OgUyZSa9qI4-VSwOek_lT81rgBYtHaf4PGxl09uAX2mmKSaggtp0GrxS_JttBMTZvsaLQEbol4wE48R6thX9lzmUbNnqt3a56-oJF4prx6nN4%3D)**
## Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?
[YES](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1506dc12f7984d70b8d42cb1d5b7bb7f&_e=jPvHYIUF_Tpky0rmZFO0aV2hTnwGTIf0UGzRMFzNfaMV9RGtKWj1B-oMZEIFRO-SaZ2aJstoIigv8D90sembbG6zfoHBPxaKJf2I37BeQfvWOoTJGGcbZBa8f22suvd6j83TaXsEHXedeRo2tKAFTUQZamZEX8xFjjiXErNw3NhBK997Ov88fQvQ5jxWj7duul_nOZ6DY5qSyqcjaMr6PMzrOVZN76Zi--OK8xGE7_E-jg91pDU1zCsmLMlrzpXjzMUMuw2a-f1rTiFZPd5DuxV2u8fnBq94MJoqT8e_hjf50STQdc2tPZOfGAnjZ_wZVCfYJC-Ig2wGcca6a4gvbR30W-l4MoBnnnsuC6ADUEEGXZbHnb3XAHLgKeklj4pE1zkn77kTp8UxCFLlxsdsYnbanf-8knlzvfyzfwzcG5I%3D) [NO](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1506dc12f7984d70b8d42cb1d5b7bb7f&_e=jPvHYIUF_Tpky0rmZFO0aV2hTnwGTIf0UGzRMFzNfaMV9RGtKWj1B-oMZEIFRO-SaZ2aJstoIigv8D90sembbG6zfoHBPxaKJf2I37BeQfvWOoTJGGcbZBa8f22suvd6j83TaXsEHXedeRo2tKAFTUQZamZEX8xFjjiXErNw3NhBK997Ov88fQvQ5jxWj7duul_nOZ6DY5qSyqcjaMr6PMzrOVZN76Zi--OK8xGE7_E-jg91pDU1zCsmLMlrzpXjZYkeOxTRIrHfX7zmaWm5Oc3ccTRqBSlgq1SSUds6VsSRagf2N0KndPqB9jqnmBEB0fXGE_hrd48CcRLl_2uVLldTQRlSijPOvvXV07v-68dIgdQgY4QyTqJVxuULshOMSDzelrDpG_78wWwRArqYiW8espkXzn0Yp2YbZMwwA-s%3D) For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1506dc12f7984d70b8d42cb1d5b7bb7f&_e=jPvHYIUF_Tpky0rmZFO0aV2hTnwGTIf0UGzRMFzNfaMV9RGtKWj1B-oMZEIFRO-SaZ2aJstoIigv8D90sembbG6zfoHBPxaKJf2I37BeQfvWOoTJGGcbZBa8f22suvd6j83TaXsEHXedeRo2tKAFTUQZamZEX8xFjjiXErNw3NhBK997Ov88fQvQ5jxWj7duul_nOZ6DY5qSyqcjaMr6PMzrOVZN76Zi--OK8xGE7_E-jg91pDU1zCsmLMlrzpXjPW3kqH31uts3Xh5oD9of44KRIYvaeMbS8LmN7x7UBlLvu62Y7yni-Iap9Ovp6kfLijDzY9gA-LAOaF9429FXDgsh6vkcvBK0W8bCs0WRyV9WlMWR3UK4rCokeh-414o9860KZzkpq__kjxY1qQOvKZ0HnuxTw4w5IeBoiOcOoQk%3D)**
** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

clean_body: It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. | | This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection. By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below: Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government? For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty. This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include: Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;" Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty; Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people; Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers. Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future. So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below: And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 Conservatives Give 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

# Saturday, January 20th, 2024
---|---
**Welcome to the weekend!** On this day in 1892, the first official game of basketball was played in a YMCA in Springfield, Mass. James Naismith, the game's inventor, described the chaos of the first game in a rare interview later discovered by a professor at the University of Kansas--where Naismith brought his new game in 1898. ([Listen to the Recording](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsjz1vwyAUAH8NbLEeHzZhYKiUZmoadepoPcPDpsIhcrCt_PsqnbveSSfd96W_YMrpNn7iTK7G0qOvaaNeHCQcpO41Dy4SSVKcnDDQGm07EHxyKIIna8mTaVtrgkFQuj2G42CwxaB4chKkBiFBgO7ANOQ1YIy6Q7IDScs0UEi1LM1PSbc6UczPstHS-DLz7KZa7w-m3pg8M3ne9715lrWuA738i2D1E1PnjanTVa1f79fTLD5Gvrhw31PO6dEZpmGcMeW_ZP138DcAAP__q5FRaA)) We hope you enjoy the milder weather this weekend--and by "milder" we mean "above zero." You won't catch The Editor washing his car in this weather, but you might find _Flyover_ readers Mike and Gwyneth washing [their beautiful 1940 Packard](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz7FuhSAUgOGngU1zOHIlDAxd3G7TpENHc4SDcotilF7Tt2_Std3_5M_3cR_vlHLa5lda2dVYRvI1PXlUDUKDetQyuMiM3El2ysDNaNuDkotj40kp1RNFi76brNG3MNFtsl2npwAyOQTUoBAU6B5My14Dxah7YjsxWqGBQ6rlaB8lbXXhmL_Lk4_Wl1Vmt9S6n6J7ETgIHP4mAodrb3zZKm9V4PC150LhFDi8L6VenHPzRv6TjtA-9lkeLuxXyjmdvREa5pVS_j3Vf90_AQAA___0dFtQ) in the Georgia sun. Thanks for sending in the photo! Have you signed up for _The Flyover_ yet? If not, you can fix that [with one click](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFOwzAQANCvsbdG5_Nhx4MHpCoTYWWMTHJODpykSk0Rf48QY7u_6b31Q5-kyDa_ppVjzfuQxio3HswJ4YQ0kJ5iZka2mqPx8OQpODB6iW2LDCZkCN4Gi5asbxNTCsFgsM5riQhIYBAMkAPf8EiQciaXOLwzBkXAk9T9aD522erCufzsNz6acV91iUutl6uyzwo7hd09Udj1aZbxRbbPP2M7VvY8Xb6lFLk6rwjmNUn5t-6rrsqeCfQRHxtdHwb8BgAA__80fFpE). Today's edition is brought to you by [NativePath](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFutDAQhJ9m6UDrtbGPwsUvIbr7q5NSosVeH464A4FzUd4-IkqZZkYjfcWnebuOV85Lft7_80N8SevIoeSXjKomrMmMpoo-iZDoSrxy2DrTWVTV7B0FtBw4cmw7diFeLkEl5qAmSq1tq-wJyaAiVGgsukaCQU7JWJZuEurAoMRc1r15X_OzzJKWr_UlexPWR7X4uZTtAP0PaAAa0tQ8-VTbuMwnATTs8YxmmzfQw5Ej6F7RBYHs9jGB7slg6zSQDepcvzb1bUh5P0qtCE82EOj-bA26vw3V7uP2mZclH9aBwfuD8_KjVP486DsAAP__DKRgsw).

## Japan Lands Spacecraft on Moon
Japan is now the fifth country to [successfully land](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsj7FuwyAUAL8GNizABJKBoYu3dO1ovcDDfhEGy9BY_fuqmTvfSaf7us93oExl-YQNfU91htDphbMSWgptZsOjT4gaR45eOXlx5mal4qu_2itCGG1UFpPDeLEpwuOqkg324kbk5LXURiotlTRWugGDkZCSsYC3B-obMxIj9XoMz0qlr5jyT33hMYS68ezX3vfGxg-mJ6an8zyHtkPAP8r09IQdithqLSJDiVQW0b5DwNZEy7SJtxsOSJ0fPu4n5UzNOmbksgHld6P_e_wbAAD__wrCWbE) a spacecraft on the moon, albiet an unmanned craft. The robotic spacecraft, nicknamed "Moon Sniper" for its capability of landing on a very specific spot on the moon's surface, [touched down](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFuwyAQQL_G3oiO8xnjgaFLtnTtaF3gSIgwWDZK2r-v0rnj01ue3tdluXDKqdw-eRXXYl3Yt_SURSsEhbRQH1wUQRl6cXqCcaLZgO7vjmcxVvOkEcFMcRyEvBUxVwtRgsU-OQQk0AgayMB0Ek_AMZJhma-Cc0cgIbW6nx41lXaXmH_qU_aTr2uf3b217eiGjw7PHZ55K_I63uoNe0s-S4fnB29c1FprUZlLSOWmHvzNatvrVdSR06osjYGssWYwIY5eAoq22vrR2ogzU7-7sL1SzukwU0dwWznlv4b275HfAAAA__-M-WDa) Friday morning. The mission has not gone entirely to plan, however. The spacecraft's solar power cell isn't generating electricity, meaning the craft may become a moon statue once the emergency power runs out. Japanese crews are still analyzing the problem.
## Alec Baldwin Indicted on Manslaughter Charges
Prosecutors are trying (again) to [hold Alec Baldwin responsible](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFugzAQQL_GbI7sw8YweOjiLV07ogs-4CpjR-AEpV9fpXPnJz09va_reEVOnJdP3MjXuYw4VX7SqCUoCWY0TfQzEVDbkNdOWWeGTulm9XroYtdbUL0F6ybjogaLc09gTauibdiDAqM0KK1Mp9yFJqNwnk2HNNwIBmEURa5lv3wXznWlOb3Kk_bLVLYm-bXW-yHaDwFBQHjizlRfbyYgvM0Cwo1_BIRM5yEgYKJJ3jDFk7PcMB8JH8taaZf746jyWEupnBeJC3KWGlrbO9tbKyA0u4_3k1Pio3PCqGVDTn8Z9d8pvwEAAP__wX5hUw) for the death of cinematographer Halyna Hutchins. A prop gun (mistakenly loaded with a live bullet by the film's "armorer") in Baldwin's hand went off on the set of _Rust _in 2021, killing Hutchins, but Baldwin has maintained that he did not pull the trigger. The original charges against the actor were dropped in 2023 after Baldwin's defense team created doubt about the Colt .45 functioning properly. Now, special prosecutors have established via expert examination that the gun's trigger could not go off without being pulled, and Baldwin [has been indicted](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFuwyAQQL8Gb1hwIXY8MHTxlq4drQs-4qswROYa2r-v0rnze8PT-7guV-TE-f6OO3mJZcEg_KTFajAa3OK61UcioFNH3o7mPLppMLbb_DBezmQouCmQdQNdIEC0F8T1ZOw0YcceDDhjwVjjBjP2FJzBGN2ANN0IJuUMrSzl6D8LZ9kopp_ypKMPZe-S30QeVZ3eFMwK5tZaH8t3plZfXMFMWegQ5LxTFgUzJgr6hmltnHXEQFVnaprzykFejj6-qui9PJl0JdF1K0U437vDr4_GKXEdRuXMfUdOfxHy75LfAAAA__8_W2Xc) by a grand jury in New Mexico.
## NFL Divisional Playoffs
The NFL divisional playoff round kicks off today. The Houston Texans and the Baltimore Ravens start things off at 4:30 ET, and both teams' quarterbacks will try to get their second playoff victory. [Houston's C.J. Stroud](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFyozAQQL9GdMus1kJAQeGGzldccVcyAlZYGSERSTbx32ecOuWb17x5_2_TzTjvwvbH7DwUGyezFPfkSQIhkJpUtQ6WmfhS8SBbbFrVa5TVfaAOjZV9tyhlm7bTDaPEi7aLRt3y3FVuICSFklCi0tjWvCg01iptuJ-ZeqGQV1diqj-iC-XO1r_ik1O9xL3yw72UI4vLVdAoaDzPs95zeDtBIwfYZkFjPmIqgsZg_ZtKio8VZl7izhle8RE2zgU-ZygRThfAwOHNK1oLm9kZTIbCXyZkSPFRYE7xDBlUA1IJGk2C61Xu__6uzyoN63E6713WrVC47cb5n87y67XvAAAA__9ptm7R) became the NFL's youngest quarterback to win a playoff game last week. [The San Fransico 49ers and the Green Bay Packers](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFu8yAURp8Gb1iXG2L_DAx_Bm_pVCmjhfElpgFjAY3lt6_cucunTzrL0Xncx7vxwa_PDxNJV5dGY6t_0yg4Akc5ymbWjgjp0pAWPVx7qToQzaLddcZpmi9gqZuc-KeUENIqnKylviPVeI2AEgSCANlB35KVYJyTnSE1ESomgWZfU26_kl_rQi4c6U25tSk2QS-1boVd_jMcGA77vrexrCdjONDKvwvDoWwp1_OkulBmOGzGvigXLtW5Lzp4TJHWWrjLKfLVBb4FcyTnePZvE_LBcDCZ327i-fDLZ5P1vO0-BF-6nkl4RuPDr1D9M89PAAAA___cOWhv) will meet for an NFL playoff record 10th time. The 49ers lead the series 5-4, and they're looking for their fourth straight victory. [In Sunday's action,](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskTGP4yAUhH8N7ojg8YLtwsWtVu722i0jDA_DHYYISKz796ek3m40M83M9_11-zIxxbz_Ngct3ZebsT0-6SY5CA54w8EtnghIDbTIUVxHnLWQQ1j0jOoKhGDn66YVTWbSasINyVg_ynmICwhAIUFIgVqMF7IojPeoDc0bwcxQkIu91MufEnMP5NO_8qR6seUY0hJ6vzemfjFYGazneV6Oll8Zg5UyfzQGa7uX2l8i-_QqBdN59onv5qDGTSVeMu_lKLWWk7v4jC2WbBKv5ZEdbzaQeyTioZy8F36abgPvITZ-Ev2l7BispvKPD7l_byoytRYbHVOfRyO3534PrjLQ9vk2J3VV8nXJLEdEUhtoL8aRCC2Ok_AMNEWmPqUe6uLuZ0wpNj0yFPthYnrv7j9S-B8AAP__e62Hjw) the Tampa Bay Buccaneers will travel to Detroit to face the Lions, and the defending Super Bowl champions, the Kansas City Chiefs, will be on the road against the Buffalo Bills.

Sen. John Thune (R-SD) pushed back on Trump's statement, saying that the current compromise includes good policies. ([More](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskD9v8yAQhz8NbETH5V4cBoZ38ZauHS0Ch02DwbJpon77Ku3a9fdHj_S8X6erzyXX-c2v7Hpqkw89P3jSCkEhTSSjS8zIZ8lOD_BvIGtAy8XdDMLFgB7SxSZD3lLUlM426kvwKYLMDgEJNIIGMjCcOBD4lMh4tjdGKwg45t7200fLtS-cyld78H4KbZXFLb1vhzj_FzgKHPvCSy7l1Qkcl7Zy5echcDy4-s4CRyJtLFjV9891U93f-VCtqjWEViuXon6Xam7bK7-1PfKuNh_ufn795e7i9syl5MMMgmBeff7hyf6nme8AAAD__-GCZXw)) ➤******In the House, **Speaker Mike Johnson (R-LA) is also getting pressured to accept a border compromise. He was seen leaving a White House meeting with President Biden and Sen. Josh Hawley (R-MO), who said the meeting was intended to "strong-arm" Johnson--something he says will not happen. ([More](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskDFvwyAYRH8N3ojgM7bjwUMXb-na0cJwBCIMEZBE_fdVMnc76Zb33s9lu-gQQ7p-6wNLc3nTpoUnNslJcFKb6uziAELfYZGTGCY1j0J2fpG2N-gJZ6l7M4zjmXY376a3szwPgzZdWEiQEpKEFGoU0wlGCe2cGjXmHTQzJWBDy-V0yyE1Dxd_8xPlZPLRxcW3dq-s_2K0Mlqbhw8xvj9Gq88HEl71Mx8VjFal5CTEyG_Zp5oTd0Cs3EM37ko-eCuP485NThXlqd-SlbfMC24wjVck3cD3XCwKt9CR0dqVxd5fIcZQx4kpcT10-BB07d9WfwEAAP__-BZtDQ)) ➤ **Nikki Haley** narrowly leads President Biden in New Hampshire head-to-head polling. clean_body: Japan is now the fifth country to a spacecraft on the moon, albeit an unmanned craft. | | | | | | Saturday, January 20th, 2024 ---|--- Welcome to the weekend! On this day in 1892, the first official game of basketball was played in a YMCA in Springfield, Mass. James Naismith, the game's inventor, described the chaos of the first game in a rare interview later discovered by a professor at the University of Kansas--where Naismith brought his new game in 1898. () We hope you enjoy the milder weather this weekend--and by "milder" we mean "above zero." You won't catch The Editor washing his car in this weather, but you might find Flyover readers Mike and Gwyneth washing in the Georgia sun. Thanks for sending in the photo! Have you signed up for The Flyover yet? If not, you can fix that . Today's edition is brought to you by . | Japan Lands Spacecraft on Moon Japan is now the fifth country to a spacecraft on the moon, albiet an unmanned craft. The robotic spacecraft, nicknamed "Moon Sniper" for its capability of landing on a very specific spot on the moon's surface, Friday morning. The mission has not gone entirely to plan, however. The spacecraft's solar power cell isn't generating electricity, meaning the craft may become a moon statue once the emergency power runs out. Japanese crews are still analyzing the problem. Alec Baldwin Indicted on Manslaughter Charges Prosecutors are trying (again) to for the death of cinematographer Halyna Hutchins. A prop gun (mistakenly loaded with a live bullet by the film's "armorer") in Baldwin's hand went off on the set of Rust in 2021, killing Hutchins, but Baldwin has maintained that he did not pull the trigger. The original charges against the actor were dropped in 2023 after Baldwin's defense team created doubt about the Colt .45 functioning properly. Now, special prosecutors have established via expert examination that the gun's trigger could not go off without being pulled, and Baldwin by a grand jury in New Mexico. NFL Divisional Playoffs The NFL divisional playoff round kicks off today. The Houston Texans and the Baltimore Ravens start things off at 4:30 ET, and both teams' quarterbacks will try to get their second playoff victory. became the NFL's youngest quarterback to win a playoff game last week. will meet for an NFL playoff record 10th time. The 49ers lead the series 5-4, and they're looking for their fourth straight victory. the Tampa Bay Buccaneers will travel to Detroit to face the Lions, and the defending Super Bowl champions, the Kansas City Chiefs, will be on the road against the Buffalo Bills. subject: School spirit or racist blackface?
body:
DEI loving leftists see racism everywhere
188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb

| | You probably see a middle school aged kid with school spirit going to watch a football game.That would be a normal reaction.But unhinged school administrators -- including the principal of his school -- saw a vile racist who is wearing blackface and needs to be severely punished. DEI loving leftists see racism everywhere. And they want to teach our kids to see racism everywhere too.Middle school student J.A. attended a football game with a group of friends, and to show school spirit, he painted athletic “eye blacks” on his cheeks. _The same kind you see both athletes and spectators wearing every time you watch sports on television._ And J.A. (a good kid with nice rule-following parents) seemed like an easy target.The school officials at the San Diego area school he attends wanted to make an example out of him – and so they decided that this young boy was guilty of the hate crime of wearing black face.They suspended him, banned him from sporting events, and placed a “hate crime” on his permanent record. **Well, these race-baiting leftist administrators picked the wrong family to mess with.**** ****J.A. and his parents are taking legal action, and we’re standing with them.** **[And I’m asking you to join our effort to defend J.A.’s rights and restore his reputation.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/yIJvSvM6OeqGxsaLSbZbqg~~/AARclAA~/RgRnjjMiP0SeaHR0cHM6Ly9hbmVkb3QubGliZXJ0eWNlbnRlci5vcmcvNDg4MjU0ZmQtMTZkZi00NDk4LWIwMjctMTFjY2QyYjhhNWJiP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9QkRHLVJFTiZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVNJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI0MDEyMF9CREdfQ0ZBTF9FWUVCTEFDSy1GVU5EX1JFTl9QQS1ST05XA3NwY0IKZaGTpKtl8ShThlIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)** Put yourself in the shoes of this 8th grader who was accused of committing a hate crime after showing up to a football game with face paint.Even though he did nothing wrong, he’s being condemned as an evil racist.It would’ve been easy for J.A. to accept the punishment, cave in, and keep his head down.

But he was brave enough to stand up and fight back.**He can’t do it alone. That’s why I’m writing you today.** We’re going up against a school district with practically unlimited funds that has a political agenda to preserve and promote its DEI philosophy. J.A. and his family simply don’t have the resources to match.That’s where the Center for American Liberty steps in. The Center for American Liberty has a track record of taking on these types of cases and winning. You probably heard about our recent victory against another California school district on behalf of Jessica Konen whose daughter was socially transitioned to a new “gender identity” behind Jessica’s back.Unlike the big government agencies we go up against, we don’t have unlimited funds. We are entirely reliant on brave supporters like you who are willing to stand side by side with the victims of woke ideology like J.A. **[If you agree that this is a case worthy of the Center for American Liberty’s involvement, please consider making a generous tax-deductible donation to support this case.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/yIJvSvM6OeqGxsaLSbZbqg~~/AARclAA~/RgRnjjMiP0SeaHR0cHM6Ly9hbmVkb3QubGliZXJ0eWNlbnRlci5vcmcvNDg4MjU0ZmQtMTZkZi00NDk4LWIwMjctMTFjY2QyYjhhNWJiP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9QkRHLVJFTiZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVNJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI0MDEyMF9CREdfQ0ZBTF9FWUVCTEFDSy1GVU5EX1JFTl9QQS1ST05XA3NwY0IKZaGTpKtl8ShThlIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~) ** Don’t let San Diego school administrators get away with falsely accusing an 8th grade sports fan of a HATE CRIME.Thank you in advance for your response!
---

name: Marjorie Dannenfelser
subject: I need you to help us stop this tragedy
body:
Did you know the United States has a human rights issue in common with countries like China and North Korea?

| [ ](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=f48c28a099e7442f95c72e703344302d&_e=cDhjYDbPPoEPV1UfFV3hsX3PsXpEhqtVO6wi5Lso7DEJP0dlZmtaPh9cJ4uzX7hSU9MlxtRSErCuBysKVQlsGA37oop50jHb2oemVfOIrDXOGz1kJIuGRD55QVNUUMjA-UtZBUUDs_hH05hf7lE3iXiQttFpaj0aiTHhfcNfozABJJ9hcjxW7u1JYVMpR_SgXmlXwXT7GYugKSGIqf_50NGT6NeJiH6VF4tGr1nnWCa9boXVHUtAI88wplXda7V_oTNWvK7jw7GHblAbMXsfb_s_HUfwm7o84fjqwVn1qsbDCttIR46yfs7RxxsHa9eKc2oiigTWhejCAdDTgW6u5078AHZ7kTaJ7Q1wSPFcSo9RMSNlmE0BRHF31MtSfU5OhEuGuRYeo3GxljEi9jVIQe1uQmu2yPEvDGrXUjCsD9E%3D)
---
Fellow American,

Did you know the United States has a human rights issue in common with countries like China and North Korea?

**Becuase of the Biden Administration's commitment to the abortion industry, the United States is 1 of 7 countries in the world that allows abortion-on-demand.

** Abortion-on-demand is the ending of an unborn child's life and _ANY_ point of a woman's pregnancy. A baby, fully developed at 38-40 weeks, an be aborted should its mother detemine she does not want her child.

**This is an appalling tragedy happening in our country today and there are many abortionists willing to carry out this barbaric practice celebrated by Big Abortion.

** My heart breaks for the complete devastation and the utter devaluing of human life our own president and his administration is sworn to protect.

These abortion extremists have yet to name a single protection they would grant any unborn child and put it into law. In fact, they want to make abortion-on-demand the law of the land and write it into our own Constitution!

Babies in the womb are screaming in pain because they are being tortured to death and no one can hear them. They have no voice to cry out when they are viciously murdered.

**[We must cry out for them _now_.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=f48c28a099e7442f95c72e703344302d&_e=cDhjYDbPPoEPV1UfFV3hsX3PsXpEhqtVO6wi5Lso7DEJP0dlZmtaPh9cJ4uzX7hSU9MlxtRSErCuBysKVQlsGA37oop50jHb2oemVfOIrDXOGz1kJIuGRD55QVNUUMjA-UtZBUUDs_hH05hf7lE3iXiQttFpaj0aiTHhfcNfozABJJ9hcjxW7u1JYVMpR_SgXmlXwXT7GYugKSGIqf_50NGT6NeJiH6VF4tGr1nnWCa9boXVHUtAI88wplXda7V_oTNWvK7jw7GHblAbMXsfb-3NX7ek1S8lSG_UGO7tF7KRrtD8IDYFt5mQnimJ7zF7XePasGDWu0X7CX8BCWchohXF_xoDL_ExZb6CTtK02OIEUy6aikSbuYHNenXdMsYAs4VdID_PQF-wnomUQtjeDmORB5JHOk7N_99bRHqcj7U%3D) **

Stand with SBA Pro-Life America on the front lines in the fight for life and let the Biden Administration know you stand with the majority of Americans and do not support this deadly agenda. Join 72% of Americans who want pro-life protections for babies who can feel pain at 15 weeks in the womb.

Submit your name at the link below and put an end to abortion-on-demand in our country _today._
[SIGN YOUR NAME](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=f48c28a099e7442f95c72e703344302d&_e=cDhjYDbPPoEPV1UfFV3hsX3PsXpEhqtVO6wi5Lso7DEJP0dlZmtaPh9cJ4uzX7hSU9MlxtRSErCuBysKVQlsGA37oop50jHb2oemVfOIrDXOGz1kJIuGRD55QVNUUMjA-UtZBUUDs_hH05hf7lE3iXiQttFpaj0aiTHhfcNfozABJJ9hcjxW7u1JYVMpR_SgXmlXwXT7GYugKSGIqf_50NGT6NeJiH6VF4tGr1nnWCa9boXVHUtAI88wplXda7V_oTNWvK7jw7GHblAbMXsfbxC7KUR9GkjBIO0I9NiL-JjhXMwpzhgvEkN7TJgsPSCmevRuisCktfCTiQmxHzolIo7ZuApoYKXz9owZDMhZ_C07QCJgu3A5Ap-WTX1Ei856HYHo1znuT278gvciDou9RvR-UtdG3_qklxy4JuZ8SI8%3D)
| We must be the voice for the unborn because our president and his administration have proven they will not protect these innocent children.
---
For LIFE,

Marjorie Dannenfelser
President, SBA Pro-Life America

Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America
2776 S. Arlington Mill Dr.

Arlington, VA, 22206

name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: The people, ideas, and aims of the modern Left
body:
In this eleven-lecture course, Dr. Kevin Slack, associate professor of politics at Hillsdale College, examines the transformation in American politics since World War II.

| | | This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=59ff9798dda4425fb710726c527e97ff&_e=Pb0VOgl7YxsHSqmTbLy2wVNXjV-KxGEhKyRrPjKsNynKi5W41MxM7xyJ_ig9mLSWa3Zb2gn3UQyLnbrtlseg8qDmKRgD-WcUpnSPwk3xNEsNVnFtMQ8D8wvzHXmfxrdX-EQ0euAE3o_B4Vm8HMya4MHLWLlrk7Tzja5ssAt2JSEK4Wzu33xVeAhxy7F4r1NMp2TGQtXIw39NKmv3pNdZ-lFdjfHkviPBoAh1BO6kOCRk5peXY5-xDbVf7MyYkQ7TDrh2-A4IXUIMg3imG05h6-ehVUmGlCJe_sPKohFJIgR-P-61q9avz6ER5_kmX_QEtaldNxfLciTEWaeoMmF3lzbD2wW2NmCbyx2mQnz7FNWUE2tciOFHZcRpJ5QWamfMWvBmgu4U7x1LL18up-1ZEHbVDfkM_rUykxGBrLQbQT8%3D)

I am excited to announce that Hillsdale's online course, ["The American Left: From Liberalism to Despotism,"](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=59ff9798dda4425fb710726c527e97ff&_e=Pb0VOgl7YxsHSqmTbLy2wVNXjV-KxGEhKyRrPjKsNynKi5W41MxM7xyJ_ig9mLSWa3Zb2gn3UQyLnbrtlseg8qDmKRgD-WcUpnSPwk3xNEsNVnFtMQ8D8wvzHXmfxrdX-EQ0euAE3o_B4Vm8HMya4MHLWLlrk7Tzja5ssAt2JSEK4Wzu33xVeAhxy7F4r1NMp2TGQtXIw39NKmv3pNdZ-lFdjfHkviPBoAh1BO6kOCRk5peXY5-xDbVf7MyYkQ7TDrh2-A4IXUIMg3imG05h62t-VIb08uLjU0WDBK1Fc2i8QVW1GsJTbXImG4kDgAQy3vB_YRNG83SdXbRTPBVqo0OkCUZd8lVUmd9idSLah3-uujjjyjharIEMP_P65mUoyIBJw0QIa8hosnAJApZb4vSukz3e4V7kL9oCZDNCti4%3D) is now available to own on DVD.

In this eleven-lecture course, Dr. Kevin Slack, associate professor of politics at Hillsdale College, examines the transformation in American politics since World War II.

He explains the origins of 1960s radicalism and its rejection of midcentury liberalism; he reveals how these radicals came to dominate government and the universities beginning in the late 1970s; and he explores the rise of a neoliberal oligarchy in America and that oligarchy's alliance with the cultural Left in President Obama's second term.

This course seeks to understand the key people, ideas, and aims of the modern Left and to provide solutions for defending the American way of life today.

Will you partner with us to promote this free online course and expand other educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty? As a token of our appreciation for your support, we'll send you the DVD Box Set of the course for a gift of $100 or more.

**Click the link below to help support this course and get your copy of "The American Left: From Liberalism to Despotism" on DVD.**

[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/american-left-support-dvd](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=59ff9798dda4425fb710726c527e97ff&_e=Pb0VOgl7YxsHSqmTbLy2wVNXjV-KxGEhKyRrPjKsNynKi5W41MxM7xyJ_ig9mLSWa3Zb2gn3UQyLnbrtlseg8qDmKRgD-WcUpnSPwk3xNEsNVnFtMQ8D8wvzHXmfxrdX-EQ0euAE3o_B4Vm8HMya4MHLWLlrk7Tzja5ssAt2JSEK4Wzu33xVeAhxy7F4r1NMp2TGQtXIw39NKmv3pNdZ-lFdjfHkviPBoAh1BO6kOCRk5peXY5-xDbVf7MyYkQ7TDrh2-A4IXUIMg3imG05h6ykqtSQC-6oZk7rEVtM1JykP3R-EstNwIiu15B1s-W3adx1406PlKtHLDxvTE_EdhN3DujnG0dcbrhpFEnp9J_dba4dud40a0Xt4tWGfzUbf35pWiGZGgZApKfq8n_m3Svq2Rr-ZkOUmLW097-KMJ7Y%3D)

Warm Regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

name: Kristan Hawkins, Students for Life Action
subject: our bill just passed!
body:
Dear Pro-Life Friend,

Yesterday, _Students for Life Action’s_ first-inspired federal bill in partnership with our _Standing With You Initiative_ – **_the Pregnant Students' Rights Act (H.R. 6914)_** – passed through the U.S. House!

This bill _“requires institutions of higher education to disseminate information on the rights of, and accommodations and resources for, pregnant students, and for other purposes.”_

In other words, colleges and universities would be required to communicate the Title IX protections in place for pregnant and parenting mothers and commit to helping these mothers on campus.
[](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail19.com/t/j-l-sdjkrkl-duchtdja-y/)
Sadly, Pro-Life Friend, this is the LAST thing many college administrators want, as their goal is to push as many young women to have abortions as possible.

That’s why _Students for Life Action_ has been working closely with Rep. Ashley Hinson’s (R-IA) office on this important piece of pro-life legislation.

But all the planning, prepping, and hard work we did couldn’t have happened without the generous support of good folks like you!

You helped make this happen, Pro-Life Friend!

**[Now, as the battle heads to the Senate, would you please consider contributing $100, $50, $25, or even $10 right away](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail19.com/t/j-l-sdjkrkl-duchtdja-j/)?**

Pro-Life Friend, students who find themselves pregnant should never be harassed or harangued by their schools, teachers, or counselors into getting an abortion.

But all too often, this is exactly the case, as Planned Parenthood has many school officials doing their dirty work by practically chauffeuring pregnant students through their doors.

Our schools and legislators should be investing in creating resources and support programs for pregnant students to help them to achieve their academic and career goals **_WHILE**_ embracing motherhood instead of facilitating the killing of their child.

**That’s why this legislation is so important!**

In fact, the _Pregnant Students Rights Act_ is based on what _SFLA_ already does through our _Standing with You Initiative._

First, our _Standing with You Initiative_ gives pregnant and parenting women as many resources as possible, including information on Title IX rights and requirements so they aren’t taken advantage of by their anti-mother school administrators or teachers.

On top of that, our _Students for Life_ groups on campus provide loads of commonly needed materials to pregnant and newly parenting mothers such as clothing, diapers, cleaning wipes, and even babysitting services.

Just imagine if colleges and universities put forth the same effort to help these mothers as we do!

_More babies would be saved from abortion!!_

Now, as the battle moves to the Senate, your help is going to be more important than ever.

Do pro-abortion Senate Democrats REALLY want to go on record in opposition to pregnant and parenting students on campus?

Do they really want all of America to learn they really and truly believe that the only good baby is a dead one?

**Not unless they want to commit political suicide in 2024!**

Pro-Life Friend, there is no legitimate excuse for colleges and universities to not defend the rights of their pregnant students on campus, but many still refuse at the behest of the Abortion Lobby!

That’s why it was critical that we stepped in on behalf of all pregnant and parenting students everywhere and get this bill passed.

_Students for Life Action_ has been publicizing a “Pregnant & Parenting Bill of Rights” for years, and now we have one with the _Pregnant Students' Rights Act._

We will continue to fight until _H.R. 6914_ is signed into law and student mothers across the country aren’t forced to choose between their career and motherhood by pro-abortion universities.

Thank you for everything you’ve done to help us fight for student mothers’ rights and thank you for everything you continue to do for Life.

For Life,

Kristan Hawkins
President, _Students for Life Action_

P.S. – During this Congressional session, we’ll be scoring key votes on this legislation in the House as well as the Senate so we can hold any weak-kneed Republicans who refuse to stand for Life accountable!

**[Please help us put pressure on the Senate to pass this crucial Bill by making your most generous contribution of $100, $50, $25, or even $10 to _Students for Life Action_ right away](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail19.com/t/j-l-sdjkrkl-duchtdja-i/)!**

Students for Life Action is a non-profit, tax-exempt advocacy organization under section 501(c)(4) of the IRC. Contributions or gifts to Students for Life Action are not tax deductible for IRS purposes; they do, however, avoid recognition of gain on appreciated assets. Students for Life Action's mailing address is 600 Princess Anne St #7667, Fredericksburg, VA 22401. Any donations raised above or short of the goal will be used in the next area of greatest need towards our mission, as determined by the organization.

[update preferences](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.updatemyprofile.com/j-sdjkrkl-026154D2-duchtdja-d) | [unsubscribe](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail19.com/t/j-u-sdjkrkl-duchtdja-h/)
**

**
---
</html

For Life, Kristan Hawkins President, Students for Life Action P.S. – During this Congressional session, we’ll be scoring key votes on this legislation in the House as well as the Senate so we can hold any weak-kneed Republicans who refuse to stand for Life accountable! ! Students for Life Action is a non-profit, tax-exempt advocacy organization under section 501(c)(4) of the IRC. Contributions or gifts to Students for Life Action are not tax deductible for IRS purposes; they do, however, avoid recognition of gain on appreciated assets. Students for Life Action's mailing address is 600 Princess Anne St #7667, Fredericksburg, VA 22401. Any donations raised above or short of the goal will be used in the next area of greatest need towards our mission, as determined by the organization. | </html

subject: The people, ideas, and aims of the modern Left
body:
In this eleven-lecture course, Dr. Kevin Slack, associate professor of politics at Hillsdale College, examines the transformation in American politics since World War II.

| | | This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2a3c2f9ab8ff4f0a90516630cffbd1de&_e=47SNp-hMSe8xoKm5t6nPgS6SNtS_IWlLUAFMQfyUDh0EuzNz8WfbUELIKqVEYuiqxY1t3gsTOTnWSW_JQqDabZe4pkUpQwdjgYwnRSNDwt8g2BSMQKxtkO2LVJWJTzbMT5MBjeYM39mC-fb33_O_RMTcCvnFfVdgocyKZQd1j2l1uM_u998nwOr3RJD1yNHkzkxGLUWRrxxC2Y5J427yx4ZdBQLIY_A1i70e5301qLNi_5z7SyJ9l9yEc5ndIQ5CgnlMpwl3Hb8uDWUUYgjsilBfaLrn9iDSXayhFQfl8ZDkF5ISATIjXLMEko9pyCGHjLl1isAwId3hl4B9ja7TiLITAofjXR9KnPjOQxL1WhBL8msdNkch36pGvU0K4LKd5wPq2YKBHsvZA55IK7du2FeoP6cqgCvB4kiS0xxFlzc%3D)

I am excited to announce that Hillsdale's online course, ["The American Left: From Liberalism to Despotism,"](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2a3c2f9ab8ff4f0a90516630cffbd1de&_e=47SNp-hMSe8xoKm5t6nPgS6SNtS_IWlLUAFMQfyUDh0EuzNz8WfbUELIKqVEYuiqxY1t3gsTOTnWSW_JQqDabZe4pkUpQwdjgYwnRSNDwt8g2BSMQKxtkO2LVJWJTzbMT5MBjeYM39mC-fb33_O_RMTcCvnFfVdgocyKZQd1j2l1uM_u998nwOr3RJD1yNHkzkxGLUWRrxxC2Y5J427yx4ZdBQLIY_A1i70e5301qLNi_5z7SyJ9l9yEc5ndIQ5CgnlMpwl3Hb8uDWUUYgjsiloJMWsbjWrOz9kI2WzGIx-rQsrQzd56btwNsFwJdCIXzWXDLbbSe1w0C0B9AN2wfKsCbLRQwu-nCF05m9hdmZZoTl2JN10nfcIe19LUKhYGz_PVRwhg-rAPwkHC5xr1El3r2Ny-lzq2824d_JAzkTM%3D) is now available to own on DVD.

In this eleven-lecture course, Dr. Kevin Slack, associate professor of politics at Hillsdale College, examines the transformation in American politics since World War II.

He explains the origins of 1960s radicalism and its rejection of midcentury liberalism; he reveals how these radicals came to dominate government and the universities beginning in the late 1970s; and he explores the rise of a neoliberal oligarchy in America and that oligarchy's alliance with the cultural Left in President Obama's second term.

This course seeks to understand the key people, ideas, and aims of the modern Left and to provide solutions for defending the American way of life today.

Will you partner with us to promote this free online course and expand other educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty? As a token of our appreciation for your support, we'll send you the DVD Box Set of the course for a gift of $100 or more.

**Click the link below to help support this course and get your copy of "The American Left: From Liberalism to Despotism" on DVD.**

[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/american-left-support-dvd](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2a3c2f9ab8ff4f0a90516630cffbd1de&_e=47SNp-hMSe8xoKm5t6nPgS6SNtS_IWlLUAFMQfyUDh0EuzNz8WfbUELIKqVEYuiqxY1t3gsTOTnWSW_JQqDabZe4pkUpQwdjgYwnRSNDwt8g2BSMQKxtkO2LVJWJTzbMT5MBjeYM39mC-fb33_O_RMTcCvnFfVdgocyKZQd1j2l1uM_u998nwOr3RJD1yNHkzkxGLUWRrxxC2Y5J427yx4ZdBQLIY_A1i70e5301qLNi_5z7SyJ9l9yEc5ndIQ5CgnlMpwl3Hb8uDWUUYgjsitF6gaIuSQnbbov092irRWFlXiy7WQMWQQ55zGqamRkL96vy7A6wncOaXd1vwa-sgxgNnGVWveryxQ4Bo33EuelTBZwpHfG8CHlZv9rc4l5wJwl6bOdEebD91K9BiaBpOnjcD9axrJd9Ah8YxAaiG34%3D)

Warm Regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

name: Emily Hall
subject: Send a Note of Encouragement to Missionaries Today!
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWCdFhIiN6

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWCdFhIiN6

Dear
Friend,

I'm
grateful to connect with you today and share an opportunity to
impact the lives of our courageous missionaries serving in remote
and challenging regions around the world.

In the
farthest corners of the globe, these dedicated men, women, and
families are sacrificing their comfort, security, and personal
aspirations to bring the hope and transformative message of
salvation to those who have never heard it before. With
unwavering faith, they face incredible trials, enduring
isolation, and even risking their safety to fulfill the calling
placed upon their lives.

Yet, even
people with the strongest commitment to their missionary calling
can sometimes grow weary and feel discouraged. That's where you
come in. I firmly believe that God can use your words of
encouragement to reassure our missionaries that He is with them,
strengthening them to press on.

Would you
take a moment to write a note of encouragement to one of our
missionaries serving in the field? Your notes of encouragement
can be an instrument of hope God uses to remind them that they
are not alone as they shine the light of the gospel in the
darkest corners of the world.

Will you
help encourage a missionary serving in the field?
Your
message can be a lifeline, assuring them that their sacrifices
are seen and deeply appreciated.

To send
your note of encouragement, I invite you to fill out the secure
form in this link:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/62707168:WCdFhIiN6:m:3:2532013465:248A32B7A15D858C2D39C415987C9919:r

Thank you
for your commitment to the Great Commission. Your support and
prayers are invaluable in reaching those who have yet to
experience the life-changing power of the gospel.

We are
deeply grateful for your partnership in advancing the Kingdom of
God.

In
Christ,

Emily
Hall
Prayer
Content Specialist
IMB
Prayer Office

International Mission Board | 3806 Monument Ave. Richmond, VA
23230 | (804) 353-0515

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system January 18, 2022.
For more information please follow the URL below:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/iWCdFhIiN6

clean_body: Dear Friend, I'm grateful to connect with you today and share an opportunity to impact the lives of our courageous missionaries serving in remote and challenging regions around the world. In the farthest corners of the globe, these dedicated men, women, and families are sacrificing their comfort, security, and personal aspirations to bring the hope and transformative message of salvation to those who have never heard it before. With unwavering faith, they face incredible trials, enduring isolation, and even risking their safety to fulfill the calling placed upon their lives. Yet, even people with the strongest commitment to their missionary calling can sometimes grow weary and feel discouraged. That's where you come in. I firmly believe that God can use your words of encouragement to reassure our missionaries that He is with them, strengthening them to press on. Would you take a moment to write a note of encouragement to one of our missionaries serving in the field? Your notes of encouragement can be an instrument of hope God uses to remind them that they are not alone as they shine the light of the gospel in the darkest corners of the world. Will you help encourage a missionary serving in the field? Your message can be a lifeline, assuring them that their sacrifices are seen and deeply appreciated. To send your note of encouragement, I invite you to fill out the secure form in this link: Thank you for your commitment to the Great Commission. Your support and prayers are invaluable in reaching those who have yet to experience the life-changing power of the gospel. We are deeply grateful for your partnership in advancing the Kingdom of God. In Christ, Emily Hall Prayer Content Specialist IMB Prayer Office International Mission Board | 3806 Monument Ave. Richmond, VA 23230 | (804) 353-0515 This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system January 18, 2022. name: Full Mag News
subject: How should we elect the President?
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

| | This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b5ee02a34c6b42b79c9d9faa5ef63198&_e=kbpoTOq7g62BWXD76IxmU5eouiAEkzT6IH8k_ccLI2AZ4nQq0pLrRdG-H79sCUwJVWs7OK7kuQ9n3C-13ohmrRRcQnePczHtXUw6jMsLVgmx6gSPf9JxlkxYsLUOpUWjhvVvrC80wDJhp3_sPgrWGpCd2xUB9fBK0TrtvGROLxVUxnRp12fTuZCDeELO8n9AzI_JwSwsk7tcGFpJECh-x6ZkwbU683wvKTbsz7nBxjvk-5Bdl86jnZNaAcG6EfGre9G4R2oF4UCmCCLAmomwwdw0MybKzMEbWH9BJm16wphku_m-yvtCJeTXvL5PBrP7exmH_yzwCBfQhO4yzfzLkGuZMPJBlgs8TwGeRjTUG8UhTy2CgAGKWriUknFSuLcX7na6D7ddfFKU41lNX8hckOwbn4iBmj9VmP8fiXzLSZY%3D)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection **by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b5ee02a34c6b42b79c9d9faa5ef63198&_e=kbpoTOq7g62BWXD76IxmU5eouiAEkzT6IH8k_ccLI2AZ4nQq0pLrRdG-H79sCUwJVWs7OK7kuQ9n3C-13ohmrRRcQnePczHtXUw6jMsLVgmx6gSPf9JxlkxYsLUOpUWjhvVvrC80wDJhp3_sPgrWGpCd2xUB9fBK0TrtvGROLxVUxnRp12fTuZCDeELO8n9AzI_JwSwsk7tcGFpJECh-x6ZkwbU683wvKTbsz7nBxjvk-5Bdl86jnZNaAcG6EfGrSgdHpA7YyLphqdEckoouvbgzdxRp0SsLJ6_2nA83Fa04Jtczlfso_8h3I6IIJucb2KmKm_tY7w-PtTSCy17qd9VyutuDabptlz3TgyIL0M3m8GpPCed0odO_x4g9tCjkRb8lU-GIuLa7jgHHbveD7qmE-9ZzxLMeSeASw-y9NyU%3D)**
## Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?
[YES](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b5ee02a34c6b42b79c9d9faa5ef63198&_e=kbpoTOq7g62BWXD76IxmU5eouiAEkzT6IH8k_ccLI2AZ4nQq0pLrRdG-H79sCUwJVWs7OK7kuQ9n3C-13ohmrRRcQnePczHtXUw6jMsLVgmx6gSPf9JxlkxYsLUOpUWjhvVvrC80wDJhp3_sPgrWGpCd2xUB9fBK0TrtvGROLxVUxnRp12fTuZCDeELO8n9AzI_JwSwsk7tcGFpJECh-x6ZkwbU683wvKTbsz7nBxjvk-5Bdl86jnZNaAcG6EfGr8ymajqKi_kWqjJl1PSCznXe3Vv31IGf_DP3FiFi2PdEPKufmJ12L8zWeZuZUH1GudZ3KyRdMLZY5qdSxw1cHBJqOhZZAtulUGOot6zBuilAb5L4nCqzaWfMLDv9e5muXnXFA3o2zMtQCpLCJoHvDvwTXu2gEK3h8RPbyPnFbO9c%3D) [NO](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b5ee02a34c6b42b79c9d9faa5ef63198&_e=kbpoTOq7g62BWXD76IxmU5eouiAEkzT6IH8k_ccLI2AZ4nQq0pLrRdG-H79sCUwJVWs7OK7kuQ9n3C-13ohmrRRcQnePczHtXUw6jMsLVgmx6gSPf9JxlkxYsLUOpUWjhvVvrC80wDJhp3_sPgrWGpCd2xUB9fBK0TrtvGROLxVUxnRp12fTuZCDeELO8n9AzI_JwSwsk7tcGFpJECh-x6ZkwbU683wvKTbsz7nBxjvk-5Bdl86jnZNaAcG6EfGrWfKx7U2_qx1iSrEqjXKOd6m1jgW0dsts6rbIJ08zjVP2cGHVXkTiDfi9DrfLEp2Dwn5B7myaw44oemaYIMTLT7CWXVdb3x9h5D4mAMgfg5u_qI4TbDWkW77xKMsDVmVNAaaL1VDPQl87ZQgK_PO7bxhZ4vxMbr61uMwnSp4fmqc%3D) For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b5ee02a34c6b42b79c9d9faa5ef63198&_e=kbpoTOq7g62BWXD76IxmU5eouiAEkzT6IH8k_ccLI2AZ4nQq0pLrRdG-H79sCUwJVWs7OK7kuQ9n3C-13ohmrRRcQnePczHtXUw6jMsLVgmx6gSPf9JxlkxYsLUOpUWjhvVvrC80wDJhp3_sPgrWGpCd2xUB9fBK0TrtvGROLxVUxnRp12fTuZCDeELO8n9AzI_JwSwsk7tcGFpJECh-x6ZkwbU683wvKTbsz7nBxjvk-5Bdl86jnZNaAcG6EfGrJJb-wSuShlU0iztB5stwdCqka_v6kj-kBDtChF-Uhi5sNC7FobQcrhkZUSB5CAk7L3u-lkQMIoaPNxXgwqZWqFjcta1T2lbuWtBVhKsyZCIXLolxOto-Rw_mppYl4YolfczfpxnXbf27qhtYJNekcoMAUr_dWkzb-_I0u9rHWt8%3D)**
** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Full Mag News
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
[](https://links.fullmagnews.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_s=b5ee02a34c6b42b79c9d9faa5ef63198&_t=eIYJryQuJWweLkFAzoK0ERgRDFfTtxyB0cVIUKBZdLrnJrSIxbxC2grOcJuAmgnV02ilfN1SOkf-iD_qR_Iac2DBszU9R7VAqeZU9VVTQg0o7OiFEslwTa_iW8pOrYwmKxS5VfpEIRprz8jSQNuDhF0UJs4UCWR4ngRtn8mOSQk%3D)

name: Marjorie Dannenfelser
subject: I need you to help us stop this tragedy
body:
Did you know the United States has a human rights issue in common with countries like China and North Korea?

| [ ](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e955640d53de4a7f8bac70478fa5976d&_e=mr7jIr1-byxxrYhC4sL_ahLvOon68EEV0wKYwy1GLNbXNnkIt3pNAAhbw9tB5LhZ0SNpxJjoVR2zaW8AZbhINKYNQxZ5c6kFK2VtIm8dnnqlPh_MXGDIP-0LHo-abduyjKnD5Hu2HsrZDekoT9PfHk1ECo1fH-DAwDCTk4yYSK-nyFBLErwpHw_BG4tLdwpOjMMjVQ2hFHkQ9qFNtyEcp5FlgJKTjx6JKnDoxt_bL1QQQlF6S8HdozC5kBpM0M1S9aJEkirL0AQmZxC80OuCXeeUfcchY1xaj2CcZT3SXTzaVTCOa8ms4NuOxVVcrf5xkk1Qf4JSev7dVgJi_3nbsUCzYnNoPKlexbSujYgri-rPbOwugcJBrgpAH8zayztGqHVOnXAenVu3carcIvUZseaLp02woNxZZpUI1Y5funA%3D)
---
Fellow American,

Did you know the United States has a human rights issue in common with countries like China and North Korea?

**Becuase of the Biden Administration's commitment to the abortion industry, the United States is 1 of 7 countries in the world that allows abortion-on-demand.

** Abortion-on-demand is the ending of an unborn child's life and _ANY_ point of a woman's pregnancy. A baby, fully developed at 38-40 weeks, an be aborted should its mother detemine she does not want her child.

**This is an appalling tragedy happening in our country today and there are many abortionists willing to carry out this barbaric practice celebrated by Big Abortion.

** My heart breaks for the complete devastation and the utter devaluing of human life our own president and his administration is sworn to protect.

These abortion extremists have yet to name a single protection they would grant any unborn child and put it into law. In fact, they want to make abortion-on-demand the law of the land and write it into our own Constitution!

Babies in the womb are screaming in pain because they are being tortured to death and no one can hear them. They have no voice to cry out when they are viciously murdered.

**[We must cry out for them _now_.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e955640d53de4a7f8bac70478fa5976d&_e=mr7jIr1-byxxrYhC4sL_ahLvOon68EEV0wKYwy1GLNbXNnkIt3pNAAhbw9tB5LhZ0SNpxJjoVR2zaW8AZbhINKYNQxZ5c6kFK2VtIm8dnnqlPh_MXGDIP-0LHo-abduyjKnD5Hu2HsrZDekoT9PfHk1ECo1fH-DAwDCTk4yYSK-nyFBLErwpHw_BG4tLdwpOjMMjVQ2hFHkQ9qFNtyEcp5FlgJKTjx6JKnDoxt_bL1QQQlF6S8HdozC5kBpM0M1S9aJEkirL0AQmZxC80OuCXa53_hPlQ5MobSvJTOaxHPhXJoihlAe51fRCv7uQQ76PbL0F8XwclLU4_wrxIIk9MOstwQtu8TVbYFOxIoin9TGufA59FHY86WK-apv7IzN9ODT8QaD200oirzZYEyRZRmQj9vFmgqj7NtQWjOZrBag%3D) **

Stand with SBA Pro-Life America on the front lines in the fight for life and let the Biden Administration know you stand with the majority of Americans and do not support this deadly agenda. Join 72% of Americans who want pro-life protections for babies who can feel pain at 15 weeks in the womb.

Submit your name at the link below and put an end to abortion-on-demand in our country _today._

[SIGN YOUR NAME](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e955640d53de4a7f8bac70478fa5976d&_e=mr7jIr1-byxxrYhC4sL_ahLvOon68EEV0wKYwy1GLNbXNnkIt3pNAAhbw9tB5LhZ0SNpxJjoVR2zaW8AZbhINKYNQxZ5c6kFK2VtIm8dnnqlPh_MXGDIP-0LHo-abduyjKnD5Hu2HsrZDekoT9PfHk1ECo1fH-DAwDCTk4yYSK-nyFBLErwpHw_BG4tLdwpOjMMjVQ2hFHkQ9qFNtyEcp5FlgJKTjx6JKnDoxt_bL1QQQlF6S8HdozC5kBpM0M1S9aJEkirL0AQmZxC80OuCXQRaIvfcQjJg4wgtmJgoRXQqAlFycjxpFl_g_euvyMl-Botc2fTg6pBZmBZ66C36svakA-SHGFsPdu7S3gmv3qIvKNfb2ssEVInAsWjNDhDOUpoBusB4fbPhCs_tENXGhLUBs1Ma7S_F3-05BbaTt-Q%3D)
| We must be the voice for the unborn because our president and his administration have proven they will not protect these innocent children.
---
For LIFE,

Marjorie Dannenfelser
President, SBA Pro-Life America

Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America
2776 S. Arlington Mill Dr.
PO Box 803
Arlington, VA, 22206

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Are you ready for the end times?
body:
Have you ever wondered if things could return to God's original plan?
188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb
| | | [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/sQXr4dP9P23THqIKd0lXfg~~/AARclAA~)
---
Hello Friend,

Take a moment to look around. It's like we're living out Romans 1:25 - trading the truth of God for a lie and focusing on earthly things rather than our Creator.

Have you ever wondered if things could return to God's original plan?

I want to remind you, Friend, that this chaotic time is fleeting. The shadows will fade, and a new day will dawn. The King of Kings, our Savior, will return.

That's the heart of Revelation.

Each day on this earth shapes us for what's to come - a grand finale. Amidst today's messiness and uncertainty, remember the promise that our story's end is already secured, regardless of the present turmoil or future darkness.

Revelation intricately unveils where our stories lead.

It's a captivating book filled with symbols, creatures, and events yet to unfold. But remember Revelation 1:3 - there's a blessing for those who read, listen, and follow its words because the time is near.

This isn't just a prophecy; it's a blessing-filled journey.

Revelation isn't just about revealing future events; it's about revealing Jesus Christ.

When Jesus came as a man, His divine brilliance was veiled by humanity. It's like dimming a lamp's light. But when He returns, that veil will lift, and we'll see His true glory. That's Revelation's essence.

As the great reveal approaches, I'm here to guide you and your loved ones through the remarkable events preceding the revelation of our King.

In my brand-new book, _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ , I tackle five common questions about the end times. We'll delve into:

1\. America's Fate: Will America stand for Christ or fall for the Antichrist?
2\. The Day of the Lord: How should we live in anticipation of this apocalyptic event?
3\. The Marriage of the Lamb: What unfolds before and after the rapture?
4\. Gog and Magog: How can we honor God in our lives amid their appearance?
5\. The Tree of Life: What's the significance of this tree in the New Jerusalem?

Understanding these mysteries will anchor you in hope, bolster your trust in God's promises, and equip you to share with the unsure.

In addition to this new book, I would like to share with you "The Major Characters of the End Times," as a token of my gratitude for your support. This full-color, large print booklet introduces key players during the rapture, tribulation, second coming, and final judgment - vital for understanding the grand narrative.
[](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/sQXr4dP9P23THqIKd0lXfg~~/AARclAA~)I would like to send you my brand-new book _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ and my brand-new resource "The Major Characters of the End Times" as a thank you for your generous support of $10 or more to the ministry of _Pathway to Victory_.
Make your generous gift here: [https://secure.ptv.org/mysteries-of-the-end-times-generous-gift-1-dr-robert-jeffress](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/sQXr4dP9P23THqIKd0lXfg~~/AARclAA~)

_Pathway to Victory_ is committed to equipping believers with biblical teaching and reaching the unsaved by spreading the Good News of Jesus Christ through the most effective means available: radio, television, digital, and print. Your gifts fuel that important work and enable people worldwide to experience an intimate walk with Christ. Thank you for your faithful support.

May our study of Revelation prepare, strengthen, and inspire you. Come quickly, Lord Jesus.

Sharing the Truth of God's Word, ____
---
| | Dr. Robert Jeffress Senior Pastor, First Baptist Dallas
---

Restore Our Nation
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

The ballots are all printed, and they list the following candidates:**
* Former Governor Chris Christie
* Governor Ron DeSantis
* Former Governor and UN Ambassador Nikki Haley
* Vivek Ramaswamy
* Former President Donald J. Trump

Two of these have since dropped out. And as you know, I have endorsed President Trump, because I believe he’s the best person to reverse Biden’s failed socialism and restore strength and freedom for Americans. But no matter which candidate you prefer, it’s important for YOU to make your voice heard. **A massive turnout of Minnesota Republicans will send a message that we are fired up to defeat Biden and put a stop to:**
* The Biden Border Crisis

| | You probably see a middle school aged kid with school spirit going to watch a football game.That would be a normal reaction.But unhinged school administrators -- including the principal of his school -- saw a vile racist who is wearing blackface and needs to be severely punished. DEI loving leftists see racism everywhere. And they want to teach our kids to see racism everywhere too.Middle school student J.A. attended a football game with a group of friends, and to show school spirit, he painted athletic “eye blacks” on his cheeks. _The same kind you see both athletes and spectators wearing every time you watch sports on television._ And J.A. (a good kid with nice rule-following parents) seemed like an easy target.The school officials at the San Diego area school he attends wanted to make an example out of him – and so they decided that this young boy was guilty of the hate crime of wearing black face.They suspended him, banned him from sporting events, and placed a “hate crime” on his permanent record. **Well, these race-baiting leftist administrators picked the wrong family to mess with.**** ****J.A. and his parents are taking legal action, and we’re standing with them.** **[And I’m asking you to join our effort to defend J.A.’s rights and restore his reputation.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6a5f367534ad435b838e9ed660536c48&_e=wZxQ59841XCCAlgLH10p2xbAZrqBlIwNlmsH9jv3mq9NTXglwz3Kl4dybrdGT19oH4HIHlPyhbqrnpA4tuGU9tXYxjk4O5uxJIQBXFj8jfH2jSXVLFGZTkoomO2BPYpjHN1fHh99oQMBkwQAd9Lm8JlyQk2tk6vsjMvVpFECYRuPI3fdeeQZsfDhkvKnxZen_jhScp8HTJcYYZiafJLvbWZZJN4uGOoCzGPstWThN71JS5KhTBpm1YscLCAO0D2OqUCwVVQX9r84GzQyYhH4O-gGlF94TqcaEPCofkrDvt2M0s0km5IYTn2ZId39FOr7wm0PiFizcBsNKFQvP9BRQpRo_zdVIfWVAhayvDx7IFu9CHVygHrIlgw4b8Ihp62b)** Put yourself in the shoes of this 8th grader who was accused of committing a hate crime after showing up to a football game with face paint.Even though he did nothing wrong, he’s being condemned as an evil racist.It would’ve been easy for J.A. to accept the punishment, cave in, and keep his head down.

But he was brave enough to stand up and fight back.**He can’t do it alone. That’s why I’m writing you today.** We’re going up against a school district with practically unlimited funds that has a political agenda to preserve and promote its DEI philosophy. J.A. and his family simply don’t have the resources to match.That’s where the Center for American Liberty steps in. The Center for American Liberty has a track record of taking on these types of cases and winning. You probably heard about our recent victory against another California school district on behalf of Jessica Konen whose daughter was socially transitioned to a new “gender identity” behind Jessica’s back.Unlike the big government agencies we go up against, we don’t have unlimited funds. We are entirely reliant on brave supporters like you who are willing to stand side by side with the victims of woke ideology like J.A. **[If you agree that this is a case worthy of the Center for American Liberty’s involvement, please consider making a generous tax-deductible donation to support this case.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6a5f367534ad435b838e9ed660536c48&_e=wZxQ59841XCCAlgLH10p2xbAZrqBlIwNlmsH9jv3mq9NTXglwz3Kl4dybrdGT19oH4HIHlPyhbqrnpA4tuGU9tXYxjk4O5uxJIQBXFj8jfH2jSXVLFGZTkoomO2BPYpjHN1fHh99oQMBkwQAd9Lm8JlyQk2tk6vsjMvVpFECYRuPI3fdeeQZsfDhkvKnxZen_jhScp8HTJcYYZiafJLvbWZZJN4uGOoCzGPstWThN73-wCfKxNzLJ9v94X5fRxv9k-cNmClBkDTtCBTifhS3dhzgm3Wuv_5wZ7yPTsfprIEfcq5mZ0ZDpaYyx7kfon9__FDREgIaKQeR5zBt--sPHmtT2ZC_7S8nN6UNoAS9_NyWdwPl-fWI2YUNvVR8cvp9) ** Don’t let San Diego school administrators get away with falsely accusing an 8th grade sports fan of a HATE CRIME.Thank you in advance for your response!
