clean_body: When you look at this photo, tell me what you see.... | | | | Friend,When you look at this photo, tell me what you see.... | | You probably see a middle school aged kid with school spirit going to watch a football game.That would be a normal reaction.But unhinged school administrators -- including the principal of his school -- saw a vile racist who is wearing blackface and needs to be severely punished. DEI loving leftists see racism everywhere. And they want to teach our kids to see racism everywhere too.Middle school student J.A. attended a football game with a group of friends, and to show school spirit, he painted athletic “eye blacks” on his cheeks. The same kind you see both athletes and spectators wearing every time you watch sports on television. And J.A. (a good kid with nice rule-following parents) seemed like an easy target.The school officials at the San Diego area school he attends wanted to make an example out of him – and so they decided that this young boy was guilty of the hate crime of wearing black face.They suspended him, banned him from sporting events, and placed a “hate crime” on his permanent record. Well, these race-baiting leftist administrators picked the wrong family to mess with. J.A. and his parents are taking legal action, and we’re standing with them. Put yourself in the shoes of this 8th grader who was accused of committing a hate crime after showing up to a football game with face paint.Even though he did nothing wrong, he’s being condemned as an evil racist.It would’ve been easy for J.A. to accept the punishment, cave in, and keep his head down. But he was brave enough to stand up and fight back.He can’t do it alone. That’s why I’m writing you today. We’re going up against a school district with practically unlimited funds that has a political agenda to preserve and promote its DEI philosophy. J.A. and his family simply don’t have the resources to match.That’s where the Center for American Liberty steps in. The Center for American Liberty has a track record of taking on these types of cases and winning. You probably heard about our recent victory against another California school district on behalf of Jessica Konen whose daughter was socially transitioned to a new “gender identity” behind Jessica’s back.Unlike the big government agencies we go up against, we don’t have unlimited funds. We are entirely reliant on brave supporters like you who are willing to stand side by side with the victims of woke ideology like J.A. Don’t let San Diego school administrators get away with falsely accusing an 8th grade sports fan of a HATE CRIME.Thank you in advance for your response! | | Sincerely, Harmeet K. DhillonFounder & CEO | | | | | The Center for American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free speech and anti-civil liberties trends. © The Center for American Liberty | PO Box 200942, Pittsburgh, PA 15251 | Freedom Nation Today PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

body:

We now have just a few days to retake NY-03 and restore real representation back to Queens and Nassau Counties after extreme Republicans protected serial fraudster George Santos for months. Can you split a donation between his campaign and Blue Amp Action right now?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8a4a43c5-4626-4787-8a45-64962ba8a014/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

---
| Let me explain why this is urgent: In 2024, we have the opportunity to restore sanity and order to the People’s House. The special election in New York's Third Congressional District (NY-03) will be on February 13 and all eyes will be on us. Tom puts People Over Politics to get big things done for the people he represents. Tom works with both sides of the aisle to deliver common sense solutions for Long Island and Queens. That's who he is. While extreme Republicans bring nothing but crisis, chaos and confusion to Congress, Tom will bring integrity, commitment and experience back to NY-03. It’s imperative that we help Tom win. We can’t do that without your help, NAME. Our path to victory in 2024 includes retaking New York's Third Congressional District. I know this is the team to help us defeat the odds and bring Tom Suozzi back to Congress. [Will you donate $10 to Tom and Blue Amp Action today? We can’t let extreme Republicans continue their reckless political stunts. ](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te0321484-c578-416c-bdfe-cde55d835a65/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [DONATE](https://default.salsalabs.org/T324d604f-873c-4d2b-ab0d-ed4b1067c3d5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| Right now, Team Extreme is gearing up to flood the airwaves with attacks. That’s why I’m counting on your support to make sure Tom can fight back and retake NY-03. Keep the faith, Hakeem
---
| | |

|

| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.

name: Defend the Constitution
subject: The people, ideas, and aims of the modern Left
body:
In this eleven-lecture course, Dr. Kevin Slack, associate professor of politics at Hillsdale College, examines the transformation in American politics since World War II.

| | | This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c29961b4b9a44dc39ee6145c034ad619&_e=GmnuPNZlY3scVIyBQAwIY995oHlsv3Dk5pQtW8z7kEV4u86NM5fIvqUnBEPOXcL1LhAPhV88COyY4IyAhKXFoApcULzm2v_CCp8PePhOuOyv34AVg3UszwiVyV77Z4jEEihw4FVWw--8WjEQjEZYux1iZXIDgKJMDpj2UvFZKR0JyEqzSsKgKp7Y5TBSx0J-bu4ESJ2ppu-pOPB8-LfVO_xfW6dtQcPLp7fhYPTlldQLYPhOuTr6xxppxwxmYPguDhC9EY6_gKdJ6oRPVnwJoAdUfJXFd_ksKdnIHkP2GE0fCHtEHvQs13wSu5hFKFSVSeILKvg-8o_etRcIrgvGZuATLxFhhg5HdE6KUQ54QGsVOv033Zu-TYwkYhGWpzkpWAMaQiL7AoUYfK8cKJRh5CCFKOgPwJdVIe2GbqwfeRU%3D)
---
| | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c29961b4b9a44dc39ee6145c034ad619&_e=GmnuPNZlY3scVIyBQAwIY995oHlsv3Dk5pQtW8z7kEV4u86NM5fIvqUnBEPOXcL1LhAPhV88COyY4IyAhKXFoApcULzm2v_CCp8PePhOuOyv34AVg3UszwiVyV77Z4jEEihw4FVWw--8WjEQjEZYux1iZXIDgKJMDpj2UvFZKR0JyEqzSsKgKp7Y5TBSx0J-bu4ESJ2ppu-pOPB8-LfVO_xfW6dtQcPLp7fhYPTlldQLYPhOuTr6xxppxwxmYPguDhC9EY6_gKdJ6oRPVnwJoNKlvqkXAzHN7Oy3gVDjD6Lw_LKmK0CrcreSoysljKtmm-5mIByCg6oGcKw06F8dfE_8yNPCFZ-TnRvvLfGl32y_dXpgifJHJ7enDnnx56KPAZbifElp66LenKhhex9WD87qMM1ZU8hRvNAn9VeYY2g%3D) Dear Friend,

I am excited to announce that Hillsdale's online course, ["The American Left: From Liberalism to Despotism,"](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c29961b4b9a44dc39ee6145c034ad619&_e=GmnuPNZlY3scVIyBQAwIY995oHlsv3Dk5pQtW8z7kEV4u86NM5fIvqUnBEPOXcL1LhAPhV88COyY4IyAhKXFoApcULzm2v_CCp8PePhOuOyv34AVg3UszwiVyV77Z4jEEihw4FVWw--8WjEQjEZYux1iZXIDgKJMDpj2UvFZKR0JyEqzSsKgKp7Y5TBSx0J-bu4ESJ2ppu-pOPB8-LfVO_xfW6dtQcPLp7fhYPTlldQLYPhOuTr6xxppxwxmYPguDhC9EY6_gKdJ6oRPVnwJoNAZ73mO3wCfKznHStxJR6fw9C1bIXYSGG688qVUSc0qTOa0bZzV1MiN3x1uMQbiDkeRgkQYSiRkopL2-fcJWD9b0iNY7C7RXX9G-b7bMiOsuAPOwzwfTvDm915XpVxh2QWhMUD0BDEV1rVrjGxqbWs%3D) is now available to own on DVD.

In this eleven-lecture course, Dr. Kevin Slack, associate professor of politics at Hillsdale College, examines the transformation in American politics since World War II.

He explains the origins of 1960s radicalism and its rejection of midcentury liberalism; he reveals how these radicals came to dominate government and the universities beginning in the late 1970s; and he explores the rise of a neoliberal oligarchy in America and that oligarchy's alliance with the cultural Left in President Obama's second term.

This course seeks to understand the key people, ideas, and aims of the modern Left and to provide solutions for defending the American way of life today.

Will you partner with us to promote this free online course and expand other educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty? As a token of our appreciation for your support, we'll send you the DVD Box Set of the course for a gift of $100 or more.

**Click the link below to help support this course and get your copy of "The American Left: From Liberalism to Despotism" on DVD.**

[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/american-left-support-dvd](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c29961b4b9a44dc39ee6145c034ad619&_e=GmnuPNZlY3scVIyBQAwIY995oHlsv3Dk5pQtW8z7kEV4u86NM5fIvqUnBEPOXcL1LhAPhV88COyY4IyAhKXFoApcULzm2v_CCp8PePhOuOyv34AVg3UszwiVyV77Z4jEEihw4FVWw--8WjEQjEZYux1iZXIDgKJMDpj2UvFZKR0JyEqzSsKgKp7Y5TBSx0J-bu4ESJ2ppu-pOPB8-LfVO_xfW6dtQcPLp7fhYPTlldQLYPhOuTr6xxppxwxmYPguDhC9EY6_gKdJ6oRPVnwJoLdHH0wTpGG3I7H_k9xA_T3GyHb6CQNoiD0zZTiXWALfPqtD5RsedrAlxSbxPLHO5do9Hy2Qy92tLhMFZ6_ponVWvHAHPInICLX8uc7wEGCQOXRs6D5kPkdDdOS4uGhhv4aJNKw-4xE5j9cUI2-AfgA%3D)

Warm Regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

In this eleven-lecture course, Dr. Kevin Slack, associate professor of politics at Hillsdale College, examines the transformation in American politics since World War II. He explains the origins of 1960s radicalism and its rejection of midcentury liberalism; he reveals how these radicals came to dominate government and the universities beginning in the late 1970s; and he explores the rise of a neoliberal oligarchy in America and that oligarchy's alliance with the cultural Left in President Obama's second term. This course seeks to understand the key people, ideas, and aims of the modern Left and to provide solutions for defending the American way of life today. Will you partner with us to promote this free online course and expand other educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty? As a token of our appreciation for your support, we'll send you the DVD Box Set of the course for a gift of $100 or more. Click the link below to help support this course and get your copy of "The American Left: From Liberalism to Despotism" on DVD. Warm Regards, Kyle Murnen, '09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College | | Defend the Constitution PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Team DeSantis
subject: (!) First primary coming 🔜
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
To view this email as a web page, go to the link below, or copy and paste it into your browser's address window.
https://view.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=cd16654936ebcb66e2ffe12cadd1d9dc10fb766db0787e9ee879b91571bb89eddc937a77e4e7d29cd2ea643e78bf286a1960ff02244a5fab7877cea8b1457a50173c92c4409d115f755f429818ab1604

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=16de0cb6398e09bf09c3e5ef194c58932aa6a059ca5db4b1553a71be898d2cc9068f6a32e6e50339c5ed292b779c6c835a12a9ab5db05f006445e688a76f38eb

Friend,

It may feel like we just got through a major campaign milestone when we passed the Iowa caucuses, but now that it's election year, these contests are back-to-back.

In 3 days, we're facing the critical first-in-the-nation Republican presidential primary in New Hampshire... and just after that, we're headed straight to South Carolina to do it all again.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=16de0cb6398e09bf09c3e5ef194c58932aa6a059ca5db4b1553a71be898d2cc9068f6a32e6e50339c5ed292b779c6c835a12a9ab5db05f006445e688a76f38eb

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=16de0cb6398e09bf09c3e5ef194c58932aa6a059ca5db4b1553a71be898d2cc9068f6a32e6e50339c5ed292b779c6c835a12a9ab5db05f006445e688a76f38eb
HELP US GET READY

This is why your support is so important. We don't have a second to catch our breath or slow down in our fundraising efforts. We have to earn what it takes to keep going full-steam ahead.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=16de0cb6398e09bfb1d325c2c1b6dd71b8ff5593406f5ef9362ded483617b6fa6cad0730b2856ae459e73320ff072db00556552031ee39b2cb1ae6b39b83b9b4
Donate $10

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=16de0cb6398e09bf1b289e8ed415c532883358fc083664e19c9307d7e13a28e5a07ce2f0d10afb1c8b4bf35f5d996f78c06a86e91c7e5cdb8e5da7f0aafd80e3
Donate $25

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=16de0cb6398e09bfff3c5e544d7c6113e73c8eef60bbb42ed5600ac8ca780c95e493361e5c8437c257bd7e2512feceab2858a4cf6decbd1c5fb8df1f6b0b78d8
Donate $47

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=16de0cb6398e09bf27c9789483594c8eb827ca027ff5431c7b9995430afd023e2f3fa5ec0610844a620094fd3f204dac4773c6cd9aea1cf6951eb69c10c0e123
Donate $75

If we do what it takes to win, we'll have a candidate ready to defeat Joe Biden and get straight to work next January. We'll finally have a leader who will stop runaway spending, shut our border down to protect the American people, defeat the dangerous advances of China, and restore sanity across our country once and for all. Doesn't that sound like something worth fighting for, friend?

Governor DeSantis understands what average American families across this nation desperately need, and that's something no other candidate has seemed to grasp. He needs your support so he can stand up for all of us from Washington.

This can't wait... We've got a lot coming up, and our future is on the line. We need your help to take on the primary in just 3 days and stride on to South Carolina right after.

We know you believe in this mission and this candidate as much as we do, and that's why we know we can count on you. Will you help us go into these next contests as strong as possible?

In Freedom,

Team DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=16de0cb6398e09bf09c3e5ef194c58932aa6a059ca5db4b1553a71be898d2cc9068f6a32e6e50339c5ed292b779c6c835a12a9ab5db05f006445e688a76f38eb
Chip in to the campaign

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=16de0cb6398e09bf09c3e5ef194c58932aa6a059ca5db4b1553a71be898d2cc9068f6a32e6e50339c5ed292b779c6c835a12a9ab5db05f006445e688a76f38eb

🚨 ATTENTION 🚨

Our grassroots team drives our every success, and we know we ask a lot of you to help us win this critical election. As this race continues to heat up, we will be relying on our supporters to help us go the distance, and we want to make sure we respect your preferences when we reach out to you. If you'd like to receive fewer emails from our team, please click
https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=16de0cb6398e09bf64c5765af23a3c462762ae6e3ac851a9cdc2ad3a786f241fb775107061d2682d97f8ace264248e11eac393a3f7f728054223ba052bfd4e30
here.

Volunteer!

We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for.

Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today!

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=16de0cb6398e09bf14561a6eef016249c7d356473bd3d1b26e82f18e170dc4b4f91b608108fdda50dd001eec1295f64a748118a3ae00431a700b2a973a3f39b3
Sign up here!

Get to Know Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=16de0cb6398e09bf09c3e5ef194c58932aa6a059ca5db4b1553a71be898d2cc9068f6a32e6e50339c5ed292b779c6c835a12a9ab5db05f006445e688a76f38eb

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=16de0cb6398e09bf09c3e5ef194c58932aa6a059ca5db4b1553a71be898d2cc9068f6a32e6e50339c5ed292b779c6c835a12a9ab5db05f006445e688a76f38eb

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now.

Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without “green cards”), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general).

Contribution rules

- I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
- This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
- I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
- I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.
Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.
Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President

name: =?utf-8?Q?Douglas=20Carswell?=
subject: Annual Review from Mississippi’s conservative voice
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/successsequence-11571597?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
| Dear Friend,

**Thank you so much for supporting the Mississippi Center for Public Policy – the conservative voice in our state!**

I am sending you a copy of our Annual Review, so that you can see how we are helping advance the cause of liberty in our state and beyond.
**CLICK ON THE IMAGE BELOW TO READ OUR ANNUAL REVIEW! **
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=144f223ee8&e=5703353baa)
---
| **For too long, Mississippi has been ranked one of the poorest states in America. MCPP has a plan to help change that.**

We believe that free markets and limited government are the key to prosperity. Established over 30 years ago, we are a strictly non-partisan, independent 501 c) 3 organization dedicated to providing government officials, the media, and the public with information to help them understand and defend freedom.

**MCPP’s focus is on achieving the following four wins for Mississippi: **
---
|
---
| **To help us make the case for the change our state needs, we have hosted some of the most inspirational speakers in America.**
---
|
---
| **We have published a blizzard of articles in newspapers across the state, and across America – giving MCPP a profile not only locally, but increasingly nationally, too. **

---
|
---
| **Thank you for being a reader of this Saturday email. As you can see from the graph below, readership has increased dramatically. **
---
|
---
| **Our audio visual audience has increased too – which is especially important when it comes to connecting with the younger generation. **
---
|
---
| **MCPP works with younger Mississippians, running the Mississippi Leadership Academy – now in its second year! **
---
|
---
| **As the state’s conservative voice, we also produce regular, robust and original research – the life blood of a credible think tank. **
---
|
---
| **Last year, we reached over 12 million people on social media, yet we had a total advertising spend on Facebook, Instagram, Twitter and all the other social media platforms of less than $50!** Just another example of the bang-for-buck we provide from every donor dollar received, for which we thank you.
---
|
---
| **Thank you for standing alongside us in our fight to advance liberty in Mississippi and be part of a national movement to renew America!**

Have a wonderful weekend!
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f3add3ed7&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
Warm regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO
---
| **_Ps. Is China a threat to the United States?_**

We are hosting a lunchtime event to discuss this with two amazing speakers. Over half the tickets have gone already – so if you would like to come, please book right away.
[CLICK TO BOOK YOUR TICKET HERE](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=1a6e3c19a8&e=5703353baa)
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=a055579544&e=5703353baa)
---
|
---
| | _ _
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013
[Add us to your address book](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/vcard?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/profile?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=c35d839054) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=c35d839054).

_Copyright © 2024 Mississippi Center for Public Policy, All rights reserved._
---

But if I don't receive another 147 signatures before January 31st, I won't have the grassroots support necessary to protect our democracy and save the integrity of our elections from the Democrats' electioneering scheme.

name: John Pierce
subject: J6: “Thousands more” to be arrested . . .
body:
So far, more than 1,200 Americans have been arrested. Through my organization, the National Constitutional Law Union (NCLU), I'm currently representing 30 of these defendants.

| | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=23c5ce4b65fc4ea383e20256ee7bbf88&_e=62qJQja8rcMZ6RE2noBf5B39dhGkh1-PdP4hQvEMkdPIMVH-hLFdLNLsMh2hsyOIc54hTQHN1B9FC7_QRUK4uf3XzRkVVyz9VLSgosa7FOYLxbtIiSxB5vGuRoZhtqWaLVrba8CgdPFs4b8YJLG6TUvTNMd9Oe6Y9ffnB26iU4_Hht78rhwQnuVB0y7sLleNXOSnljytt5nYn9QoYZoQiXf5VYBXViGq3csT82M8JqtC9h9CFcexgCcN-PQtKyM2nqzOJGGLhZ4hPeIDtilo90G2latyH6nfhj4xPXhD2aO45prd0Eg3CMZp93zZkqSU9nfYipqGUxIIiMs62HFC1JgLxlnoPihRt2C_4Ag1REUl1l0opUaSzS1HKEwcPWsqs9MB-1JhLYbAHh4r89V8Qg%3D%3D)
Dear Patriot,

[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=23c5ce4b65fc4ea383e20256ee7bbf88&_e=62qJQja8rcMZ6RE2noBf5B39dhGkh1-PdP4hQvEMkdPIMVH-hLFdLNLsMh2hsyOIc54hTQHN1B9FC7_QRUK4uf3XzRkVVyz9VLSgosa7FOYLxbtIiSxB5vGuRoZhtqWaLVrba8CgdPFs4b8YJLG6TUvTNMd9Oe6Y9ffnB26iU4_Hht78rhwQnuVB0y7sLleNXOSnljytt5nYn9QoYZoQiXf5VYBXViGq3csT82M8JqtC9h9CFcexgCcN-PQtKyM2ntlKWvsdo5qR3kHnjEQjZqO_0XVNE2DtvIB86Xjn071j9Gb5FRdkRy39UsKtw6BPnWl4Cr6J3H3l91nvJM1PoVZf112gxFLe7bGUebBegTRYRJqaoP3geU45fmQuVar5nytxBaZ8pR9xk4wgjvjHLA%3D%3D) The U.S. Attorney for the District of Columbia recently stood behind a podium and announced the DOJ planned to charge "thousands" more Americans who were present during the January 6th protests.

So far, more than 1,200 Americans have been arrested. Through my organization, the National Constitutional Law Union (NCLU), **I 'm currently representing 30 of these defendants.**

My trial schedule is PACKED, and **[I need your continued support](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=23c5ce4b65fc4ea383e20256ee7bbf88&_e=62qJQja8rcMZ6RE2noBf5B39dhGkh1-PdP4hQvEMkdPIMVH-hLFdLNLsMh2hsyOIc54hTQHN1B9FC7_QRUK4uf3XzRkVVyz9VLSgosa7FOYLxbtIiSxB5vGuRoZhtqWaLVrba8CgdPFs4b8YJLG6TUvTNMd9Oe6Y9ffnB26iU4_Hht78rhwQnuVB0y7sLleNXOSnljytt5nYn9QoYZoQiXf5VYBXViGq3csT82M8JqtC9h9CFcexgCcN-PQtKyM2iPJzvs4PFi7ktAMW-IUCUlFQKX06hxdvGGHJBaSfkcLqZBGVizaqrUSLUMiyJeqVf6TNzINWNK6CB10X_Jhx7AeGzhfmyzytthtd6dZUyuhvvBtrDT1twq5ue0K7o1UFQ6qe0ZoT8KD5G9zCBGgofA%3D%3D).**

My name is John Pierce. After my tour in the United States Army, I pursued a law degree at Harvard University. I was also one of the few conservative editors of the _Harvard Law Review_ (after Obama served in that role).

We need TOUGH and relentless warriors who defend the Constitution, and that's why I gave up my lucrative law practice to pursue Constitutional Law. I never expected this to happen.

In my wildest dreams, I could not have imagined our government rounding up and arresting Americans who attended a political protest.

**During the BLM riots, federal buildings were BURNED, police were assaulted _en masse,_ and God knows how many Americans were hurt. And what happened? The Department of Justice dropped all charges against anyone involved. **

But for the January 6th protesters, our government wants to send a clear message: **Stand up to your masters and pay the price!**

I just returned to D.C. for a hearing, and my funds are running low. The cost of airfare and hotels alone for myself, the defendants, and their families are burning through funds.

Criminal litigation is EXPENSIVE, and I'm pushing the limits of my Harvard Law degree to represent these Americans who need our help.

**[Will you help keep us going?](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=23c5ce4b65fc4ea383e20256ee7bbf88&_e=62qJQja8rcMZ6RE2noBf5B39dhGkh1-PdP4hQvEMkdPIMVH-hLFdLNLsMh2hsyOIc54hTQHN1B9FC7_QRUK4uf3XzRkVVyz9VLSgosa7FOYLxbtIiSxB5vGuRoZhtqWaLVrba8CgdPFs4b8YJLG6TUvTNMd9Oe6Y9ffnB26iU4_Hht78rhwQnuVB0y7sLleNXOSnljytt5nYn9QoYZoQiXf5VYBXViGq3csT82M8JqtC9h9CFcexgCcN-PQtKyM2lJGfAt8Blle67tPqRZ7_Y-LaiCN8U3lPOHEzQOAewUQnoJm4xVq7epgzC1Z07Z5ffhgfOXC0dyHsHhlsH2LKr4aFWdv3j9WrRWocaAI5Qmtf6IiBfEKYTRMmi9v70vZXIoBGR5wM-vUzkXkZ2jPeWw%3D%3D)**

I have spent countless hours with these defendants and their families. Jobs and homes have been lost. Families have been destroyed. **The DOJ's goal is to terrorize these people to set an example for us all.**

What we see today are the same tactics King George III used before the Revolutionary War started. The British Crown used "writs of assistance" to carry out wide-ranging searches and arrests of anyone for anything. The tactic inspired James Madison to write the Fourth Amendment to our Constitution to protect our privacy.

Today, our government uses high-tech methods to do the same, tracking down anyone who stepped foot on Capitol grounds on January 6th and then using "anonymous" tips to determine their crimes.

Just as King George III abused his power to quell a rebellion among the colonists, our government is abusing its power to do the same.

It's 1776 all over again, and the defendants I represent are the last, best hope that our nation can continue to trust in our Constitution to keep our government in check.

My fight for these men and women isn't just about keeping them out of jail; it's about preserving the framework of our Republic. **[Please help me keep fighting](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=23c5ce4b65fc4ea383e20256ee7bbf88&_e=62qJQja8rcMZ6RE2noBf5B39dhGkh1-PdP4hQvEMkdPIMVH-hLFdLNLsMh2hsyOIc54hTQHN1B9FC7_QRUK4uf3XzRkVVyz9VLSgosa7FOYLxbtIiSxB5vGuRoZhtqWaLVrba8CgdPFs4b8YJLG6TUvTNMd9Oe6Y9ffnB26iU4_Hht78rhwQnuVB0y7sLleNXOSnljytt5nYn9QoYZoQiXf5VYBXViGq3csT82M8JqtC9h9CFcexgCcN-PQtKyM2ZkZ6EVBTWiu3bH5Ef9SImElAL92kt3RteF21Wmw_D-6voQsi6NftCIFgTMqz5-6d6rheKj6njkp7gj_Yp8XAFdlujRpW4kwSVk8ASFpQkT9_TFMwbVJl3YAqfMwgKu472c6_QGUEZwtJf2Qvg9txkg%3D%3D).**

Over the next three weeks, I must raise $58,000 to cover our expenses. Travel, hotels, paralegals, researchers, and assisting attorneys all need to be paid. My credit cards are MAXED out, and I'm relying on you and a handful of other patriots to help. **[Will you chip in today?](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=23c5ce4b65fc4ea383e20256ee7bbf88&_e=62qJQja8rcMZ6RE2noBf5B39dhGkh1-PdP4hQvEMkdPIMVH-hLFdLNLsMh2hsyOIc54hTQHN1B9FC7_QRUK4uf3XzRkVVyz9VLSgosa7FOYLxbtIiSxB5vGuRoZhtqWaLVrba8CgdPFs4b8YJLG6TUvTNMd9Oe6Y9ffnB26iU4_Hht78rhwQnuVB0y7sLleNXOSnljytt5nYn9QoYZoQiXf5VYBXViGq3csT82M8JqtC9h9CFcexgCcN-PQtKyM2tUxgTuzQSKZQu9hwTrXBzknVDzdhiaWrm-o27CCweZ25hVRgSKie_0sdTVHp3trso_-ldVOs3M2alLyPRKGtSBFVJaOaOwh30CqsWOhM8xTBL2vYaDlzcJjmuA1vwj1q7l5r2Z7wVB42Q6PG_aRw6w%3D%3D)**

Every dollar helps and is greatly appreciated.

Thank you for your time, support, and prayers.

In Vigilance,

John M. Pierce
Chairman and Founder
National Constitutional Law Union

name: Team Kennedy
subject: Who’s Profiting from the Ukraine War?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
Together, we can break the cycle and build a future free from manipulation.

|
---
| | | **Together, we can break the cycle and build a future free from manipulation.
**
---
---
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ukraine_1_20_24_email_1rs_1_nd&n=1)
|
---
Dear Peter,
**__The Ukraine war should have never happened__** , and it's time we understand the complex web surrounding it.
**The Backstory:**
Russia tried multiple times to settle this conflict, wanting one key thing — to keep NATO out of Ukraine. However, the big military contractors had other plans. Adding new countries to NATO meant a captive market for specific companies like Northrop Grumman, Raytheon, General Dynamics, Boeing, and Lockheed.
**The Financial Toll:**
In March 2022, we committed a staggering $113 billion to the war in Ukraine. To put it in perspective, this could have provided homes for almost every homeless person in our country. But it doesn't end there. An additional $24 billion was committed two months ago, and now President Biden is seeking another $60 billion.
**The Money Trail:**
Senator Mitch McConnell recently revealed a startling truth — __its a money laundering scheme__. The funds aren't really going to Ukraine; they're going to American defense manufacturers, and who owns these companies? BlackRock.
**The Loan Illusion:**
Senator Tim Scott tried to ease concerns by calling the billions we’re giving away a loan. But it's not a generous offer; it's a tactic. By labeling it a loan, extreme austerity measures can be imposed on Ukraine. This includes putting government-owned assets up for sale to multinational corporations, __including its prized agricultural land__.
**The Land Grab:**
Ukraine's farmland, the breadbasket of Europe, is a major target. 30% of it has already been sold to Dupont, Cargill, and Monsanto — all entities owned by BlackRock.
**The Rebuilding Contract:**
In December, President Biden awarded the contract to rebuild Ukraine, and yes, you guessed it — BlackRock secured the deal.
**The Strategy:**
Their strategy is ancient but effective — keep us at war with each other. By fostering division, they maintain control.
They're doing all of this right in front of us because they believe they can get away with it. How do we stop them? [**We unite!**](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ukraine_1_20_24_email_1rs_1_nd&n=2)
__The power to change this lies with us, the citizens__. We can’t dismantle the corrupt systems that perpetuate war for profit without your generous support.

warning about Biden’s chances in November.

name: 4Patriots
subject: Food Shortage Notice
body:
[View in Web Browser](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8kM1u6jAQhZ9msiOaGdtx7sKL21J3gYTaTSWWJnaKUdwEJxB4-4qUdjs_3_l0XBq62N4M6CdgPkQ_AjOI_8B82s0pn49p87qqNsfVqdomdV_yMzBPtyH8XT4gZUgudvepXhfeiNajLIIhjUorTbIuDqaquSHna-Vaoet_6DFQK1DiXkkk4YtoGFkiMZJgJbEkDhQaT2KPbs8eQeKSU7oUcmwcjdPscu77VDZ9KjpzmKZhXMQssJ1zX36dmy6cx5-3pk_A9qEMbC_AVn28X9WletleQdilBLGmt51du9OtyMYPc-y6OFYaJH7-Ur4DAAD__04AXwY)

**The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis** **This might be your only warning.** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **_" Food shortages are coming."_** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

**Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling [**Survival Food Kits**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJx0js1uqzAQhZ9m2IFmxsaEBYvci6iqqO26q8g_kDjBhRinUd6-Imq763LO-Wbm02Ee_XBvoPoHzEfvFmAGsQXmy_stxOsp7J5ytTvlF_UayrXk_8Cc7nP_S34fKfqg_bimVZu5RgwOZdY3VGFZlRXJTXZsLBl0vTVOKTbW4GCHmqVhRcJZ1Jz5hpElEiMJLiUWxD311pEwqA07BImPP4UOffRW05JuOsZpCoWdQjY2x5Tm5SHWAXdyTvHMtHbAnR29PYPoUvz0DkRLXGMNrLbdc7uOWJfASg_DfrmaNdgIzH-E8m2-UF1a2qwr1xT2VodZ-8MHiFa8vOV_0Vls3Hzz4-gXVYHEw8PfTuErAAD__1AIbZ4). When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJx0js1uqzAQhZ9m2IFmxsaEBYvci6iqqO26q8g_kDjBhRinUd6-Imq763LO-Wbm02Ee_XBvoPoHzEfvFmAGsQXmy_stxOsp7J5ytTvlF_UayrXk_8Cc7nP_S34fKfqg_bimVZu5RgwOZdY3VGFZlRXJTXZsLBl0vTVOKTbW4GCHmqVhRcJZ1Jz5hpElEiMJLiUWxD311pEwqA07BImPP4UOffRW05JuOsZpCoWdQjY2x5Tm5SHWAXdyTvHMtHbAnR29PYPoUvz0DkRLXGMNrLbdc7uOWJfASg_DfrmaNdgIzH-E8m2-UF1a2qwr1xT2VodZ-8MHiFa8vOV_0Vls3Hzz4-gXVYHEw8PfTuErAAD__1AIbZ4) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. [**Stock up now**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJx0js1uqzAQhZ9m2IFmxsaEBYvci6iqqO26q8g_kDjBhRinUd6-Imq763LO-Wbm02Ee_XBvoPoHzEfvFmAGsQXmy_stxOsp7J5ytTvlF_UayrXk_8Cc7nP_S34fKfqg_bimVZu5RgwOZdY3VGFZlRXJTXZsLBl0vTVOKTbW4GCHmqVhRcJZ1Jz5hpElEiMJLiUWxD311pEwqA07BImPP4UOffRW05JuOsZpCoWdQjY2x5Tm5SHWAXdyTvHMtHbAnR29PYPoUvz0DkRLXGMNrLbdc7uOWJfASg_DfrmaNdgIzH-E8m2-UF1a2qwr1xT2VodZ-8MHiFa8vOV_0Vls3Hzz4-gXVYHEw8PfTuErAAD__1AIbZ4) on these survival food kits while you can.

name: Gavin Newsom
subject: A whole new level of cruelty.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CAMPAIGN FOR DEMOCRACY PAC
body:
Now you know why Republican leaders fan the flames of the culture wars.

Friends —
The Republican Party thinks the most important issue for our kids is drag shows — not gun violence or child hunger.
Fifteen Republican governors have rejected federal money granting food insecure families money to put food on the table.
**Mississippi — a state with one of the highest rates of food insecurity in the country:**
[](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/go/3109?t=1&akid=1782%2E4767699%2EvVtfX7)
**Nebraska:**
[](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/go/3110?t=2&akid=1782%2E4767699%2EvVtfX7)
**Iowa:**
[](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/go/3111?t=3&akid=1782%2E4767699%2EvVtfX7)
**South Carolina (more on this next week):**
[](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/go/3130?t=4&akid=1782%2E4767699%2EvVtfX7)
Look at the states that have rejected aid:
[](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/go/3131?t=5&akid=1782%2E4767699%2EvVtfX7)
Look at some of the states with the highest food insecurity rates in the country according to the U.S. Census Bureau (the dark green ones):
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cfd-c-em-jan24?refcode=em240120-1-f&refcode2=1782_4767699_vVtfX7&akid=1782%2E4767699%2EvVtfX7)
Now you know why Republican leaders fan the flames of the culture wars. It's to distract from the fact that on health, wealth and economic outcomes, they are failing.
**You may not know this, but California was the first state to provide free breakfast and lunch to all 6 million public school students — the largest population of students to receive free meals, regardless of income status.**
Meanwhile, Republicans are out there denying available federal funds to feed hungry children... a whole new level of cruelty.
\- Gavin Newsom
* * *
i️ Hi. Please don’t click away just yet. 🇺🇸
All across the country, rights are being rolled-back in real-time by Republicans with a zest for demonization. We are going to go on the road and on offense — in red states too — and take the fight to statehouses, local communities, and electoral battlegrounds to save our democracy.
If everyone reading this donated just $20, we could support every “Red State” party across the country and give Democrats a chance to win EVERYWHERE. If that sounds worth it and important to you, please donate $20 to the Campaign for Democracy today. Thank you.**
_If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

body:

_The corrupt lap dog behind the sham Trump impeachment is plowing ahead with a plot to CENSURE ME in the U.S. House of Representatives! _

These Radical Democrats hate me for standing with Trump.

name: Justice Democrats
subject: Biden continues to ignore the Palestinian people while funding their ethnic cleansing.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Last week, we surpassed the 100th day of the Israeli military’s assault on
Palestinians. At this point, at least 24,000 Palestinians have died, with
more than 61,000 injured and missing, and 85% of the population displaced
from their homes.

And yet, the Biden Administration completely failed to mention
Palestinians in their official statement marking 100 days of war in Gaza.

This omission is disturbing, but not surprising, given President Biden has
spent the last 105 days willfully ignoring the Palestinian people while
funding their ethnic cleansing. Though he claims to be “running out of
patience” with Netanyahu’s human rights abuses, Biden continues to
bankroll this genocide.

That’s why we must continue to keep up the pressure for an immediate,
permanent ceasefire. Justice Democrats incumbents like Cori Bush, Rashida
Tlaib, Ilhan Omar, Summer Lee, and Jamaal Bowman are leading this fight in
Congress, but they’re facing relentless attacks from right-wing groups
like AIPAC ahead of their competitive primary elections this spring and
summer.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20240120.EopiSJ&refcode=em20240120-32902&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=3&t=1001&akid=32902%2E1203867%2Eu6ZMLR ]Will you support the Squad as they continue to stand up for peace and
human rights for Palestinians by chipping in $3 or more to
help us re-elect them this year?

clean_body: [1]Justice Democrats Peter, Last week, we surpassed the 100th day of the Israeli military’s assault on Palestinians. At this point, at least 24,000 Palestinians have died, with more than 61,000 injured and missing, and 85% of the population displaced from their homes. And yet, the Biden Administration completely failed to mention Palestinians in their official statement marking 100 days of war in Gaza. This omission is disturbing, but not surprising, given President Biden has spent the last 105 days willfully ignoring the Palestinian people while funding their ethnic cleansing. Though he claims to be “running out of patience” with Netanyahu’s human rights abuses, Biden continues to bankroll this genocide. That’s why we must continue to keep up the pressure for an immediate, permanent ceasefire. Justice Democrats incumbents like Cori Bush, Rashida Tlaib, Ilhan Omar, Summer Lee, and Jamaal Bowman are leading this fight in Congress, but they’re facing relentless attacks from right-wing groups like AIPAC ahead of their competitive primary elections this spring and summer. [ ]Will you support the Squad as they continue to stand up for peace and human rights for Palestinians by chipping in $3 or more to help us re-elect them this year? [ ]Contribute $3 We can’t afford to lose their courage and leadership in Congress in a time like this. Thanks for anything you can give to fuel our work to protect the Squad. In solidarity, Justice Democrats Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that this is a difficult time. There are other ways to make an impact in support of peace and equality in Israel and Palestine: please urge your member of Congress to support a ceasefire through [ ]Adalah Justice Project’s petition or by calling them using [ ]Jewish Voice for Peace’s dialer here. Your voice matters in this critical moment. Contribute to Justice Democrats:

| | Peter, I’ve heard a lot of politicians talk about “defending our country” and “fighting for freedom.”

_But it’s ironic: most of them have never lifted a finger for anyone but themselves._

I’m sick of career politicians driving our great country down the gutter. It’s time for something different.

**My name is Hung Cao. I’m a 25-year Navy veteran, LEGAL immigrant, and candidate for the U.S. Senate in Virginia.**

Unlike most politicians today, I’ve actually seen what it’s like to fight for freedom. As a Navy Captain, I went to some of the most dangerous war zones in the world like Iraq, Afghanistan and Somalia fighting terrorists in face-to-face combat.

I’ve seen how much America’s enemies will do anything to take us down, and I’m not about to let our weak President hand it over to them.

**[If you’re with me, I need you to act NOW so we can finish our mission, take back the U.S. Senate and save America from the socialist Left.](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=b7107322ce18409cae49dd05848ae999&_e=FQzbGTrfW5ecknVX6_wCP_LefkBDssIUMwj9x-lUNdw7s8eTnuS7df31SjBVHtyRzofw3ZfWdLEdOxn8MvTOiu0cqfZG3isR9DOpu-pBKlvvrK9_8_ROKmKf1EyDqA7CrmqwN9hnDd6Tj6e8yHom3Hk8zB7n655nLzKPnQYpqjitV-7ONcYwXLiCsi4tvQS-H8ewo_1L0KtYIclUKvZ8fbD3b1hYEYo4q79ROWfc_uZMAS0qAQz-OgVcUn9b4DnTiXjt0sVTcv1QZG8GXggWH3aofHdHK2s3XLji7FTtB_tvk4Qo_OCmPfpmkpqPEkZZb58ZidKlBgh0OMzY6bnT93bIUqBOVdoul9eWHXaAHSJtmABTGdtLFC0rFlm2PPTJ)**

When you’re serving our nation in the deserts of Iraq, Afghanistan, and Somalia, you have to remember what you’re fighting for.

I fought for my five children, my beautiful wife, and the country that I owe my life to. You see, my family came to America after we escaped communism in Vietnam. My father was put on a kill list, and if it wasn’t for America welcoming us, I probably wouldn’t be alive today.

**I chose to fight for our country in the Navy because I owe my life to America.**

Now, I’m carrying on that fight for our freedom, but I can’t do it alone.

**[We’re running out of time to save our country before the socialist Democrats ruin it for good. clean_body: | | | | | Peter, I’ve heard a lot of politicians talk about “defending our country” and “fighting for freedom.” But it’s ironic: most of them have never lifted a finger for anyone but themselves. I’m sick of career politicians driving our great country down the gutter. It’s time for something different. My name is Hung Cao. I’m a 25-year Navy veteran, LEGAL immigrant, and candidate for the U.S. Senate in Virginia. Unlike most politicians today, I’ve actually seen what it’s like to fight for freedom. As a Navy Captain, I went to some of the most dangerous war zones in the world like Iraq, Afghanistan and Somalia fighting terrorists in face-to-face combat. I’ve seen how much America’s enemies will do anything to take us down, and I’m not about to let our weak President hand it over to them. When you’re serving our nation in the deserts of Iraq, Afghanistan, and Somalia, you have to remember what you’re fighting for. I fought for my five children, my beautiful wife, and the country that I owe my life to. You see, my family came to America after we escaped communism in Vietnam. My father was put on a kill list, and if it wasn’t for America welcoming us, I probably wouldn’t be alive today. I chose to fight for our country in the Navy because I owe my life to America. Now, I’m carrying on that fight for our freedom, but I can’t do it alone. In Liberty, CAPT Hung Cao USN (Ret) | TEXT HUNG TO 21412 | Hung knows the American Dream is worth saving - because he’s lived it. Now, he’s running for Senate to defend it from the next generation. Last week, a public poll was released showing that the Michigan Senate race is a dead-heat. The media is reporting that our race is shaping up to be a “barnburner” with Elissa virtually tied against all three of the leading Republicans.
But don’t just take our word for it, [**you can watch the reporting by clicking here.**](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/220?c0=ebs-em-jan24-barnburner.1-mRYF&refcode=em240120-1-250k&t=2&akid=1038%2E135344%2EzTLm_e)

Here’s how you can help: "Donate" Here’s why I am uniquely qualified to fight against the government gangsters in charge of our federal government... I’ve been unlawfully surveilled by the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself. I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage our country. My investigation discovered the FBI’s unlawful investigation. And what I found makes me believe that they did it intentionally to get rid of President Trump. It’s why I refer to the Russia Gate FBI cabal as government gangsters. They are thugs who abuse their power to extort our elected officials. Their deep connections with the media enable a manufacturing machine of fake news. And once I found the truth, that’s when the spying began... Since then, I knew I had to do everything to help the America-First movement by offering legal protection to whistleblowers, veterans, and the Jan 6 detainees and their families from these government gangsters. I founded Kash Foundation to defeat the Deep State by offering financial and legal assistance to America-first patriots, veterans, and some families affected by January 6th. We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them under our two-tiered system of justice. But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them. Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no “deadly insurrection.” The video evidence proves it for many! This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before. This is the battle against the “Lawfare” used by radical leftists in control of the government to hunt down America-first patriots. It’s time to fight back. Help me raise $20,000 this month by contributing any amount you can generously afford today. Thank you for your continued support! We will take our country back. Thank you, Kash Patel The Kash Foundation is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit. All donations are tax-deductible.

| Fellow activist,

During this make-or-break election year, we’re putting in the WORK. In case you haven’t heard, we have set the aspirational goal of collecting **60,000 voter registration forms.**

And that work starts NOW:

New Pennsylvania Project, alongside the affiliated organization, New PA Project Education Fund, is setting out to collect voter registration forms statewide and, more specifically, in HD 140 (Bucks County), where we are focusing on registering 17 - 35-year-olds to vote ahead of the **_special election to be held on February 13 – that’s only 24 days away!_**

**This special election will again determine the speaker's gavel in the PA House.** The state House is currently divided at 101-101, so it’s critical that we win on Feb. 13 so we can continue fighting for the future of PA. This seat was left vacant by state Rep. John Galloway, who resigned on Dec. 14 after he won a district judgeship in November.

This is only the beginning. The PA presidential primary election will take place in **__April__** , so we have to move fast.

[**You may not be thinking about November yet, but the truth is that in order to mobilize and persuade the Democratic electorate to turn out to vote this year, the work starts now. Fellow Conservative, The New Hampshire primary is just a few days away on January 23. And before the New Hampshire primary begins, I wanted to be sure to remind all of my supporters in New Hampshire, and all over the country, that I am proudly endorsing Donald J. Trump. **If you’re voting in the primary, I urge you to cast your vote for President Trump. ** I strongly feel that **now is the time for Republicans to unite** **as one** to defeat Joe Biden, win back the Senate, hold the House, and save our country from the numerous disasters caused by far-left Democrats in Washington, DC. **_[**_To help us win this fight, please make a donation right now to support me and President Trump as we work together to defeat Joe Biden and Save America. Thank you >>_**](http://trk.tedcruz.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6NTE5ODk2OTgsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM4NzQ5MDg0NSIsInJxIjoiMDItYjI0MDIwLTM0YzY2N2Y2OTczNTQ2NDRhN2NkYTI3YzIzNWQxZjBmIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjEiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3NlY3VyZS53aW5yZWQuY29tL3RlZC1jcnV6L25oLWNydXotdHJ1bXAtZW5kb3JzZW1lbnQtZW1haWw_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1FLUhvdXNlRmlsZSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Q3J1el9UcnVtcE5IXzIwMjQwMTIwJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9VHJ1bXBOSCZ1dG1fYWdlbmN5PVBHIn0/8sldL_1jUr0UUI-GfQLtyg)_**

[**SUPPORT TRUMP & TEAM CRUZ >>**](http://trk.tedcruz.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6NTE5ODk2OTgsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM4NzQ5MDg0NSIsInJxIjoiMDItYjI0MDIwLTM0YzY2N2Y2OTczNTQ2NDRhN2NkYTI3YzIzNWQxZjBmIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjIiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3NlY3VyZS53aW5yZWQuY29tL3RlZC1jcnV6L25oLWNydXotdHJ1bXAtZW5kb3JzZW1lbnQtZW1haWw_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1FLUhvdXNlRmlsZSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Q3J1el9UcnVtcE5IXzIwMjQwMTIwJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9VHJ1bXBOSCZ1dG1fYWdlbmN5PVBHIn0/NgH5vjf3E_KQmPnS2-IQxg)

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Are you ready for the end times?
body:
| | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=45660d208cc9483b8ecc9d37cf9a5c00&_e=LmaeN2GD1DvCHhf_H8K3HbdUEqzPoLQVq5bz6iJtC2ekpSHNcJ7RKvl12Mgn4JQuK73uf4AqiMSPlmuOhjZXC2KmLCXNmjtcvmY1oYU9LM1RniN2Xqd_YixzwjTWO2QEofKtCZaBI88k3IjUQPra7v45gG-t23K80E0yuPH0qho0iSb1_OU0BPlUuAS2W1wKjB4EDomq8GPTUfjn4l6cmePeUpyYbyzvLYDNYGgY9nzbMXw9f0_eEw_CD_VExnThYHjgeL0_lG1AFnKPsoegKKZ9aLij9TEBbWVMlIbDb2rXS3iYFGaljew4DM26vEXvLI32Ji7ZT8oGXFL01m5S0JqS2LrxIo2fr_r-FyJDzzECnUQqdLzydrqL36wpKOFx5Y3fvM-7PVgWkC8ZLVrrRWjhKTObbUWWdxRvgfgK-idETaZYcyk3EcMgZhysN8my)
---
Hello Friend,

Take a moment to look around. It's like we're living out Romans 1:25 - trading the truth of God for a lie and focusing on earthly things rather than our Creator.

Have you ever wondered if things could return to God's original plan?

I want to remind you, Friend, that this chaotic time is fleeting. The shadows will fade, and a new day will dawn. The King of Kings, our Savior, will return.

That's the heart of Revelation.

Each day on this earth shapes us for what's to come - a grand finale. Amidst today's messiness and uncertainty, remember the promise that our story's end is already secured, regardless of the present turmoil or future darkness.

Revelation intricately unveils where our stories lead.

It's a captivating book filled with symbols, creatures, and events yet to unfold. But remember Revelation 1:3 - there's a blessing for those who read, listen, and follow its words because the time is near.

This isn't just a prophecy; it's a blessing-filled journey.

Revelation isn't just about revealing future events; it's about revealing Jesus Christ.

When Jesus came as a man, His divine brilliance was veiled by humanity. It's like dimming a lamp's light. But when He returns, that veil will lift, and we'll see His true glory. That's Revelation's essence.

As the great reveal approaches, I'm here to guide you and your loved ones through the remarkable events preceding the revelation of our King.

In my brand-new book, _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ , I tackle five common questions about the end times. We'll delve into:

1\. America's Fate: Will America stand for Christ or fall for the Antichrist?
2\. The Day of the Lord: How should we live in anticipation of this apocalyptic event?
3\. The Marriage of the Lamb: What unfolds before and after the rapture?
4\. Gog and Magog: How can we honor God in our lives amid their appearance?
5\. The Tree of Life: What's the significance of this tree in the New Jerusalem?

Understanding these mysteries will anchor you in hope, bolster your trust in God's promises, and equip you to share with the unsure.

In addition to this new book, I would like to share with you "The Major Characters of the End Times," as a token of my gratitude for your support. This full-color, large print booklet introduces key players during the rapture, tribulation, second coming, and final judgment - vital for understanding the grand narrative.
[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=45660d208cc9483b8ecc9d37cf9a5c00&_e=LmaeN2GD1DvCHhf_H8K3HbdUEqzPoLQVq5bz6iJtC2ekpSHNcJ7RKvl12Mgn4JQuK73uf4AqiMSPlmuOhjZXC2KmLCXNmjtcvmY1oYU9LM1RniN2Xqd_YixzwjTWO2QEofKtCZaBI88k3IjUQPra7v45gG-t23K80E0yuPH0qho0iSb1_OU0BPlUuAS2W1wKjB4EDomq8GPTUfjn4l6cmePeUpyYbyzvLYDNYGgY9nzbMXw9f0_eEw_CD_VExnThYHjgeL0_lG1AFnKPsoegKGr3_lhOFcCwh2gcLmrMyPx5Ia75HK9fm0pb8LQw5pf6qjhUIkORDEVO-BH0aOQP6_ES_FezxCC97OIN3eV6_eqWOC6mG18ul2VAVhexwlEDO0G395ytnNu8dK1SzyeI7qW-DAtMk-Yj-uAwOdMN63J1zzyPr34Mok_aioTBTw-8)I would like to send you my brand-new book _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ and my brand-new resource "The Major Characters of the End Times" as a thank you for your generous support of $10 or more to the ministry of _Pathway to Victory_.
Make your generous gift here: [https://secure.ptv.org/mysteries-of-the-end-times-generous-gift-1-dr-robert-jeffress](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=45660d208cc9483b8ecc9d37cf9a5c00&_e=LmaeN2GD1DvCHhf_H8K3HbdUEqzPoLQVq5bz6iJtC2ekpSHNcJ7RKvl12Mgn4JQuK73uf4AqiMSPlmuOhjZXC2KmLCXNmjtcvmY1oYU9LM1RniN2Xqd_YixzwjTWO2QEofKtCZaBI88k3IjUQPra7v45gG-t23K80E0yuPH0qho0iSb1_OU0BPlUuAS2W1wKjB4EDomq8GPTUfjn4l6cmePeUpyYbyzvLYDNYGgY9nzbMXw9f0_eEw_CD_VExnThYHjgeL0_lG1AFnKPsoegKN5uZaoqljHFv0ysR2NuBIDgEu8YIftvYytD-9ZtlGNEZJ2sKgRDrTTO1OxP1kZfaeNY0WymWCZjBiOpNLJTaXMx0j2jNlI8uBrDt0JF6L3T3Vp_68dp15PzIhIC70Awc_zsmoV81SKBCmlO3iJpSSWQofqXjBBUO4gSCgI4M038)

_Pathway to Victory_ is committed to equipping believers with biblical teaching and reaching the unsaved by spreading the Good News of Jesus Christ through the most effective means available: radio, television, digital, and print. Your gifts fuel that important work and enable people worldwide to experience an intimate walk with Christ. Thank you for your faithful support.

May our study of Revelation prepare, strengthen, and inspire you. Come quickly, Lord Jesus.

Sharing the Truth of God's Word, ____

clean_body: | | | Hello Friend, Take a moment to look around. It's like we're living out Romans 1:25 - trading the truth of God for a lie and focusing on earthly things rather than our Creator. Have you ever wondered if things could return to God's original plan? I want to remind you, Friend, that this chaotic time is fleeting. The shadows will fade, and a new day will dawn. The King of Kings, our Savior, will return. That's the heart of Revelation. Each day on this earth shapes us for what's to come - a grand finale. Amidst today's messiness and uncertainty, remember the promise that our story's end is already secured, regardless of the present turmoil or future darkness. Revelation intricately unveils where our stories lead. It's a captivating book filled with symbols, creatures, and events yet to unfold. But remember Revelation 1:3 - there's a blessing for those who read, listen, and follow its words because the time is near. This isn't just a prophecy; it's a blessing-filled journey. Revelation isn't just about revealing future events; it's about revealing Jesus Christ. When Jesus came as a man, His divine brilliance was veiled by humanity. It's like dimming a lamp's light. But when He returns, that veil will lift, and we'll see His true glory. That's Revelation's essence. As the great reveal approaches, I'm here to guide you and your loved ones through the remarkable events preceding the revelation of our King. In my brand-new book, Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans , I tackle five common questions about the end times. We'll delve into: 1\. America's Fate: Will America stand for Christ or fall for the Antichrist? 2\. The Day of the Lord: How should we live in anticipation of this apocalyptic event? 3\. The Marriage of the Lamb: What unfolds before and after the rapture? 4\. Gog and Magog: How can we honor God in our lives amid their appearance? 5\. The Tree of Life: What's the significance of this tree in the New Jerusalem? Understanding these mysteries will anchor you in hope, bolster your trust in God's promises, and equip you to share with the unsure. In addition to this new book, I would like to share with you "The Major Characters of the End Times," as a token of my gratitude for your support. This full-color, large print booklet introduces key players during the rapture, tribulation, second coming, and final judgment - vital for understanding the grand narrative. would like to send you my brand-new book Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans and my brand-new resource "The Major Characters of the End Times" as a thank you for your generous support of $10 or more to the ministry of Pathway to Victory. Make your generous gift here: Pathway to Victory is committed to equipping believers with biblical teaching and reaching the unsaved by spreading the Good News of Jesus Christ through the most effective means available: radio, television, digital, and print. Your gifts fuel that important work and enable people worldwide to experience an intimate walk with Christ. Thank you for your faithful support. May our study of Revelation prepare, strengthen, and inspire you. Come quickly, Lord Jesus. Sharing the Truth of God's Word, __ | | Dr. Robert Jeffress Senior Pastor, First Baptist Dallas Freedom Nation Today 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

name: =?utf-8?Q?Team=20Binkley?=
subject: URGENT: We need a social media post, Binkley Brigade
body:
| |
---
| | |
# Ryan Binkley: A Post From You To America
---
| [ ](https://binkley2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5894b488eac5a196e1e5d6896&id=bc4e8fe412&e=c1403f41d3)
---
# Binkley Brigade, We Want Your Help
Ryan's strong finish in Iowa caught many people and political pundits off-guard. We can see many people asking 'Who is Ryan Binkley?' Stephen Colbert asked this question this week on The Late Show. 'Election Twitter' is asking the question too. We want you to help give America an answer.

Here's how you can help:

We want you to make a social media post that starts with you saying, **"America is asking 'Who is Ryan Binkley? I want to answer."**

This post can be several different things:
* A 30 to 40-second long video. This is the preferred post we would like you to make, but if you are uncomfortable being on camera, you can also make a:

* 50 to 100-word post. This post can include an image if you want, so long as it relates to the Binkley campaign and is respectful. Recommended images are photos from Binkley events, merchandise, or pictures with Ryan himself.

* Preferred social media sites for this post are Facebook, Instagram, Twitter, Snapchat, and LinkedIn. For Facebook, make your post **public** so others can see it.

The social media post, whether it's a video or written message, should have three points:
* **"Ryan Binkley is... [how do you know him?]"** Consider the following:
\- My neighbor
\- My friend
\- My pastor
\- My favorite candidate

* **"I am enthusiastic for Ryan's leadership on [political issue important to you]." **Consider the following:
\- Economic growth
\- Inflation
\- Healthcare
\- Border control

* **"That's why I am supporting Ryan Binkley as the Republican nominee for President of the United States."**

Be ready to share your post on your social media**this Saturday, January 20 at 1 PM CT.** Let's flood the Internet with the answer to America's question 'Who is Ryan Binkley?'

### Best Practices for Video:
* Hold your phone camera at the height of your eyes and look at the camera, not the screen.

* Consider what's in the background while you are filming.

* Make sure you are reasonably well-lit (This does not have to be professional; it's great to feel like something real people are doing as a real response)

* Make sure the ratio of your camera matches the social media site you want to post this one. A good rule of thumb is to hold the camera vertically and center your head in the shot. That works for everything.

### Best Practices for Writing:
* Use active voice in your writing. 'Ryan serves as a CEO,' not 'The CEO is Ryan.'

* Hit the three points with clear and precise language. Don't waste words and get right to the point.

* Don't add any links to Ryan's social media or website. This is about sending a message from the heart.

Additionally, if for some reason 1 PM on Saturday is not a convenient time for you to make a post, do it at the next convenient time afterward.

Be sure to use the following hashtags:
#WhoIsRyanBinkley
#Binkley2024
#Believe2024
#Binkmentum
#FITN
#NHPolitics

One more thing. We would love for you to email your videos to us at reachus@binkley2024.com. Please include your first and last name, home city, state, and a sentence that says we have permission to reuse your videos to support Ryan as a candidate. **[You may reuse my video in whole or in part to support Ryan as a candidate].** Use the following subject line for your email: **Video: Who is Ryan Binkley**

Emailing the video is optional, but greatly appreciated.

Let's tell America who Ryan is!

God bless,

Binkley 2024
|
---
|
---
|
---
| _Coming up: Click[here](https://binkley2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5894b488eac5a196e1e5d6896&id=7e9a01920e&e=c1403f41d3) to stay up to date with events._

name: Sarah Longwell
subject: Time to get to work
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican Accountability PAC Inc
body:
Biden isn’t my dream candidate. But Trump may destroy American democracy as we know it. It’s up to us to prevent that from happening.
|
---
Friend,

A president will be sworn into office one year from today. Barring an extraordinary comeback for Haley or DeSantis, or an act of God, it’s all but certain it will be either Donald Trump or Joe Biden. **The stakes could not be higher—and the choice could not be more obvious.**

Donald Trump has explicitly called for the “termination” of our Constitution, promised he’ll be a dictator “on day one,” and threatened to use federal power to punish his political rivals. He is running a campaign based on—in his own words—“retribution.” I get that the choices aren’t perfect. No choice ever is. Biden isn’t my dream candidate. But Trump may destroy American democracy as we know it. It’s up to us to prevent that from happening. That’s why the Republican Accountability PAC is going to be blasting ads, buying billboards, and doing absolutely everything we can to say just one thing: **Trump is a danger to our country.** This isn’t where we hoped or thought we’d be going into 2024. But this is the reality, and it’s time to get off the sidelines. [Lend your support today](https://cQ0qs04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/2L+113/cQ0qs04/VW2NR42nR5ytW1GWXwm2KhGbJW7vv0b_58wVHGN4-lLgz3m2ndW6N1vHY6lZ3lHW3-dj-f1qnkB0N6ByftSPHdcqN6KLKDLFtHmJW7t5j576vT6wFW2ZSWp41tDtK2W8nZT-F8SsVDLW6lMDww5KtvdDW13NlJf8Lt-F_W6FR_gn3f64D5W1JXXDt79JhkGW9bjbkV2RTl8dW2Vn4Mj6BQzXYN2L5BnbQZ4vWW3yzyhn6M1RSqW5VQQMM4hQMzfW6mf8823KnCbJW63c9-V8rBzSBW8Z3c-Z98cyH_W6Cdwql3LmFmfW8Vd-tf88KN8GW4MvGG55KL8vJW3v44tB966Xgpf5fBmxn04). Sarah Longwell

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: The scarf
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
What I saw exactly seven years ago, and what could happen one year from today.

| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=1905%2E4032634%2En5vrhl)
---
Seven years ago today, I watched Donald Trump get sworn in as president. I went to the inauguration because I wanted it burned into my eyeballs. That way, just in case I ever got a little tired over the next four years of fighting, I could close my eyes, see him taking the oath of office, and fire myself up to stay in the fight. But while I was at the ceremony, I could glance down and see another reason to keep fighting: my pink Planned Parenthood scarf. A young woman from Boston, Kanisha, had just given it to me. She spoke at a Senate forum about the damage the Trump administration could do by repealing the Affordable Care Act and defunding Planned Parenthood. She said she’d counted on Planned Parenthood for access to birth control to treat a health issue. And she knew what it would mean for millions of Americans like her to not have the freedom to make their own decisions about their health care. Because of so many people like her who spoke out, and because of so many people who turned out to vote, we booted Donald Trump and his Republican enablers out of power in Washington. But now we’re at the beginning of another presidential election year. We’re exactly one year away from potentially witnessing another Donald Trump inauguration. And we know exactly how much damage he plans to do in a second term. For starters: He’s still promising to repeal the Affordable Care Act. And his MAGA allies are still going after reproductive freedom — even access to birth control. If Republicans have the House, Senate, and White House, they’ll push a nationwide abortion ban — so it wouldn’t matter if you live in a state that still has protections now that Roe’s gone. And they’ll keep stacking the courts with more extremists — like the one who’s tried to take mifepristone off the market across the country. Wherever you are in America, if you care about abortion rights, if you care about protecting the right of people to have access to abortion, understand this: Donald Trump and the Republicans are coming for you. And your chance to beat that back comes in November 2024, when you vote down not just Trump, but every other Republican on the ballot. [**So can you please split a contribution between the Biden-Harris campaign and our re-election campaign to help prevent a second Trump inauguration, defeat his extremist MAGA enablers up and down the ticket, and push back against their attempts to rip away abortion rights at every level of government?**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/1146?amount=28&t=8&akid=1905%2E4032634%2En5vrhl)

---
_If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_ |
---
| [DONATE NOW: $3](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/1146?t=20&express_lane=true&amount=3&akid=1905%2E4032634%2En5vrhl)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $15](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/1146?t=22&express_lane=true&amount=15&akid=1905%2E4032634%2En5vrhl)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $28](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/1146?t=24&express_lane=true&amount=28&akid=1905%2E4032634%2En5vrhl)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $50](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/1146?t=26&express_lane=true&amount=50&akid=1905%2E4032634%2En5vrhl)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $100](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/1146?t=16&express_lane=true&amount=100&akid=1905%2E4032634%2En5vrhl)
---
| [OTHER AMOUNT](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/1146?t=18&express_lane=true&akid=1905%2E4032634%2En5vrhl)
---

---
I’m running for re-election to stay in the fight against these right-wing extremists. To dismantle the Washington corruption that’s let them fester. To keep working alongside President Biden and Vice President Harris to put our government on the side of families. I can still picture Donald Trump’s inauguration. I know what it felt like to watch him become president. And I am determined to keep it from ever happening again. \- Elizabeth
| | | |
---
| [DONATE](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/1146?t=12&akid=1905%2E4032634%2En5vrhl)
---

name: Craig Segall, Evergreen
subject: This election, everything is on the line
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Evergreen Action
body:
What future do you imagine?
| | | | | [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/339?t=2&akid=14004%2E53494%2EKDYbeR)
---
| | Hi, Can you imagine a future where our communities enjoy clean air and water, clean energy powers our lives, everyone has access to safe housing and healthcare, and there are enough good-paying jobs to go around?

I can.

And I believe that's a future most of us—regardless of race, income, or background—want for our families and communities.

We exercise a lot of "active hope" here at Evergreen. **And sometimes that means looking the stakes square in the eye.**

[Right now, the stakes are higher than they've ever been.](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/5116?t=3&akid=14004%2E53494%2EKDYbeR)

The modern Republican party, led by Donald Trump and bankrolled by Big Oil, is doing the dirty work of polluters at a time when toxic pollution endangers more than 100 million Americans, especially those in Black, Brown, Indigenous, and frontline communities.

These extremists and their presidential candidates are pushing a "drill, baby, drill!" agenda, even as climate catastrophes—from floods to fires to crop failures—multiply around us.

**But it doesn't have to be this way. We are seeing the beginning of a better future taking shape right now.**
---
[**READ AND SHARE**](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/5116?t=5&akid=14004%2E53494%2EKDYbeR)
---
President Biden has a strong record on climate and the momentum to go further and faster in a second term. Even with a stolen Supreme Court and an ever-more precarious situation in Congress, **Biden has advanced the most ambitious climate, clean energy, and environmental justice agenda in history. **

He clinched critical climate wins with the historic Inflation Reduction Act, the Justice40 Initiative, the American Climate Corps, and more.

**In his second term, Biden can expand on his winning climate agenda and do what still has to be done.**

He must do all that he can to hold fossil fuel interests accountable, strengthen federal climate and clean energy standards, remove institutional obstacles to progress, center workers and frontline communities, and enshrine our democratic values in a way that promotes equity and justice for all.

In short, President Biden can and must use a second term to build toward that brighter future we all want.

Let's make sure he gets the chance.

Sincerely,

Craig Segall
Vice President of Policy
Evergreen Action
---
|
---
**P.S.** We are fast running out of time, and the next president will take us up to the eve of 2030, an important deadline in the world of climate goals. Meanwhile, the GOP agenda is to enrich fossil fuel executives while spiraling the country into rapid decline, irrevocable damage, and climate chaos. [We can make a better choice.](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/5116?t=6&akid=14004%2E53494%2EKDYbeR) _Paid for by Evergreen Action. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee._
---
| | | [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/337?t=7&akid=14004%2E53494%2EKDYbeR)| [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/338?t=8&akid=14004%2E53494%2EKDYbeR)| [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/336?t=9&akid=14004%2E53494%2EKDYbeR)| [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4575?t=10&akid=14004%2E53494%2EKDYbeR)
---|---|---|---

---
