name: Team DeSantis
subject: Open immediately
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
To view this email as a web page, go to the link below, or copy and paste it into your browser's address window.
https://view.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=a895ba9592fc69f9ffd6eb488d84646e83b2ccd5b891ad1692dd7b7611726b03df1856c31dc493b3ef667d1f0121931b3b7f1ea2e73128cea8e2ec928e469d8eeb31d1e9721f89dd992f4353530f3a49

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=47ab12166b642bfd32268328c5ac78c27a1e02090b41388a75b08dc89da863cc64c825a90fbbac6249ca494d4feba9aa9208d46e740e136a5c1b6abd9ea5f165

Friend,

If there's one thing we know to be accurate, it's that our team stands up, speaks out, and fights for Ron DeSantis every chance they get. With two immensely critical primaries coming up in the next month, it's more important than ever that we do everything we can to help our supporters get out to their polls, stake their yard signs in the ground, and spread the word about Ron DeSantis and the future he is fighting to shape for our country.

Ron DeSantis knows this election is in your hands now, and that's why he's been trying to get in touch. Have you had a moment to listen to his message?

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=47ab12166b642bfd32268328c5ac78c27a1e02090b41388a75b08dc89da863cc64c825a90fbbac6249ca494d4feba9aa9208d46e740e136a5c1b6abd9ea5f165
Listen Now

He's asking you to help get our people to the polls so we can be as prepared as possible as we approach these primaries. He needs us to do everything we can right now.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=47ab12166b642bfd32268328c5ac78c27a1e02090b41388a75b08dc89da863cc64c825a90fbbac6249ca494d4feba9aa9208d46e740e136a5c1b6abd9ea5f165
Listen to the message when you have a moment, Friend! This isn't one we want you to miss.

Thank you,

Team DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=47ab12166b642bfd32268328c5ac78c27a1e02090b41388a75b08dc89da863cc64c825a90fbbac6249ca494d4feba9aa9208d46e740e136a5c1b6abd9ea5f165

🚨 ATTENTION 🚨

Our grassroots team drives our every success, and we know we ask a lot of you to help us win this critical election. As this race continues to heat up, we will be relying on our supporters to help us go the distance, and we want to make sure we respect your preferences when we reach out to you. If you'd like to receive fewer emails from our team, please click
https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=47ab12166b642bfd92d578ad44d3a882e85453dc3e7b22af0bcfc504efbe985b106886f9175394521007bfe1471b84275588695c716600b35ef243355c65738e
here.

Volunteer!

We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for.

Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today!

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=47ab12166b642bfd321bc831f641df5a96a3241f50ac1f481dc50e2dd509a6670abfcfc7c8e167b48c72888f634ec28a629674f72e9d6b9c89dc81691ab7c98c
Sign up here!

Get to Know Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=47ab12166b642bfd32268328c5ac78c27a1e02090b41388a75b08dc89da863cc64c825a90fbbac6249ca494d4feba9aa9208d46e740e136a5c1b6abd9ea5f165

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=47ab12166b642bfd32268328c5ac78c27a1e02090b41388a75b08dc89da863cc64c825a90fbbac6249ca494d4feba9aa9208d46e740e136a5c1b6abd9ea5f165

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now.

Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without “green cards”), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general).

Contribution rules

- I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
- This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
- I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
- I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

name: Bob Casey
subject: Most just call me Bob
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHRIS DELUZIO FOR CONGRESS Chris Deluzio is a United States veteran
body:
The greatest honor of my lifetime

|
Hi Derek, it’s Bob Casey. Some people call me “Senator,” my daughters call me “dad,” my two grandsons call me “Bomba,” but most just call me “Bob.” [**You may have already read emails from us and know what our campaign is all about. If you do, I hope you’ll take a second to split $10 between my campaign and Chris Deluzio's?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77401713/450347480/1531286539?refcode=240120_bc_caseysplit_l1&ms=240120_bc_caseysplit&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzYzYThhNy1hN2I3LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XM5L1LAfmb20LKlVYILgnWO3PyWPAPzp7kuMLOr-Wpc=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately:_ **[GIVE $10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77401714/450347481/1531286539?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=240120_bc_caseysplit_el1&ms=240120_bc_caseysplit&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzYzYThhNy1hN2I3LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XM5L1LAfmb20LKlVYILgnWO3PyWPAPzp7kuMLOr-Wpc=)** If you haven’t, I hope you’ll take a second to read a little bit more about me, this race, and why I’m fighting so hard for Pennsylvania families in Washington. I have served the people of Pennsylvania as Auditor General, State Treasurer, and now U.S. Senator – but the greatest job of all has been being a husband to my wife Terese, a dad to Elyse, Caroline, Julia, and Marena, and a grandfather to Max and Aiden. **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77401715/450347482/1531286539?refcode=240120_bc_caseysplit_img&ms=240120_bc_caseysplit&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzYzYThhNy1hN2I3LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XM5L1LAfmb20LKlVYILgnWO3PyWPAPzp7kuMLOr-Wpc=)**
_(Scranton, 2018)_ I’m blessed every day to have my family by my side as I fight for the priorities that matter most to Pennsylvanians. Issues like bringing jobs back to our Commonwealth, lowering costs for seniors and people with disabilities, making childcare more affordable, and protecting vital programs like Social Security, Medicare, and Medicaid. **The reality is, that I’m facing the toughest re-election race of my career – and so is my friend, Chris. ** Mitch McConnell is prepared to funnel millions upon millions into PA to defeat me and flip this seat red, and the NRCC has their sights set on Chris in PA-17 as they look to expand their House majority, so we need the resources to fight back. [**That’s why I’m reaching out to you today, Derek. body:
This is time-sensitive.
| | | Hey there -- It's Diana, the Research Director here at the DSCC. I've got some BIG news: **We've selected YOU to represent Pennsylvania in a Democratic Strategy Interview for today, 1/20/24.**

Only a select few of our most committed grassroots Democrats were chosen for this _incredible_ opportunity, so you have a _rare_ chance to help shape our vital 2024 Senate strategy and defeat Republicans this year!

Today's survey closes at 11:59 PM, and **we won't have a complete dataset without your response! So please, click this personal link to enter your Democratic Strategy Interview by taking the survey now:

name: Bennett, Digital Manager
subject: Sen. Scott has a couple of questions for you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida
body:

Climate change, gun violence, and education all took a backseat while the GOP couldn’t get their act together. Not to mention their efforts to enact cruel and unnecessary cuts to essential life changing programs like SNAP, Medicaid, and more.

Our children cannot afford ineffective leadership. We want to elect a Kids’ First Majority to fill the void of leadership and get started on the work to build a brighter future for our kids.

name: Katie Porter HQ
subject: Our opponent has already reserved TV time for next week in markets up and down California.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
We can’t fall behind.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=36765%2E3422442%2E6mv18b)
Derek, we’ve been up on TV in the San Francisco-Oakland-San Jose media market for a week and a half now, but there are over a dozen other unique TV markets in the state. **Our opponent has already reserved TV time for next week in markets up and down California.** We can’t let him be the only one on the air.
The thing is, we don’t _quite_ have the budget to expand right now. **[Can you help us by sponsoring our ads in the Los Angeles TV market?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20240120-1?refcode=em20240120-36765&refcode2=36765_3422442_6mv18b&akid=36765%2E3422442%2E6mv18b)**
You've been assigned to the greater Los Angeles media market. Running a single TV advertisement there costs us an estimated $3,025,000. So based on our typical donation, we need about 127,000 people to help us run ads in this area. Are you able to sponsor the Los Angeles media market to help Katie win? [⇢ Yes, I can help reach voters in the Los Angeles media market by donating $25 to reach about 71 voters.](https://act.katieporter.com/go/19916?refcode=em20240120-36765&market=&voters=71&t=14&akid=36765%2E3422442%2E6mv18b) [⇢ Yes, I can give $50 to reach 143 voters.](https://act.katieporter.com/go/19915?refcode=em20240120-36765&market=&voters=143&t=15&akid=36765%2E3422442%2E6mv18b) [⇢ Yes, I can give $100 to reach 286 voters.](https://act.katieporter.com/go/19914?refcode=em20240120-36765&market=&voters=286&t=16&akid=36765%2E3422442%2E6mv18b) [⇢ No, but I can give another amount.](https://act.katieporter.com/go/19917?refcode=em20240120-36765&market=&t=17&akid=36765%2E3422442%2E6mv18b) [Contribute Now »](https://act.katieporter.com/go/19917?refcode=em20240120-36765&market=&t=18&akid=36765%2E3422442%2E6mv18b)
---
Thanks so much for your help,
Team Katie Porter

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=em20240120-36765&amounts=&t=19&refcode2=36765_3422442_6mv18b&akid=36765%2E3422442%2E6mv18b)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4s-emails/?t=20&akid=36765%2E3422442%2E6mv18b)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-update-info-footer)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4s-unsubscribe/?t=21&akid=36765%2E3422442%2E6mv18b)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Senate
PO Box 5176
Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)

name: Giffords.org
subject: ☀️Some good news for your Saturday morning 🗞️
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Vice President Harris just announced a historic investment in student mental health
#

We have some good news to share, team:
Last week, Vice President Kamala Harris announced new funding for schools to hire and train more mental health professionals:
[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-jan24.i9S2EM&refcode=em240120-1-30&t=1&akid=7446%2E3935704%2E3Ah2rI)
This $285 million is the largest ever investment in student mental health, and these funds will save lives and go a long way in protecting our children from gun violence.
It’s all thanks to funding from the Bipartisan Safer Communities Act—the most significant gun safety legislation passed in nearly three decades. We worked hard at GIFFORDS to get this bill passed, and we couldn’t have done it without you.
Today, we want to say thank you. Your commitment to the fight to end gun violence is what makes progress like this possible. Please, keep standing with us.
Onward,
The team at GIFFORDS
* * *

**👋 Hey there, before you go...**

If everyone reading this donated just $20, we'd have the resources to take on the gun lobby in Congress and states across the country. But not everyone gives -- that makes it even more important for people who care and understand the stakes of our struggle to chip in what they can.

If $20 seems worth it to you to change our gun laws in order to make our communities safer from gun violence, we're asking you to [**contribute to GIFFORDS today.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-jan24.i9S2EM&refcode=em240120-1-30&t=2&akid=7446%2E3935704%2E3Ah2rI)

_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_ | | | **[CONTRIBUTE $20](https://go.giffords.org/go/45845?c0=giffords-em-jan24.5nxPJr&refcode=em240120-1-30&t=3&akid=7446%2E3935704%2E3Ah2rI)**

---

We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=7446%2E3935704%2E3Ah2rI) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

Hey team — we know it's the weekend, so we'll keep this pretty quick.
Today's the 20th, which means we're just about two-thirds of the way through January.
It's been an important month for our campaign. And after hitting our FEC fundraising goals to end 2023, our team had pretty high expectations that we could keep the momentum going.
So we set some ambitious goals. Ones that we knew — with the continued support of our grassroots movement — we could reach. But the truth is, even though we're about 66% through January, we're still only 50% of the way to those goals.
Is it the end of the world? No. We still have time to get back on track.
But it does mean that we need a big day today. Especially on email, where the vast majority of our grassroots donations come from. So today's one of those days we have to ask:
**[Can you chip in a contribution — of $3 or anything you can — to stand with Ilhan Omar today? It would mean a lot to see your name on our donor list today.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-jan24.NN5r_X&refcode=em240120-1-t2&t=2&akid=895%2E791427%2E9DTNMl)

name: Greg Casar
subject: My thoughts on the immigration debate
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GREG CASAR FOR CONGRESS
body:
Peter,
Immigration has been all over the news lately, and a lot of people are wondering why. Fixing our broken immigration system is an issue I care deeply about – so I figured I would explain directly.
The ongoing**_humanitarian crisis_ **in the Western Hemisphere can’t be ignored. Asylum seekers fleeing desperate conditions and violence are coming to our border looking for safety, work, and family.
**But instead of working with Democrats to help asylum seekers, and to ensure our system is orderly, legal, and humane, Republican officials have used this humanitarian crisis to fearmonger — all to score political points against President Biden. **
Instead of recognizing the humanity of families and children seeking asylum in our country, these top Republicans choose to incite hate and use words like “invasion.” In Texas, Greg Abbott has used the crisis to attack immigrants and border communities. He signed blatantly unconstitutional “show me your papers” legislation, weaponized state law enforcement to terrorize border communities, and wasted BILLIONS of taxpayer dollars on his failed “Operation Lone Star.”
**What happened to, “Give me your tired, your poor, your huddled masses yearning to breathe free”? **
In Washington, Republicans are demanding sweeping policy changes to remake our immigration system in Donald Trump’s image. Reforming our broken immigration system should be a top priority, but Trump-era policy like separating families and ending asylum is not right, and it does not work to solve the problem. In fact, such policies only empower criminal organizations, endanger migrant families, and create disorder.
**Here’s the truth: Republican officials want our immigration system to be broken.** Instead of adding more immigration judges and administrative staff, or setting up safe, orderly pathways to migration, they would rather stoke fear and make the situation worse.
**What Republican officials have floated wouldn’t even improve conditions at the border.** Policies like Title 42, Remain in Mexico, mandatory detention, and mass deportations won’t fix the underlying problems. In fact, they’ll make them much, much more chaotic and dysfunctional. We know this because they’ve been tried before. It’s just more soundbites for FOX News.
We cannot allow immigrants to be the scapegoat in right wing legislators’ political games. We cannot abandon our nation’s long commitment to asylum. And we cannot pass legislation that would empower a future Trump presidency with unlimited power to inflict harm on immigrants and asylum seekers.
**Immigrants make our country better. That’s always been and will always be true.** All families deserve to live dignified lives free from fear of being separated, deported, or discriminated against.
You can rest assured that I’ll keep fighting for real immigration reform that lives up to our nation’s values.**[If you want to support Team Casar in that fight, consider chipping in here to support our work.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77404288/450355792/1399852724?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZWFlNTljOC1hYWI3LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PhfuXPCQ1EDc_SzF-S7VAnBdz7J5j7Qjvq7xTaWu9Xg=)**

clean_body: Peter, Immigration has been all over the news lately, and a lot of people are wondering why. Fixing our broken immigration system is an issue I care deeply about – so I figured I would explain directly. The ongoinghumanitarian crisis in the Western Hemisphere can’t be ignored. Asylum seekers fleeing desperate conditions and violence are coming to our border looking for safety, work, and family. But instead of working with Democrats to help asylum seekers, and to ensure our system is orderly, legal, and humane, Republican officials have used this humanitarian crisis to fearmonger — all to score political points against President Biden. Instead of recognizing the humanity of families and children seeking asylum in our country, these top Republicans choose to incite hate and use words like “invasion.” In Texas, Greg Abbott has used the crisis to attack immigrants and border communities. He signed blatantly unconstitutional “show me your papers” legislation, weaponized state law enforcement to terrorize border communities, and wasted BILLIONS of taxpayer dollars on his failed “Operation Lone Star.” What happened to, “Give me your tired, your poor, your huddled masses yearning to breathe free”? In Washington, Republicans are demanding sweeping policy changes to remake our immigration system in Donald Trump’s image. Reforming our broken immigration system should be a top priority, but Trump-era policy like separating families and ending asylum is not right, and it does not work to solve the problem. In fact, such policies only empower criminal organizations, endanger migrant families, and create disorder. Here’s the truth: Republican officials want our immigration system to be broken. Instead of adding more immigration judges and administrative staff, or setting up safe, orderly pathways to migration, they would rather stoke fear and make the situation worse. What Republican officials have floated wouldn’t even improve conditions at the border. Policies like Title 42, Remain in Mexico, mandatory detention, and mass deportations won’t fix the underlying problems. In fact, they’ll make them much, much more chaotic and dysfunctional. We know this because they’ve been tried before. It’s just more soundbites for FOX News. We cannot allow immigrants to be the scapegoat in right wing legislators’ political games. We cannot abandon our nation’s long commitment to asylum. And we cannot pass legislation that would empower a future Trump presidency with unlimited power to inflict harm on immigrants and asylum seekers. Immigrants make our country better. That’s always been and will always be true. All families deserve to live dignified lives free from fear of being separated, deported, or discriminated against. You can rest assured that I’ll keep fighting for real immigration reform that lives up to our nation’s values.= **= Thank you, -Greg Greg Casar Congressman Texas Congressional District 35 ****=** | ****** ---|---

name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: one year from today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
it might be hard to believe...
| | |
---
Friend, it might be hard to believe it, but **today, we're officially one year away from the presidential inauguration.**
It is not an exaggeration to say that 2024 is the most consequential election year of our lifetimes. All of the values and rights that we care about are at stake here: reproductive freedoms, protections for working families, Social Security, affordable health care, LGBTQ+ rights, a strong and equitable economy, voting rights and even our democracy itself.

**If we allow Donald Trump to win, he'll have free rein to push his hateful agenda and further weaken our democracy.** If we allow his MAGA extremists to destroy our Senate majority, they'll spend every minute in power working to undo the progress that we've made and send our country backwards.
**But if we reelect President Biden and defend our Senate majority, we can put a stop to Trump's comeback campaign, stop MAGA extremism and build a brighter, better future for our country. **
The road ahead of us isn't easy. There are 23 must-win Democratic seats on the ballot — including mine. And far-right megadonors are ready to bankroll attack ads against us. But I know that this team has what it takes to beat the odds every single time.
**Your grassroots support is at the heart of all our successes:**_You_ flipped the House in 2018. _You_ elected President Biden, defended the House and flipped the Senate in 2020. _You_ are the reason that we defied historic headwinds to not only defend but also expand our Senate majority in 2022.
I am so incredibly grateful for you and everything that you have done. **[_But now, as the election year begins, I need you to have my back again. Please, will you donate $5 before midnight tonight to help defend my must-win seat and save our Senate majority? name: Lucas Kunce
subject: Control-obsessed politicians are terrified of what Missourians will do next
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
A note about their latest attack on the initiative petition process
#
Peter,
Missourians have voted to take back their power from control-obsessed politicians by raising wages in 2018, approving Medicaid expansion in 2020, and legalizing weed in 2022 — all through Missouri’s initiative petition process.
**But now, those same politicians in the Missouri state legislature are so afraid of what voters will do next, they want to re-write the rules.**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43049?refcode=em20240120-4644&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4644%2E614464%2Esop2hI)
**They should be afraid. We’re putting abortion rights on the ballot in 2024.**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43049?refcode=em20240120-4644&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=4644%2E614464%2Esop2hI)
**[FIGHT BACK NOW](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43049?refcode=em20240120-4644&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=4644%2E614464%2Esop2hI)**
This year, we have a real chance to end Missouri’s extreme abortion ban and to hold politicians like Josh Hawley accountable for making it happen.
But it will take all of us, working together, to make that a reality. **So I’m asking:**

clean_body: A note about their latest attack on the initiative petition process Peter, Missourians have voted to take back their power from control-obsessed politicians by raising wages in 2018, approving Medicaid expansion in 2020, and legalizing weed in 2022 — all through Missouri’s initiative petition process. But now, those same politicians in the Missouri state legislature are so afraid of what voters will do next, they want to re-write the rules. They should be afraid. We’re putting abortion rights on the ballot in 2024. This year, we have a real chance to end Missouri’s extreme abortion ban and to hold politicians like Josh Hawley accountable for making it happen. But it will take all of us, working together, to make that a reality. So I’m asking: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: Thank you so much for all your help, Peter. Now let’s get to work, — Lucas Kunce | | Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri

subject: A quick update

body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=1756%2E552475%2ESTtMTh)
Peter, a lot has happened in the first few weeks of 2024, so here’s a quick update:
**FIRST,** our opponent, David McCormick, released his fundraising numbers — and we discovered that he **outraised us and donated $1 million of his own money to his campaign**** _._** This puts him at a _big_ advantage.
**THEN,** a super PAC supporting our opponent announced it raised **$18 million** last year — a record-breaking amount.
**NOW,** we are fighting back, **one donation at a time** — with support from all across the Commonwealth. We’re counting on supporters like you to help us keep up.
David McCormick may have right-wing billionaires and his own millions to power his campaign, but we have all of you. **[Chip in your first donation of $10 to defend the Senate.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240120-1?refcode=em20240120-1&recurring=1&refcode2=1756_552475_STtMTh&akid=1756%2E552475%2ESTtMTh)**

name: Gloria Johnson
subject: Out of sight ain’t out of mind
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gloria for Tennessee
body:
They’d rather let lobbyists into the House than everyday Tennesseans.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77406429/450363081/-849459103?refcode=ea.b75e85a8-adb7-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ms=ea.b75e85a8-adb7-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNzVlODVhOC1hZGI3LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M3RmDKeCREVg_sWuRD0buYvczbUQapbZUwtoUsM4XI8=&emci=d9eaee72-feb6-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=b75e85a8-adb7-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=46764483)

**TN GOP RESTRICTS PUBLIC FROM HOUSE GALLERY** Peter — it’s no secret that Speaker Cameron Sexton and the other Republicans in Nashville don’t much like it when folks stand up to their dangerous partisanship. They silenced me and two Democratic colleagues — not to mention grieving families — who dared to stand up to them in the wake of the tragic school shooting last year. **Now, they’re restricting regular Tennesseans from observing the House’s work from our gallery, all while letting lobbyists in.** They’d rather do their dirty work in private because they’re betting that if it’s out of sight, it’s out of mind. Well, they’re wrong. **_[Radical right-wingers like Sexton have had a stranglehold on this state for far too long, and our people deserve better. That’s why I’m running to be your next Senator. Pitch in right now to help me make it to Washington to fight for you>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77406430/450363082/209297649?refcode=ea.b75e85a8-adb7-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ms=ea.b75e85a8-adb7-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNzVlODVhOC1hZGI3LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M3RmDKeCREVg_sWuRD0buYvczbUQapbZUwtoUsM4XI8=)_** Thanks to Sexton’s new rules, only 99 members of the public — one for each representative — get to sit in the gallery. Every representative gets one ticket to give out that’ll allow someone entrance. Here’s what that really means: **Three times as many Republicans as Democrats will get to watch the House’s proceedings.** The 75 Republican members will issue their tickets to 75 right-wing supporters. And Democrats only have the opportunity to give out 24 tickets since we only have 24 Democratic members. If you’re a Democrat in Tennessee looking to watch your legislature do its work, Cameron Sexton says too damn bad. **_[I think this is disgraceful, Peter, but it’s just par for the course for the TN GOP. We HAVE to do better for our state by ending their hold on our government. You can help by donating ANY amount to elect me as your next Senator>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77406431/450363083/209297649?refcode=ea.b75e85a8-adb7-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ms=ea.b75e85a8-adb7-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNzVlODVhOC1hZGI3LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M3RmDKeCREVg_sWuRD0buYvczbUQapbZUwtoUsM4XI8=)_** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [**DONATE $5**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77406432/450363084/209297649?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=ea.b75e85a8-adb7-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ms=ea.b75e85a8-adb7-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNzVlODVhOC1hZGI3LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M3RmDKeCREVg_sWuRD0buYvczbUQapbZUwtoUsM4XI8=) | [**DONATE $10**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77406433/450363085/209297649?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=ea.b75e85a8-adb7-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ms=ea.b75e85a8-adb7-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNzVlODVhOC1hZGI3LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M3RmDKeCREVg_sWuRD0buYvczbUQapbZUwtoUsM4XI8=)

name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: End child poverty: sign now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress
body:
| | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/ZsYp6Jc2ATNP3MkVzvte6Pmk0F4jS6NOytihmYTOZ1f-yWw6Cj7G9e1dlkX4TL0NMWtZ9DST5cFtdsPS-4D2fKNVbxdzSbLD9T9x2URiTkAkvV0OpQQCoNHFnrXrpjTvSrTA-WKLDXZYPxuNy3izpCyK7OnwjCyGT2_jON_lqhVsFRCvKeZBSvBwp2DhwTgrZVNL6EeeLRFZc6oFveyRNl2e1DrUsKES3JV2vc0jdMQb0eIzL81G92R-40UzUlV2l7tM0jbhuiWlma_hg5QaXA/435/tyUhYnbOQkmcheSVsiXyjQ/h0/bw4Yrf6dDfoX52bvIY25BG1S68rsoRrmNQLo3UxHsGw)
---
| Become a grassroots co-signer of my bill, the _End Child Poverty Act_ , which would dramatically cut child poverty by providing families with a universal benefit from children’s birth through their teenage years. | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnlBNhiUhIkbX_VXVxXAv8Qe4hUUUDrFIVikoYCvH929nwsUb7XqZQUDGRQN_hpQcny1wh4izYpcl6GjRR7j9UEbPHaPzwIc0ME2SGVBAIAVhDPdfCM4zEwQs07uEIcdOf7wjVDI3vm1vNjL07WMBoB58p8MDpFZaB-Fe8YUbsWF1IZAqbRTaGbBH8tNIse1p0dIDGv6VgiOwXd44uJixmqeNE3btDDjgHWjbfeYurJqcZ_cGFOFCYrxQSAbcfF0qJiS6DzGT8XC394nu6gqO2LFoVhtGmY4BL1MvKZNH_4_0lY7XstakWZa26_W4ueiBSI/435/tyUhYnbOQkmcheSVsiXyjQ/h1/B7GI4R1U7qi64sWSSQMsc8VENstpPcciJU1x2Sa-rqg)
---
Friend,
The People’s Policy Project calls my bill “by far the best child allowance proposal introduced in Congress.”1
When Congress expanded the Child Tax Credit during the pandemic to be available to all families with young kids, we cut child poverty by 40%. **This made an incredible difference in the lives of millions of families!**
Sadly, Congress allowed the expanded Child Tax Credit to expire. Now, they’re debating a tax package that would modestly improve the existing CTC, but it would still leave roughly 3 million of the poorest children behind. And it’s being combined with a corporate tax package with tens of billions of dollars in handouts to wealthy corporations. **That’s not good enough!**
My bill, the _End Child Poverty Act_ , would replace the Child Tax Credit and cover all children, including the lowest-wealth families who are traditionally left out of the tax credit system.
**This legislation would create a universal, monthly child allowance of nearly $400 per child.** Since each child will be automatically enrolled at birth when they apply for their Social Security number, there is no need for annual paperwork. This benefit will simply continue every month until a child’s 19th birthday, ensuring that families and children have an opportunity to thrive.
[**Sign now to become a grassroots co-signer of the**** _End Child Poverty Act_****, which would dramatically cut child poverty by providing families with a universal benefit from children’s birth through their teenage years.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnlBNhiUhIkbX_VXVxXAv8Qe4hUUUDrFIVikoYCvH929nwsUb7XqZQUDGRQN_hpQcny1wh4izYpcl6GjRR7j9UEbPHaPzwIc0ME2SGVBAIAVhFitO79fiLFr3XZx9VOhHrDOIvgoJuRKEKhgrH1yi-BsAA11fxuUA6E0HtfKMIz2LBJ5nFwe1F_d1Jljt6CHB_RM0yliihb-o-Vmfku8qjzfj6jfelNAIKYZRmeX-YP4cCDaP9aSyUTcCxeBcerBUXUOtmr3ZJaepbjmGxHNfkHGniLYoO-KPCRjvMouv5bOvLDPVRpW1extUyAUAeLP2h8/435/tyUhYnbOQkmcheSVsiXyjQ/h2/qSsdnNvLltUQ3xGjIw_D9sGJgaTL4DiKr79goEHA8HA)
[SIGN NOW](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnlBNhiUhIkbX_VXVxXAv8Qe4hUUUDrFIVikoYCvH929nwsUb7XqZQUDGRQN_hpQcny1wh4izYpcl6GjRR7j9UEbPHaPzwIc0ME2SGVBAIAVhNcd724XKlle-VbUzMBDT9E-Uumqnx9bfPgrdZUTMTjWMhXYA1BuTMXiV16GEoshd3YAhozUBReoNcdZEm0xTGA_hfogWExbqEwi0dUfXCYZv95PpN0GKOLNUyhuoIkryB7k0yZsPIihBSbahtMf_FSE2-1D6G-e5Y9tBWv1rt2VB9oumxEVYvkzCeCmBE3iJ2LCN9hixBU9duZGrLhPW4U/435/tyUhYnbOQkmcheSVsiXyjQ/h3/zreG5NhWcXFGla_a2oDfLRqaXnAmBA_4xm8BeuhGVoM)
---
Programs like the _End Child Poverty Act_ have been a proven success in countries like Denmark, Sweden, Norway, and Finland, which have some of the lowest childhood poverty rates in the world. **The People’s Policy Project estimates that this bill would cut child poverty by 64% and cut deep child poverty by 70%.**

Right now, we’re seeing a widening gap between the very rich and everyone else with billionaires getting wealthier as poorer people are falling further behind. We’re seeing significant rises in food and housing insecurity and instead of investing in vulnerable communities, Republicans are attempting to cut programs and services for marginalized communities
That's why we've got to demonstrate public support for this critical legislation!

clean_body: | | | | Become a grassroots co-signer of my bill, the End Child Poverty Act , which would dramatically cut child poverty by providing families with a universal benefit from children’s birth through their teenage years. | Friend, The People’s Policy Project calls my bill “by far the best child allowance proposal introduced in Congress.”1 When Congress expanded the Child Tax Credit during the pandemic to be available to all families with young kids, we cut child poverty by 40%. This made an incredible difference in the lives of millions of families! Sadly, Congress allowed the expanded Child Tax Credit to expire. Now, they’re debating a tax package that would modestly improve the existing CTC, but it would still leave roughly 3 million of the poorest children behind. And it’s being combined with a corporate tax package with tens of billions of dollars in handouts to wealthy corporations. That’s not good enough! My bill, the End Child Poverty Act , would replace the Child Tax Credit and cover all children, including the lowest-wealth families who are traditionally left out of the tax credit system. This legislation would create a universal, monthly child allowance of nearly $400 per child. Since each child will be automatically enrolled at birth when they apply for their Social Security number, there is no need for annual paperwork. This benefit will simply continue every month until a child’s 19th birthday, ensuring that families and children have an opportunity to thrive. Programs like the End Child Poverty Act have been a proven success in countries like Denmark, Sweden, Norway, and Finland, which have some of the lowest childhood poverty rates in the world. The People’s Policy Project estimates that this bill would cut child poverty by 64% and cut deep child poverty by 70%. Right now, we’re seeing a widening gap between the very rich and everyone else with billionaires getting wealthier as poorer people are falling further behind. We’re seeing significant rises in food and housing insecurity and instead of investing in vulnerable communities, Republicans are attempting to cut programs and services for marginalized communities That's why we've got to demonstrate public support for this critical legislation! Together, let’s create a future where every child has the opportunity to thrive. Thank you, Rashida 1 Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . I won't sugarcoat it. This is the single most difficult race in America. I can't do it without you. **[That's why I am counting on you to rush in your GARVEY FOR SENATE campaign R.S.V.P. of $35 today.](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=e1292535a9184cf2b3e7487b871193f7&_e=TKa7DM3Bv_GyfDOjtrWFYUo-wyPcT_RN4QWeiVUhAespBrSz1lDfF-JWmxTBYp299tCFckOnuCNDvizyJXHlGX6J0Qfpx54hrKdKYLqdoAuIW27jcgyHH8Dr3E0u4BQQ3HMhxlm0wFIJaooM_7HTN6WiCdrqez_DQqYS7eYRcFsfPh3ELBQKTasE0xCXj1vGfUjZVa732TP1dWEw5Av0Ks5A4bJXVqjtgYcS7bl7sCFUSYhe_x2WzEDN8ng-rOPqGwXQONBXwP2EUz2Cq3qclbVgMMjWnL0crkYIHPapjKC4hlo72UaFUlrREXaiD_W3cFTNqpxie2PzxHCa0z0Ot-MEjh6d3sFpYeeGJkP5RO7Cyp2Pfwl-WXkggp5QLkL3H57EcYg6jJzB7JSOxJQuhw%3D%3D)** Here's the thing. As it now stands, 100% of Californians are being forced to live with:
---
• Fear of walking down the street, taking their kids to school, or running a small business because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. • The exploding cost of living (gas, food, shelter) which for the first time in our history is causing more people to leave California. • Failing public schools and plummeting test scores. The numbers don't lie... prolonged school closings not only robbed our kids of learning but of social interaction.
---
That's what led me to enter this race. **[And that's why I'm urging you to join me by rushing me your GARVEY FOR SENATE Campaign R.S.V.P. without delay.](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=e1292535a9184cf2b3e7487b871193f7&_e=TKa7DM3Bv_GyfDOjtrWFYUo-wyPcT_RN4QWeiVUhAespBrSz1lDfF-JWmxTBYp299tCFckOnuCNDvizyJXHlGX6J0Qfpx54hrKdKYLqdoAuIW27jcgyHH8Dr3E0u4BQQ3HMhxlm0wFIJaooM_7HTN6WiCdrqez_DQqYS7eYRcFsfPh3ELBQKTasE0xCXj1vGfUjZVa732TP1dWEw5Av0Ks5A4bJXVqjtgYcS7bl7sCGXBs8JSa3Qg-3VVrxXaizJj6YYQuAlqg-2P186YAqL15V2xuf1WvFnD1rYNWR7UmsLbd2O_WB3V2tOOTCcDavQT9jjMNFcshqxUEdjMeYSs8TP1dMzTn5DE6vbzcHhlROpn8QmDbl7CHKKpzHQWPkkpKghCuWhmHBvkKyTO-U0aA%3D%3D)** I get up every day and ask God to give me the strength to make a difference in people's lives. This really gets to heart of why I'm running... You see, the same dream and the same opportunity I was given is fading. It's fading all across America. But it's fading at an even faster pace right here in California. I pray you'll stand with me today.

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: Uphill battle
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC, P
body:
Hi folks, Senator Tammy Baldwin here with a quick update on my campaign:
Last month, Senate Republicans confirmed that Mitch McConnell’s hand-picked candidate, Eric Hovde, WILL enter the race for Wisconsin’s Senate seat.
Hovde is a right-wing megamillionaire who has pledged to spend at least _$20 million_ of his own personal fortune to flip my seat. Keeping this seat blue and defending our Senate majority against his virtually unlimited campaign war chest will be an uphill battle.
That’s why I’m coming to you with a personal request: **Will you split a donation between my campaign and The Long Run to help us keep Wisconsin’s Senate seat blue and defend our Democratic majority?**
Here’s a secure link you can use to donate:[**<https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/Tammy-Baldwin>**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-baldwin-split.kt1qkh&refcode=em240120-1-t2&t=1&akid=5162%2E196590%2ERlasNV)
Thanks for all you do to support our campaign — it means more than you know.
— Tammy

Submit this form to [**update your contact information.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/update-contact-info/?source=em-footer&t=6&akid=5162%2E196590%2ERlasNV)

Peter, as the 2024 Presidential Election draws nearer, the stakes for our nation's future have never been higher.

Donald Trump spent four years nearly destroying our democracy, spreading hatred and division, and even inciting a deadly insurrection.
**And to top it off, despite being indicted or under investigation for multiple crimes in both federal and state courts,_he just won the Iowa caucus._**
In short: Trump is too dangerous and unfit to serve as our commander-in-chief.
On the other hand, President Biden entered the oval office with a multitude of crises. The raging COVID pandemic, a broken economy, and our democracy in peril put our nation on edge by Trump’s extreme policies.
But that didn’t stop Joe from rolling up his sleeves to build America back.
His efforts have resulted in a stronger, more hopeful America today. And he’s delivering on his bold agenda. But all of this could be undone by a Trump re-election.
That’s why the potential 2024 rematch between Trump and President Biden won’t be just another election. It’s a historic fight for abortion rights, democracy, the freedom to vote, social security, healthcare benefits, and everything our country stands for.
It's time to ask ourselves: who do we want leading our country? Who will stand up for our values and protect the progress we've made?
**We must act now to show our support for President Biden and his bold agenda. That's why we're urgently polling voters in your area and counting on you to respond.**
Who will you vote for this year?
**[DONALD TRUMP](https://click.everyaction.com/k/77411069/450379679/-424210754?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc4OTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA0ZGUyNjU0LWI1YjctZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=g_ARDbfqVVT1hFU8sVbZl2z8Ie6mDiiI_SGmJQHa4EE=&emci=5d867caf-9bb4-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=04de2654-b5b7-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=16951753)** | **[PRESIDENT BIDEN](https://click.everyaction.com/k/77411070/450379680/-424210754?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc4OTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA0ZGUyNjU0LWI1YjctZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=g_ARDbfqVVT1hFU8sVbZl2z8Ie6mDiiI_SGmJQHa4EE=&emci=5d867caf-9bb4-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=04de2654-b5b7-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=16951753)**

We appreciate your input,
Unite the Country

clean_body: Don’t miss your chance to make your voice heard. | = URGENT: FLASH POLL FOR : Who will you vote for THIS YEAR? | | ---|--- Peter, as the 2024 Presidential Election draws nearer, the stakes for our nation's future have never been higher. Donald Trump spent four years nearly destroying our democracy, spreading hatred and division, and even inciting a deadly insurrection. And to top it off, despite being indicted or under investigation for multiple crimes in both federal and state courts,he just won the Iowa caucus. In short: Trump is too dangerous and unfit to serve as our commander-in-chief. On the other hand, President Biden entered the oval office with a multitude of crises. The raging COVID pandemic, a broken economy, and our democracy in peril put our nation on edge by Trump’s extreme policies. But that didn’t stop Joe from rolling up his sleeves to build America back. His efforts have resulted in a stronger, more hopeful America today. And he’s delivering on his bold agenda. But all of this could be undone by a Trump re-election. That’s why the potential 2024 rematch between Trump and President Biden won’t be just another election. It’s a historic fight for abortion rights, democracy, the freedom to vote, social security, healthcare benefits, and everything our country stands for. It's time to ask ourselves: who do we want leading our country? Who will stand up for our values and protect the progress we've made? We must act now to show our support for President Biden and his bold agenda. That's why we're urgently polling voters in your area and counting on you to respond. Who will you vote for this year? | ---|--- We appreciate your input, Unite the Country | Unite the Country was formed in 2019 to support Joe Biden’s candidacy for President. After a resounding victory in 2020, we’ve been working around the clock to uplift President Biden’s message to the American electorate and elect Democrats who will continue to fight for his ambitious agenda. (That's nearly the population of my hometown in Louisiana) \- Work permits for EVERY illegal alien who's been released into the country **_\- And they want YOU to pay for their legal fees._** My answer is NO. Absolutely NOT. Friend, Democrats have become the Party of open borders lawlessness and I need your help to stop them. **[This is the hill I'll die on. ](http://links.myfreedomnews.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=4a48e9fe74384039bf41667f18c4b108&_e=k-pqGO7-zBlyIqzbXjBFGvj7c0pCrNNatSTSovPRIqhGRFSWTNbgGm1STm3eXqSoTHtXNlpvL6xtpph-Gx5JeZAfaRPMOMoRC4AHk6LmAyr7jWUXVqK_iHE9CYC68_LcJ35A9rLWfx0N7M-Oi627v179BoE6o-6kVtDZjcP6m0affSxzrmmwlnqHwI5nPA_Q7fMh2fUNeK-wdyP1HAlqbRqi4p1ACnMFpyXfjVoltdY3StN8icRiY3iCI-qlgC3UNrGtUi0R6o-9Ugcmg6L-lVwTt0ZjRFlijpBmJyPMMZAunGH53OewYQnQ4zfmZydnLeYOE-Ot2zQNBesyICuWX8xU8iGQSfqEQBVpylGwQcGTLRcq15Gstq-ZDCYlUQLCYUbSVT-MDSXyn7EjqtsgPGT9S4bUCqEgrgw99cGDgWmBZiiUx9Coq1rV5NC3iuYK)** **Will you step up to help me and House Republicans end the Biden Border Crisis today?** Let me put this in the clearest terms possible: Since the day Joe Biden took office, he's been blatantly ignoring federal law. _In 2006, Republicans passed a law that directed the President and the executive branch to build the border wall._ **Every Democrat President since has done everything in their power to IGNORE the law. ** I've said it before and I'll say it again. If Joe Biden would just get out of our way, we could end the Biden Border Crisis tomorrow. **_My promise to you is that I 'll do everything in my power to ensure that Democrats respect the rule of law and fight to ensure that our border is strong._** But I need your help to ensure that after this election REPUBLICANS are in the driver's seat. **[**Would you chip in $15, $20, or $25 today to take back control of our border?**](http://links.myfreedomnews.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=4a48e9fe74384039bf41667f18c4b108&_e=k-pqGO7-zBlyIqzbXjBFGvj7c0pCrNNatSTSovPRIqhGRFSWTNbgGm1STm3eXqSoTHtXNlpvL6xtpph-Gx5JeZAfaRPMOMoRC4AHk6LmAyr7jWUXVqK_iHE9CYC68_LcJ35A9rLWfx0N7M-Oi627v179BoE6o-6kVtDZjcP6m0affSxzrmmwlnqHwI5nPA_Q7fMh2fUNeK-wdyP1HAlqbRqi4p1ACnMFpyXfjVoltdY3StN8icRiY3iCI-qlgC3UNrGtUi0R6o-9Ugcmg6L-lVwTt0ZjRFlijpBmJyPMMZDPz-UtLK25EUU9pLjtio8nSG13G9qY2hjyQ0TEmYRdMRL5yrT8KfXcSZsbSJrvLTQdvNgrtth6FOqVqFN8VN29hCT29Nx4uvY2tZ_D5bO-uC4Kob-ixFsI3H6kVIE_gm-s27xp4XLkhxiUeu0obXFY)**

body:
Time’s running out to make your voice heard!
| We noticed you haven’t taken our election year priorities survey yet, Peter.

Now that the election year is underway, Matt wants to hear from his top supporters about the issues that matter most to them. Time’s running out to take our survey, so make your voice heard now!

[**Share with Matt the issues at the top of your mind by completing our election year priorities survey now >> **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77412893/450385329/616725961?ms=em24_240120_srvfwd_esrv_gq_act___tc_ettx&refcode=em24_240120_srvfwd_esrv_gq_act___tc_ettx&source=em24_240120_srvfwd_esrv_gq_act___tc_ettx&utm_campaign=em24_240120_srvfwd_esrv_gq_act___tc_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=RMFh4c8vUSuUpmAsiqSpU5fbbttqIND9JgiSGTi40Niq4EWi4iCtS31nDhyILj7GKqQLPnSYyEW1i8Edpj4X8ZAjSj5e+vv2brEHoQHCsAohst5ZbIp8+MfI1ovhBV8byKCxbo8/vcjS2akin2a6JawhHpe1Fg6f1iLL640efzg=&refcode2=1a41e6b4-b7b7-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzgyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYTQxZTZiNC1iN2I3LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uHrCwawSEYUXpK8NT6xwR059kEPNTPNrBYIcgQCJ9oI=&emci=d2f52789-eeb6-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=1a41e6b4-b7b7-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=23311593) \---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Matt Cartwright for Congress
Date: Thursday, January 18, 2024
Subject: Fighting for the issues you care about most in 2024
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77412894/450385330/-235138156?refcode=em24_240120_srvfwd_esrv_gq_act___tc_ettx&utm_campaign=em24_240120_srvfwd_esrv_gq_act___tc_ettx&utm_medium=email&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=&zip=18326&refcode2=1a41e6b4-b7b7-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzgyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYTQxZTZiNC1iN2I3LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uHrCwawSEYUXpK8NT6xwR059kEPNTPNrBYIcgQCJ9oI=) Peter,

Now that it’s officially election year, Matt wants to make sure your voice is at the forefront of our campaign for the future of northeastern Pennsylvania.

Matt’s committed to championing the causes that matter most to you, Peter. **Whether it’s securing access to quality, affordable healthcare, supporting our veterans, safeguarding our environment, or enhancing job opportunities, Matt wants to understand what matters to you most.**

body:
Derek,

Republican extremists in the legislature are either knowingly lying or are
tragically confused about what a fair election map means.

According to them, the current maps -- which are so biased that even when
Democrats got over 50% of the vote statewide, Republicans nearly achieved
a supermajority — are fair, and new non-partisan maps would be a
"gerrymander."

Here's the bottom line: voters should pick their politicians, not the
other way around.

these attacks on fair voting maps are part of a larger Republican strategy

subject: Thanks to supporters like you, we have made extraordinary progress.

Peter, Three years ago today, I placed my hand on our family Bible, and I swore an oath to preserve and protect the Constitution of the United States. I took the oath of office on the steps of the Capitol -- the very same steps where Donald Trump’s mob had violently sought to overturn the will of the people just 14 days earlier. Where we nearly lost our democracy. As I looked out over our capital city, whose streets were lined with the National Guard to prevent another attack, I saw an America that had been pushed to the brink. **Millions of Americans were out of work and the pandemic was still raging. But I was confident the American people would rise to the challenge.** _And we did._ We launched the largest vaccination campaign in our history, got kids back in our schools, and got folks back to work. **Today, we’ve created 14 million jobs and more Americans are employed than ever before.** We passed the largest investment in our nation’s infrastructure in a generation to rebuild our roads, bridges, and public transportation -- and clean up pollution across the country. We made the most significant investment in clean energy in American history and worked to bring good-paying manufacturing jobs back home. We took on Big Pharma and won -- capping the cost of insulin for seniors and giving Medicare the power to negotiate drug prices. Thanks to supporters like you, we have made extraordinary progress -- and that is something I am forever grateful for. But our work is not yet done -- and the threat to our democracy has never been greater. **Donald Trump is seeking the presidency once again, and he is not hiding what he plans to do. He has said he will be a “dictator” on Day One and has called for the “termination” of the Constitution if it fits his will.** __Let that sink in.__ We’re the only nation in the history of the world built on an idea: “We hold these truths to be self-evident: that all men and women are created equal.” We’ve never fully lived up to that. But we’ve never walked away from it, either. **I promise you, I will not let Donald Trump and the MAGA Republicans force us to walk away now.** So, as we enter this election year, we must be clear: Democracy is on the ballot. Your freedom is on the ballot. **It is our sacred duty to defend it.** Joe Joe Biden

# ABOUT ERIC EARLY

Eric Early is a husband, father, attorney, businessman and son of a Marine. **Not a career politician.** Eric was raised to believe in America’s founding principles of limited government and free markets. He believes that every American should be given the opportunity to fulfill their American Dream, and his parents inspired Eric to achieve his personal goals. As the co-owner and Managing Partner of a nationally recognized law firm, Eric understands how difficult it is to start and run a successful business. As your next US Senator, Eric will work to cut overly-burdensome regulations that get in the way of entrepreneurship and job creation. Eric will stand-up to the Socialist woke interests that control Washington, DC, fight to preserve and protect our Democracy, and fight for ordinary Californians who are being left behind. name: Ron Wyden
subject: The threat to our democracy is unique
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Wyden for Senate
body:
We must do everything we can to stop Trump — and the movement he represents — from coming to power one year from now.
|
---
| | Today marks exactly one year until the inauguration of America's next president. Based on everything we know about elections these days, **there's a frighteningly high chance that Donald Trump will be the person inaugurated.** As I explained in my email earlier this week (you can find it below), Trump poses a unique threat to the rule of law, to the checks we have against unguarded executive authority, and to the central tenets of our democracy. This week he went so far as to say that "even events that 'cross the line' must fall under total immunity." The potential consequences of that belief cannot be overstated. With Republicans closing ranks behind him at all levels, we each have a part to play in defeating the MAGA movement in 2024 — up and down the ballot. I'm doing everything I can to support my Senate colleagues in tough races, to keep Oregon blue, boost Democrats in competitive House races (because taking the House is central to passing the policies that can finally move us past the era of Trump), and protect the White House. [**Will you join me by making a $4 donation today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77414403/450388367/-2044921950?refcode=2024-01-20-trump&recurring=&amount=4&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=09aad686-b9b7-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOWFhZDY4Ni1iOWI3LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8_UevWz3_durhkG_WpWDyz69MaBOc-r5zeCKwgbrqI0=) Thank you, _Ron_ Forwarded Message | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77414404/450388374/2140832878?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOWFhZDY4Ni1iOWI3LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8_UevWz3_durhkG_WpWDyz69MaBOc-r5zeCKwgbrqI0=&emci=0a7c723f-0db7-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=09aad686-b9b7-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=9818364)
---
Donald Trump's legal team made a desperate effort last week before the D.C. Circuit Court of Appeals, arguing that he is immune from having to face any legal consequences for blatantly illegal actions.
And just how far did they go? **They said that even if Trump as President had ordered the assassination of a political rival, he could not be prosecuted.**
We knew Donald Trump thought he was above the law, but to hear his lawyers argue the case in such horrific terms really puts things into perspective. And now, in the wake of Trump winning the Iowa caucuses last night, we must reckon with the growing reality that he is _very_ likely to be the Republican nominee for president once again.
Trump's grip on his party has never been tighter, and it's downright alarming to realize that so many of my colleagues in Congress are fine with (or too afraid to speak out against) a leader who believes in zero accountability for the executive branch of government.
Whether he wins or loses the 2024 election, Trump's ideology isn't leaving our political discourse any time soon. A core pillar of the MAGA agenda is to chip away at the separation of powers within our democratic system. **And as a champion of civil liberties, individual freedoms, and transparency throughout my whole career, I will fight against the MAGA agenda every step of the way.**
[**If you're with me, please make a grassroots donation of $3 to help me organize and rally supporters to ensure that we prevail in 2024 and beyond.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77414406/450388381/-2044921950?refcode=2024-01-20-trump&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=09aad686-b9b7-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOWFhZDY4Ni1iOWI3LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8_UevWz3_durhkG_WpWDyz69MaBOc-r5zeCKwgbrqI0=)
[Donate Today](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77414407/450388387/-2044921950?refcode=2024-01-20-trump&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=09aad686-b9b7-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOWFhZDY4Ni1iOWI3LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8_UevWz3_durhkG_WpWDyz69MaBOc-r5zeCKwgbrqI0=)
By the skin of our teeth, we managed to contain the worst of Trump's authoritarian desires between 2017 and 2021. But serious damage was done — and the door has been opened for the next Republican president to take us even further to the edge.
We need champions for democracy to win big this year. We need to be able to call out MAGA Republicans clearly and repeatedly. And we need to keep our folks engaged and make sure they do not lose hope in the face of the severe threats we face.
All the work we are doing today matters. So I'm asking you to stand with me.
[**Please chip in $3 — or whatever you can — now to join us in the fight for our democracy.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77414408/450388388/-2044921950?refcode=2024-01-20-trump&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=09aad686-b9b7-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOWFhZDY4Ni1iOWI3LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8_UevWz3_durhkG_WpWDyz69MaBOc-r5zeCKwgbrqI0=)
More soon,
_Ron_

clean_body: We must do everything we can to stop Trump — and the movement he represents — from coming to power one year from now. | | | Today marks exactly one year until the inauguration of America's next president. Based on everything we know about elections these days, there's a frighteningly high chance that Donald Trump will be the person inaugurated. As I explained in my email earlier this week (you can find it below), Trump poses a unique threat to the rule of law, to the checks we have against unguarded executive authority, and to the central tenets of our democracy. This week he went so far as to say that "even events that 'cross the line' must fall under total immunity." The potential consequences of that belief cannot be overstated. With Republicans closing ranks behind him at all levels, we each have a part to play in defeating the MAGA movement in 2024 — up and down the ballot. I'm doing everything I can to support my Senate colleagues in tough races, to keep Oregon blue, boost Democrats in competitive House races (because taking the House is central to passing the policies that can finally move us past the era of Trump), and protect the White House. = Thank you, Ron Forwarded Message | Donald Trump's legal team made a desperate effort last week before the D.C. Circuit Court of Appeals, arguing that he is immune from having to face any legal consequences for blatantly illegal actions. And just how far did they go? They said that even if Trump as President had ordered the assassination of a political rival, he could not be prosecuted. We knew Donald Trump thought he was above the law, but to hear his lawyers argue the case in such horrific terms really puts things into perspective. And now, in the wake of Trump winning the Iowa caucuses last night, we must reckon with the growing reality that he is very likely to be the Republican nominee for president once again. Trump's grip on his party has never been tighter, and it's downright alarming to realize that so many of my colleagues in Congress are fine with (or too afraid to speak out against) a leader who believes in zero accountability for the executive branch of government. Whether he wins or loses the 2024 election, Trump's ideology isn't leaving our political discourse any time soon. A core pillar of the MAGA agenda is to chip away at the separation of powers within our democratic system. And as a champion of civil liberties, individual freedoms, and transparency throughout my whole career, I will fight against the MAGA agenda every step of the way. = = By the skin of our teeth, we managed to contain the worst of Trump's authoritarian desires between 2017 and 2021. But serious damage was done — and the door has been opened for the next Republican president to take us even further to the edge. We need champions for democracy to win big this year. We need to be able to call out MAGA Republicans clearly and repeatedly. And we need to keep our folks engaged and make sure they do not lose hope in the face of the severe threats we face. All the work we are doing today matters. So I'm asking you to stand with me. = More soon, Ron Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for and authorized by Wyden for Senate. | This email was sent by Wyden for Senate P.O. Box 3498 Portland, OR 97208 United States Email is an important way for Ron Wyden to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. Too much email? or . Questions or concerns? . |

name: Mike Feuer
subject: One year from today
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY MIKE FEUER FOR CONGRESS
body:
No matter what happens, we need leaders in Congress with the experience, knowledge, and tenacity to handle both historic opportunities and unprecedented challenges.
Friend,
Voting begins in just a couple weeks in my race to succeed Adam Schiff in Congress — and the campaign is going great.
But before I discuss my race further, I want to note that we're also just one year out from Presidential Inauguration Day, 2025.
Barring unforeseen circumstances, next January we will be watching one of two events:
— Joe Biden and Kamala Harris taking the Oath of Office for a second term.
— The return of Donald Trump and MAGA madness to the White House.
I will fight with every ounce of my energy for the first scenario.
But no matter what happens, we will need leaders in Congress with the experience, knowledge, and tenacity to handle both historic opportunities and unprecedented challenges.
That's where my race comes in. As Californians soon start voting on who will succeed Adam Schiff during one of the most consequential periods in our nation’s history, there is so much on the line. And with fifteen candidates splitting the vote, this race could come down to tiny margins.
**That’s why I’m asking for your support today. Whether you can give $5 or $500, every dollar helps us reach more voters and closer to victory. You can donate with this secure link: [_https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rs_mikefeuer_fr_q12024_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77414909/450388986/1732327776?amount=50&refcode=RS_EM_FR_2024.01.20_B1_Jan20_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3MjAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzljOTA5MTYtYmFiNy1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=MdwmSLrTEsPGlCpU2HkQl07_WmnKDHF209pT6J2ca30=)**
I appreciate your support, generosity, and resilience during this time. If you have any questions, please email my campaign at [info@mikefeuerforcongress.com](mailto:info@mikefeuerforcongress.com) and I will get back to you as soon as possible.
All the best,
— Mike

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: humbly asking
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| Team,

I’m sure you receive many emails from campaigns asking for money, but hopefully, I can provide some context behind these requests.

As we strategize and plan for the future of our campaign, our monthly and quarterly fundraising objectives are crucial in these discussions.

Our ability to secure victory in 2025 hinges on whether we meet these goals. We don't set these benchmarks arbitrarily; they guide our trajectory towards success.

As we saw in last year’s elections in Virginia, our success in winning back the Virginia House of Delegates and holding onto the Virginia Senate wouldn’t have been possible without grassroots support from people like you.

So, when you receive communications from us stressing the significance of reaching our fundraising goal, please understand that it comes from a place of sincerity. **_We value your support immensely and are committed to being completely transparent about our campaign's direction._**

[**With that in mind, we’re coming up on our first internal deadline of 2024, and I need your support to ensure we reach our goal. Anything you can contribute between my campaign and the Voter Protection Protect – whether $5 or $10 – is greatly appreciated by me and my team.**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/60020?t=6&akid=12507%2E878179%2E6fnPEq) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Abigail Spanberger and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/60021?t=7&akid=12507%2E878179%2E6fnPEq)

Thank you,
Abigail

(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=12507%2E878179%2E6fnPEq). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=12507%2E878179%2E6fnPEq).**

name: Tom Suozzi
subject: In just 24 days, we can change America’s course for the better
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m23-suozzi [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m23-suozzi]
Hi there, it’s Tom Suozzi. Seth Moulton asked me to reach out to you with an important message.
When George Santos became a member of Congress one year ago, we knew his lies made him unqualified for office. In December, he was finally held accountable and expelled. Now, in just 24 days, we can replace him in the toss-up special election on February 13.
In a time of ever increasing polarization and division, now is our chance to make a change for the better. The eyes of the nation will be on NY-03, and it’s up to us what they see. Will we elect a unifier or a divider? Will we finally break through our crippling gridlock or will we continue to fail to solve big problems like climate change, a broken immigration system, rising costs, and gun violence? All that and more is at stake in this election.
Team, this is a critical moment for our nation, and I need you by my side.
Will you rush a split donation right away between Seth Moulton and my campaign to help win this crucial special election? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/m23-suozzi]
Thank you,
Tom
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m23-suozzi]

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: Respectfully
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
#

I can’t wrap my head around it, Peter.
Kari Lake got a personal shout out from Trump after he won the Iowa Caucus.
This race is as close as ever, and all the polls say so.
And Trump himself is coming to Arizona in less than a week — bringing all his MAGA supporters with him to rally support behind his campaign and Kari Lake’s.
They are building support every day.
But our fundraising this month, the first month of the Election Year... it’s tapered off quite a bit. Sorry to be so honest here, but to beat Kari Lake and Kyrsten Sinema, we can’t let that happen.
Now, I know there’s a lot going on right now. I know there are a lot of people out there asking you to donate. And I know it can seem really overwhelming. Really, I do.
And honestly, I never thought I’d have to ask so many people I’ve never met to support me, to back this campaign, to help me defend our Senate majority. But that is what I have to do. I have to ask you for your help.
So please. I am respectfully asking:
[**Make your first online donation to this campaign today. $3 to get us back on track and crush our goals this month. $3 to win this race.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-jan24.RCwesN&refcode=em240120-1-90-t4&t=1&akid=1781%2E734936%2ELQS8Qp)

If you would like to support Ruben's campaign for Senate, please consider [making a donation today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruben-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=28&refcode2=1781_734936_LQS8Qp&akid=1781%2E734936%2ELQS8Qp)
clean_body: I can’t wrap my head around it, Peter. Kari Lake got a personal shout out from Trump after he won the Iowa Caucus. This race is as close as ever, and all the polls say so. And Trump himself is coming to Arizona in less than a week — bringing all his MAGA supporters with him to rally support behind his campaign and Kari Lake’s. They are building support every day. But our fundraising this month, the first month of the Election Year... it’s tapered off quite a bit. Sorry to be so honest here, but to beat Kari Lake and Kyrsten Sinema, we can’t let that happen. Now, I know there’s a lot going on right now. I know there are a lot of people out there asking you to donate. And I know it can seem really overwhelming. Really, I do. And honestly, I never thought I’d have to ask so many people I’ve never met to support me, to back this campaign, to help me defend our Senate majority. But that is what I have to do. I have to ask you for your help. So please. I am respectfully asking: If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly. | | ** | | | | | | | ** That’s what these emails are for — to raise the money we need to take back this seat from Kyrsten Sinema. To defend it from the likes of Kari Lake and anyone else who lines up against us. I hope you’re with me. Ruben Paid For By Gallego for Arizona Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

name: PramilaForCongress.com
subject: The results are in —
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
The filibuster has stood in the way of countless paths to reform for far too long.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20240120-3414-footer&t=1&akid=3414%2E420207%2EYeqrkl)
Peter,
Earlier this month, we asked you and other dedicated supporters to voice what issues matter most to you in our **2024 Congressional Priorities Survey** _— and the results are in._
An overwhelming majority of you all voiced the urgent need for us to pass bold legislation like comprehensive immigration reform, universal health care, codifying _Roe v. Wade_ , and more.
**But we all know the key to passing all of this and more lies in abolishing the filibuster****, Peter. **[**Add your name to our petition to demand Congress abolish the filibuster so that we can pass bold legislation for working people.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/abolish_filibuster_now/?source=em20240120-3414&t=2&akid=3414%2E420207%2EYeqrkl)
**[Abolish the filibuster ››](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/abolish_filibuster_now/?source=em20240120-3414&t=3&akid=3414%2E420207%2EYeqrkl)**
The filibuster has stood in the way of countless paths to reform for _far too long._ By ending this draconian tool, we can eliminate dark money from our elections and rid our government of arbitrary voter suppression laws.
And we won’t just stop there, Peter. **Once we end the filibuster, we will finally be able to pass people-first legislation that meets the urgency of the issues we face today.**
_No wonder_ Republican donors at AIPAC want to unseat progressives like Pramila. They see her unapologetic fight to build a democracy rooted in love, compassion, and true representation. **[So if you stand with our movement, please add your name and amplify our call to abolish the filibuster and finally pass people-first legislation.](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/abolish_filibuster_now/?source=em20240120-3414&t=4&akid=3414%2E420207%2EYeqrkl)**
**[Add your name ››](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/abolish_filibuster_now/?source=em20240120-3414&t=5&akid=3414%2E420207%2EYeqrkl)**
Together,
Team Jayapal
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20240120-3414-footer&t=6&refcode2=3414_420207_Yeqrkl&akid=3414%2E420207%2EYeqrkl)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=7&akid=3414%2E420207%2EYeqrkl)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=8&akid=3414%2E420207%2EYeqrkl)
