name: News Team @ Our Revolution
subject: The latest: Bernie forces vote on Gaza, Barbara Lee on education & filibuster, new slate endorsements, and more!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

INSIDER NEWS FROM THE FRONTLINES OF THE POLITICAL REVOLUTION

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

HEADLINES: Bernie Forces Vote on Israel/Gaza | Education for All Town Hall
w/ Barbara Lee | Bernie vs. Money in Politics | New 2024 Progressive Power
Slates! | Fight the Filibuster w/ Senator Merkley | Push for Peace w/ Ro
Khanna & Larry Cohen | & MORE!

★ ★ ★

IN 2024, WE MUST SECURE PEACE
AND DEFEAT TRUMP

This week, we honored the legacy of Dr. Martin Luther King Jr. and his
mission for equality and peace — joining a diverse coalition demanding an
end to all war.

On Wednesday, Our Revolution founder Bernie Sanders forced a vote in the
Senate to investigate the human rights abuses in Gaza — as we continue his
push to stop funding the bombing of Palestinian civilians and children.

We also watched in horror this week as Republican primary voters in Iowa
voted overwhelmingly for Donald Trump — now the likely nominee despite 91
criminal charges and being ineligible by the 14th Amendment to be on the
ballot.

The far right is energized and we face crucial battles on many fronts, but
our movement for peace and prosperity is growing stronger every day —
thanks to all of you.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13830?t=1011&akid=5216%2E5885482%2Ea_9cUa ]Your grassroots support has never been more important. If you’re not
already a member of Our Revolution, please consider committing to a
monthly contribution or a one-time donation today!

★ ★ ★

★ ★ ★

Local power matters. We refuse to let the far right take over school
boards and critical down ballot seats that directly impact people's lives.

Bernie Sanders founded Our Revolution to build power from the bottom up,
and we’ve helped elect more than 1,000 progressives at every level of
government.

We know strong city and state leadership is the last bulwark for the
working class against the rise of rightwing and corporate extremism — and
that’s why we’re rolling out exciting new slates to build progressive
power in 2024.

★ ★ ★

First, as you know, Our Revolution is working overtime to make sure
Barbara Lee becomes the next U.S. Senator from California. This week, she
snagged a key endorsement from McClatchy papers, including the Sacramento
Bee.

“Barbara Lee stood out from the rest. Her independence, her perseverance
in fighting for the underdog and her life experiences set her apart,”
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13645?t=1012&akid=5216%2E5885482%2Ea_9cUa ]the endorsement reads.

As Rep. Lee heads up our California endorsements, and with ballots due to
hit mailboxes around Feb. 5th, Our Revolution is proud to announce our
Sacramento County Progressive Power Slate!

Sean Frame for CA Assembly (District 6)
Dr. Flo Cofer for Sacramento Mayor
Katie Valenzuela for Sacramento City Council
(District 4)
Mai Vang for Sacramento City Council (District 8)
Roger Dickinson for Sacramento City Council
(District 2)
Murad “Moe” Sarama for Sacramento County Office of Education (Area 4)

Our slate of champions are taking on anti-union and pro-school
privatization opponents and running on strong platforms of progressive
change. [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13560?t=1013&akid=5216%2E5885482%2Ea_9cUa ]Click here to visit our website to learn more about this slate!

In addition to growing progressive influence on the California Assembly
and building a progressive majority on Sacramento City Council, we are
endorsing 13 progressives running for important seats on the Democratic
Party of Sacramento County Central Committee:

District 1 - Andrés Ramos, David Lee Mandel, Mohammad “Mo” Kashmiri,
Shirley Toy, Fatima Malik, and Tamika L’Ecluse
District 2 - Justin “J.D.” Garcia
District 3 - John D. Kincaid
District 4 - Chris Yatooma
District 5 - Lee “Marsha” Miller, Monica Madrid, Randa Allathkani, and
Yassar Dahbour

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13791?t=1014&akid=5216%2E5885482%2Ea_9cUa ]Help Our Revolution elect progressive champions in Sacramento County by
donating here.

★ ★ ★

In San Francisco, a group funded by corporate billionaires has pledged to
spend $850,000 in the Democratic County Central Committee Candidates race
opposing our slate of diverse, progressive leaders:

Assembly District 19 - Sandra Lee Fewer, Greg Hardeman, Natalie Gee,
Connie Chan, Frances Hsieh, Gordon Mar, Leah LaCroix, Queena Chen, Hene
Kelly, and Mano Raju

Assembly District 17 - Sydney Simpson, John Avalos, Michael Nguyen, Jeremy
Lee, Peter Gallotta, Anita Martinez, Jane Kim, Joshua Rudy Ochoa, Sal
Rosselli, Gloria Berry, Vick Chung, Patrick Bell, Adolfo Velasquez, and
Kristin Hardy

These candidates have a real shot at winning and holding these seats and
continuing to build a strong progressive bloc that gives our movement
power and leverage to advance our progressive priorities against the
political establishment.

We need to continue our transformation of the California Democratic Party
from the inside out. [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13792?t=1015&akid=5216%2E5885482%2Ea_9cUa ]Click here for more info about this slate on our
new web page!

We are pleased to announce endorsements for Judges Michael Begert and
Patrick Thompson of the San Francisco Superior Court.

Rightwing forces are trying to push tough-on-crime judges, and we need to
support fair, impartial judges and preserve the independence of the San
Francisco judiciary.

★ ★ ★

AIPAC lobbyists are already preparing to spend more than $100 MILLION to
try to unseat some of our strongest peace champions in Congress, including
Pramila Jayapal, Rashida Tlaib, Ilhan Omar, Cori Bush, Summer Lee, and
others.

Progressives are under attack for demanding a Ceasefire and an end to the
killing of thousands of Palestinian civilians and children — and we must
have their back in 2024.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13830?t=1016&akid=5216%2E5885482%2Ea_9cUa ]Help fund Our Revolution’s voter outreach operation by pitching in any
amount or committing to a recurring contribution. We must make sure our
most powerful anti-war voices are not silenced by big money in 2024.

★ ★ ★

As we head into 2024, we’d love to hear from you about candidates our
members are excited about! Email our political team at
political@ourrevolution.com to nominate candidates for Our Revolution’s
endorsement.

★ ★ ★

★ ★ ★

It was a packed house for Our Revolution’s Education for All Town Hall
with Barbara Lee at the Bayview Opera House in San Francisco on Martin
Luther King Jr. Day on Monday.

Barbara laid out her vision for education in California and beyond — and
her historic run for U.S. Senate.

“There is no place for the profit motive in public education,” she said.
“Education is about enriching our young people. We can’t let corporations
and billionaires run our schools. It’s so important we elect progressives
at all levels of government to push back.”

Barbara was joined on stage by Our Revolution Executive Director Joseph
Geevarghese, CA Superintendent of Public Instruction Tony Thurmond, and
many local officials, educators, students, and parents active in the fight
for educational justice.

Special thanks to Our Revolution’s local chapter, San Francisco Education
Alliance for organizing this inspiring and successful event!

★ ★ ★

You can help elect Barbara Lee from anywhere in the country by making
calls as part of Our Revolution’s Phone Bank Team. It’s a lot of fun, but
this is serious business because we know what it would mean to get a
powerhouse like Barbara in the U.S. Senate!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/12528?t=1017&akid=5216%2E5885482%2Ea_9cUa ]PHONE BANK FOR BARBARA LEE

★ ★ ★

On Thursday, Bernie Sanders joined us for the [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/14158?t=1018&akid=5216%2E5885482%2Ea_9cUa ]Democracy is Not for Sale
Movement Call to discuss the critical need to overturn Citizens United —
this month marks 14 years since the disastrous Supreme Court ruling that
unleashed a flood of Big Money in politics.

“Corporations are not people and money is not speech,” Bernie said. “The
forces against us in the fight to overturn Citizens United are, by
definition, extremely wealthy and extremely powerful, but let me emphasize
that they are the 1% and we are the 99%.

“It’s time my colleagues in DC understand that our government and our
economy must work for all of us, not just the billionaire class,” he said.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/14159?t=1019&akid=5216%2E5885482%2Ea_9cUa ]Our movement has been crucial to engaging the 99% in politics to elect
progressives and mount pressure on politicians to represent us, not the
1%. Become a recurring monthly member of Our Revolution or give a one-time
donation today to empower our collective voice.

★ ★ ★

Last week, we took a deep dive into the filibuster and democracy with U.S.
Senator Jeff Merkley and U.S. Rep. Barbara Lee on Our Revolution’s LIVE
National Organize-to-Win Call.

Progressives are leading the fight for a government and an economy that
works for all of us — that means ending the racist relic of the filibuster
and delivering material change for people’s lives.

Merkley spoke to how the current Senate is broken, gridlocked, and a
threat to the foundations of our democracy. He explained how the minority
party can just declare a “no talk” filibuster requiring 60 votes to pass
nearly any bill, and have veto power over the majority’s agenda — all
behind closed doors.

“The filibuster is used by the powerful to block progress on every issue -
from democracy reforms to climate legislation,” Merkley said. “No matter
what aspect of the progressive movement you’re passionate about, we need
to push Congress to fix this.”

We were also joined by Mike Zamore, who served as Sen. Merkley’s chief of
staff from the beginning and co-authored their new book [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/14160?t=1020&akid=5216%2E5885482%2Ea_9cUa ]“Filibustered:
How to Fix the Broken Senate and Save America.”

“The filibuster is perfect for the Republicans, it’s ‘heads I win, tails
you lose,’” Zamore said. “We can’t build power when we’re hamstrung by the
filibuster. It’s not just policies that get blocked, it’s us and our power
and our ability to show that our vision of America is worth fighting for.”

Barbara Lee gave powerful insights into the institutional racism from
which the filibuster emerged — and how we must fight back.

“This is one of the fights we have to make if we’re going to defend our
democracy and our freedoms,” she told us. “I’ve said this for years — a
lot of people think it’s a law, but any rule that is established to
discriminate against African Americans has got to be awful.”

Rep. Lee said she intends to join Sen. Merkley in the Senate so they can
work together with our outside movement to fix the filibuster and deliver
policy that saves lives in America.

Don’t miss this final opportunity to get your signed copy of Sen.
Merkley’s and Mr. Zamore’s new book “Filibustered: How to Fix the Broken
Senate and Save America” — skip Amazon and buy it through Our Revolution
here to help support this movement!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/14160?t=1021&akid=5216%2E5885482%2Ea_9cUa ]LAST CHANCE TO GET YOUR SIGNED COPY HERE

★ ★ ★

Last weekend, Our Revolution played a major role in this year’s Reducing
the Threat of Nuclear War Conference — one of the nation’s most
significant gatherings of Nuclear Disarmament advocates, led by
Massachusetts Peace Action.

Joining the discussion with leading peace advocates from around the
country were U.S. Rep. Ro Khanna and Our Revolution Board Chair Larry
Cohen, who spoke to the need to defend and expand progressive
representation in Congress in order to advance an agenda for peace.

“We can’t just elect Democrats who support a bloated military budget,”
Larry said. “And, this isn’t just about a single issue, but the need for a
coalitional politics that stands for real change.”

As a member of Congress who has repeatedly voted against the Pentagon
budget, opposed new rounds of nukes, and more, Ro Khanna is an important
voice against militarism.

Ro worked with Bernie Sanders to pass the first War Powers resolution to
bring the war in Yemen to a close. During the call, he dug into the
details of why he is calling on President Biden to abide by the resolution
following dozens of American and UK strikes in Yemen last week.

“We can’t have a president of either party getting us involved in another
Middle East conflict,” Ro said. “I’ve spoken for Ceasefire for
humanitarian reasons: children are being killed, the possibility of
famine, the release of hostages.”

“But there are also regional reasons for deescalation,” he explained, “so
we don’t expand into Yemen and prevent a wider war in the Middle East. I
view this as an urgent task for members of Congress, particularly the
Congressional Progressive Caucus, to get us to a point of ceasefire in
Gaza.”

U.S. Rep. Barbara Lee has been on the forefront calling for a Ceasefire
and we all remember how she stood alone to vote against giving George W.
Bush unilateral power to go into war in Afghanistan and Iraq.

“Wherever I am or what platform I have, I’m going to fight for peace and
security for people no matter where they live — Gaza, Ukraine, and our own
communities,” Barbara told Our Revolution.

“I don’t believe in taking our resources and tax dollars to enrich arms
dealers that are scamming the system and creating war,” she said.

Check out this [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/12238?t=1022&akid=5216%2E5885482%2Ea_9cUa ]LA Times article on why Barbara is the Peace Candidate
in this race compared to her opponents, Katie Porter and Adam Schiff, then
sign up at the link below to help elect Barbara Lee to the U.S. Senate!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/12373?t=1023&akid=5216%2E5885482%2Ea_9cUa ]JOIN PROGRESSIVES FOR BARBARA LEE

★ ★ ★

★ ★ ★

Every seat matters. That’s why Our Revolution is gearing up NOW for 2024
to expand our organizational capacity and our voter turnout operation for
the crucial battles to come.

Not only must we defeat Donald Trump and the far right, but we have got to
take back the House, defeat enemies of progress like Kyrsten Sinema in the
Senate, and elect amazing progressives like Barbara Lee to turn this ship
around.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13109?t=1024&akid=5216%2E5885482%2Ea_9cUa ]If you can, please kick in a few bucks to help us staff up for the big
elections ahead in 2024 — there’s no time to waste!

★ ★ ★

We know what we’re fighting for, but we need to share the message far and
wide. Get your new Our Revolution T-shirt and advocate for our progressive
values everywhere you go!

We are proud to stand up for Education for All, Racial Justice,
Reproductive Rights, Medicare for All, Economic Justice, Labor Rights,
Housing for All, Environmental Justice, LGBT+ Rights, and so much more. In
short: JUSTICE FOR ALL.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8510?t=1025&akid=5216%2E5885482%2Ea_9cUa ]GET YOUR NEW SHIRT TODAY!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13011?source=revreport&amount=&t=1026&akid=5216%2E5885482%2Ea_9cUa ][IMG]

>From boots on the ground to the halls of Congress — we are building an
organized progressive movement at every level of government. If you’re
already a member of Our Revolution, THANK YOU! If you’re not yet an
official member, please consider signing up for a recurring monthly
donation today!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13011?source=revreport&amount=&t=1027&akid=5216%2E5885482%2Ea_9cUa ]PLEASE SUPPORT OUR REVOLUTION

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13011?source=revreport&amount=&t=1028&akid=5216%2E5885482%2Ea_9cUa ][IMG]

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13011?source=revreport&amount=&t=1029&akid=5216%2E5885482%2Ea_9cUa ]WHEN WE ORGANIZE, WE WIN!

★ ★ ★

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=5216%2E5885482%2Ea_9cUa ]Facebook | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1002&akid=5216%2E5885482%2Ea_9cUa ]Twitter | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1003&akid=5216%2E5885482%2Ea_9cUa ]Instagram | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2355?t=1004&akid=5216%2E5885482%2Ea_9cUa ]Youtube | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2356?t=1005&akid=5216%2E5885482%2Ea_9cUa ]Website |
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10247?t=1006&akid=5216%2E5885482%2Ea_9cUa ]Sign Up

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13120?c0=revreport.T4WXik&t=1008&akid=5216%2E5885482%2Ea_9cUa ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the
establishment by committing to a recurring donation of just $5 or more a
month!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13121?c0=revreport.Wps0N4&t=1009&akid=5216%2E5885482%2Ea_9cUa ]GIVE MONTHLY

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:

[ ]Click here to visit our website to learn more about this slate! In addition to growing progressive influence on the California Assembly and building a progressive majority on Sacramento City Council, we are endorsing 13 progressives running for important seats on the Democratic Party of Sacramento County Central Committee: District 1 - Andrés Ramos, David Lee Mandel, Mohammad “Mo” Kashmiri, Shirley Toy, Fatima Malik, and Tamika L’Ecluse District 2 - Justin “J.D.” Garcia District 3 - John D. Kincaid District 4 - Chris Yatooma District 5 - Lee “Marsha” Miller, Monica Madrid, Randa Allathkani, and Yassar Dahbour [ ]Help Our Revolution elect progressive champions in Sacramento County by donating here. ★ ★ ★ In San Francisco, a group funded by corporate billionaires has pledged to spend $850,000 in the Democratic County Central Committee Candidates race opposing our slate of diverse, progressive leaders: Assembly District 19 - Sandra Lee Fewer, Greg Hardeman, Natalie Gee, Connie Chan, Frances Hsieh, Gordon Mar, Leah LaCroix, Queena Chen, Hene Kelly, and Mano Raju Assembly District 17 - Sydney Simpson, John Avalos, Michael Nguyen, Jeremy Lee, Peter Gallotta, Anita Martinez, Jane Kim, Joshua Rudy Ochoa, Sal Rosselli, Gloria Berry, Vick Chung, Patrick Bell, Adolfo Velasquez, and Kristin Hardy These candidates have a real shot at winning and holding these seats and continuing to build a strong progressive bloc that gives our movement power and leverage to advance our progressive priorities against the political establishment. We need to continue our transformation of the California Democratic Party from the inside out. [ ]Click here for more info about this slate on our new web page! We are pleased to announce endorsements for Judges Michael Begert and Patrick Thompson of the San Francisco Superior Court. Rightwing forces are trying to push tough-on-crime judges, and we need to support fair, impartial judges and preserve the independence of the San Francisco judiciary. ★ ★ ★ AIPAC lobbyists are already preparing to spend more than $100 MILLION to try to unseat some of our strongest peace champions in Congress, including Pramila Jayapal, Rashida Tlaib, Ilhan Omar, Cori Bush, Summer Lee, and others. Progressives are under attack for demanding a Ceasefire and an end to the killing of thousands of Palestinian civilians and children — and we must have their back in 2024. [ ]Help fund Our Revolution’s voter outreach operation by pitching in any amount or committing to a recurring contribution. We must make sure our most powerful anti-war voices are not silenced by big money in 2024. ★ ★ ★ As we head into 2024, we’d love to hear from you about candidates our members are excited about! Email our political team at political@ourrevolution.com to nominate candidates for Our Revolution’s endorsement. ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ It was a packed house for Our Revolution’s Education for All Town Hall with Barbara Lee at the Bayview Opera House in San Francisco on Martin Luther King Jr. Day on Monday. Barbara laid out her vision for education in California and beyond — and her historic run for U.S. Senate. “There is no place for the profit motive in public education,” she said. “Education is about enriching our young people. We can’t let corporations and billionaires run our schools. It’s so important we elect progressives at all levels of government to push back.” Barbara was joined on stage by Our Revolution Executive Director Joseph Geevarghese, CA Superintendent of Public Instruction Tony Thurmond, and many local officials, educators, students, and parents active in the fight for educational justice. Special thanks to Our Revolution’s local chapter, San Francisco Education Alliance for organizing this inspiring and successful event! ★ ★ ★ You can help elect Barbara Lee from anywhere in the country by making calls as part of Our Revolution’s Phone Bank Team. It’s a lot of fun, but this is serious business because we know what it would mean to get a powerhouse like Barbara in the U.S. Senate! [ ]PHONE BANK FOR BARBARA LEE ★ ★ ★ On Thursday, Bernie Sanders joined us for the [ ]Democracy is Not for Sale Movement Call to discuss the critical need to overturn Citizens United — this month marks 14 years since the disastrous Supreme Court ruling that unleashed a flood of Big Money in politics. “Corporations are not people and money is not speech,” Bernie said. “The forces against us in the fight to overturn Citizens United are, by definition, extremely wealthy and extremely powerful, but let me emphasize that they are the 1% and we are the 99%. “It’s time my colleagues in DC understand that our government and our economy must work for all of us, not just the billionaire class,” he said. [ ]Our movement has been crucial to engaging the 99% in politics to elect progressives and mount pressure on politicians to represent us, not the 1%. Become a recurring monthly member of Our Revolution or give a one-time donation today to empower our collective voice. ★ ★ ★ Last week, we took a deep dive into the filibuster and democracy with U.S. Senator Jeff Merkley and U.S. Rep. Barbara Lee on Our Revolution’s LIVE National Organize-to-Win Call. Progressives are leading the fight for a government and an economy that works for all of us — that means ending the racist relic of the filibuster and delivering material change for people’s lives. Merkley spoke to how the current Senate is broken, gridlocked, and a threat to the foundations of our democracy. He explained how the minority party can just declare a “no talk” filibuster requiring 60 votes to pass nearly any bill, and have veto power over the majority’s agenda — all behind closed doors. “The filibuster is used by the powerful to block progress on every issue - from democracy reforms to climate legislation,” Merkley said. “No matter what aspect of the progressive movement you’re passionate about, we need to push Congress to fix this.” We were also joined by Mike Zamore, who served as Sen. Merkley’s chief of staff from the beginning and co-authored their new book [ ]“Filibustered: How to Fix the Broken Senate and Save America.” “The filibuster is perfect for the Republicans, it’s ‘heads I win, tails you lose,’” Zamore said. “We can’t build power when we’re hamstrung by the filibuster. It’s not just policies that get blocked, it’s us and our power and our ability to show that our vision of America is worth fighting for.” Barbara Lee gave powerful insights into the institutional racism from which the filibuster emerged — and how we must fight back. “This is one of the fights we have to make if we’re going to defend our democracy and our freedoms,” she told us. “I’ve said this for years — a lot of people think it’s a law, but any rule that is established to discriminate against African Americans has got to be awful.” Rep. Lee said she intends to join Sen. Merkley in the Senate so they can work together with our outside movement to fix the filibuster and deliver policy that saves lives in America. Don’t miss this final opportunity to get your signed copy of Sen. Merkley’s and Mr. Zamore’s new book “Filibustered: How to Fix the Broken Senate and Save America” — skip Amazon and buy it through Our Revolution here to help support this movement! [ ]LAST CHANCE TO GET YOUR SIGNED COPY HERE ★ ★ ★ Last weekend, Our Revolution played a major role in this year’s Reducing the Threat of Nuclear War Conference — one of the nation’s most significant gatherings of Nuclear Disarmament advocates, led by Massachusetts Peace Action. Joining the discussion with leading peace advocates from around the country were U.S. Rep. Ro Khanna and Our Revolution Board Chair Larry Cohen, who spoke to the need to defend and expand progressive representation in Congress in order to advance an agenda for peace. “We can’t just elect Democrats who support a bloated military budget,” Larry said. “And, this isn’t just about a single issue, but the need for a coalitional politics that stands for real change.” As a member of Congress who has repeatedly voted against the Pentagon budget, opposed new rounds of nukes, and more, Ro Khanna is an important voice against militarism. Ro worked with Bernie Sanders to pass the first War Powers resolution to bring the war in Yemen to a close. During the call, he dug into the details of why he is calling on President Biden to abide by the resolution following dozens of American and UK strikes in Yemen last week. “We can’t have a president of either party getting us involved in another Middle East conflict,” Ro said. “I’ve spoken for Ceasefire for humanitarian reasons: children are being killed, the possibility of famine, the release of hostages.” “But there are also regional reasons for deescalation,” he explained, “so we don’t expand into Yemen and prevent a wider war in the Middle East. I view this as an urgent task for members of Congress, particularly the Congressional Progressive Caucus, to get us to a point of ceasefire in Gaza.” U.S. Rep. Barbara Lee has been on the forefront calling for a Ceasefire and we all remember how she stood alone to vote against giving George W. Bush unilateral power to go into war in Afghanistan and Iraq. “Wherever I am or what platform I have, I’m going to fight for peace and security for people no matter where they live — Gaza, Ukraine, and our own communities,” Barbara told Our Revolution. “I don’t believe in taking our resources and tax dollars to enrich arms dealers that are scamming the system and creating war,” she said. Check out this [ ]LA Times article on why Barbara is the Peace Candidate in this race compared to her opponents, Katie Porter and Adam Schiff, then sign up at the link below to help elect Barbara Lee to the U.S. Senate! [ ]JOIN PROGRESSIVES FOR BARBARA LEE ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ Every seat matters. That’s why Our Revolution is gearing up NOW for 2024 to expand our organizational capacity and our voter turnout operation for the crucial battles to come. Not only must we defeat Donald Trump and the far right, but we have got to take back the House, defeat enemies of progress like Kyrsten Sinema in the Senate, and elect amazing progressives like Barbara Lee to turn this ship around. [ ]If you can, please kick in a few bucks to help us staff up for the big elections ahead in 2024 — there’s no time to waste! ★ ★ ★ We know what we’re fighting for, but we need to share the message far and wide. Get your new Our Revolution T-shirt and advocate for our progressive values everywhere you go! We are proud to stand up for Education for All, Racial Justice, Reproductive Rights, Medicare for All, Economic Justice, Labor Rights, Housing for All, Environmental Justice, LGBT+ Rights, and so much more. In short: JUSTICE FOR ALL. [ ]GET YOUR NEW SHIRT TODAY! ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] From boots on the ground to the halls of Congress — we are building an organized progressive movement at every level of government. If you’re already a member of Our Revolution, THANK YOU! If you’re not yet an official member, please consider signing up for a recurring monthly donation today! [ ]PLEASE SUPPORT OUR REVOLUTION ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] [ ]WHEN WE ORGANIZE, WE WIN! ★ ★ ★ [ ]Facebook | [ ]Twitter | [ ]Instagram | [ ]Youtube | [ ]Website | [ ]Sign Up [ ]Our membership swag Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive group in America. [ ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the establishment by committing to a recurring donation of just $5 or more a month! [ ]GIVE MONTHLY [ ]GIVE ONCE You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION PO Box 66208 WASHINGTON, DC, 20035 Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a 501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are made to support Our Revolution’s general mission and are not designated for any specific activity.

Peter – This week, I did something the far right _hates:_ held them accountable to their own words. Here’s what happened: The GOP has gone out of its way to attack immigrants. So I said, if they want to gut asylum and halt immigration so badly, they should just tear down the Statue of Liberty. I even drafted a bill to get them started (which seriously pissed them off 😂). **_Now, MAGA Republicans and Fox News pundits are attacking me for it:_** [ ](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/qOfE75qkLCUbcM4hGqoX8w~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRnjo8dP0TQaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL21hZi1lbS1wZ2U_cmVmY29kZT0yMDI0MDEyMF9lbV9mcl9iMV9mb3huZXdzYXR0YWNrc19lbiZhbW91bnQ9MjcmY2RtYz0yYkVGTTBwRzRQbEJtdGk4MVlMNklHTDdCbXMmcmVmY29kZTI9MmJFRk0wcEc0UGxCbXRpODFZTDZJR0w3Qm1zJnJlZmNvZGVjZG1jPTJiRUZNMHBHNFBsQm10aTgxWUw2SUdMN0Jtc1cDc3BjQgploh0KrGUjsasNUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAaQ~~) [**_They want these attacks to cost me my seat, so we need to come together to prove that we’ll never back down. Can I count on you to chip in now? >>_**](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/qOfE75qkLCUbcM4hGqoX8w~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRnjo8dP0TQaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL21hZi1lbS1wZ2U_cmVmY29kZT0yMDI0MDEyMF9lbV9mcl9iMV9mb3huZXdzYXR0YWNrc19lbiZhbW91bnQ9MjcmY2RtYz0yYkVGTTBwRzRQbEJtdGk4MVlMNklHTDdCbXMmcmVmY29kZTI9MmJFRk0wcEc0UGxCbXRpODFZTDZJR0w3Qm1zJnJlZmNvZGVjZG1jPTJiRUZNMHBHNFBsQm10aTgxWUw2SUdMN0Jtc1cDc3BjQgploh0KrGUjsasNUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAaQ~~) | [DEFEND MY SEAT - AND SHAME FOX NEWS >>](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/0HxXjp8ecF8iGteq1bMrCg~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRnjo8dP0TQaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL21hZi1lbS1wZ2U_cmVmY29kZT0yMDI0MDEyMF9lbV9mcl9iMV9mb3huZXdzYXR0YWNrc19lbiZhbW91bnQ9MTAmY2RtYz0yYkVGTTBwRzRQbEJtdGk4MVlMNklHTDdCbXMmcmVmY29kZTI9MmJFRk0wcEc0UGxCbXRpODFZTDZJR0w3Qm1zJnJlZmNvZGVjZG1jPTJiRUZNMHBHNFBsQm10aTgxWUw2SUdMN0Jtc1cDc3BjQgploh0KrGUjsasNUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAaQ~~)

Honestly, Peter, we saw this coming. I’m Fox News’ worst nightmare – an Afro-Latino, Gen Z organizer and child of Cuban immigrants.
But last time I checked, the Statue of Liberty says "send me your poor and helpless," not "I can't wait for mass deportations on day one." Either Republicans believe in the values this country was founded on, or they need to stop lying.
**I know we can’t count on them to stop. They’re relentless, because they know their attacks will lead to donations for my opponents and everyone who wants me out. But you can count on me.**
I ran on the hope that we can have elected officials who will stand up for our shared values and call out injustices. As long as I’m in Congress, I’ll always do that. **I just need your help to stay here, and it has to come now – before the next right-wing attack.**

_**"Let's put an end to Democrats representing conservative states in the U.S. Senate."** \- U.S. Senator Chuck Grassley_

Fellow Conservative,

It’s Senator Chuck Grassley reaching out because I need a favor.

**Former Navy SEAL Tim Sheehy is running against one of Chuck Schumer’s foot soldiers in the Senate who votes to deliver the Biden-Harris agenda of open borders and big government spending that fuels the fires of inflation. And Tim needs OUR HELP to win.**

You see, Jon Tester has successfully tricked the people of Montana into sending him to Washington on their behalf since 2006. How, I don’t know. Because his views are not at all in line with the views of voters in Montana – heck, he’d have a real easy time being elected in Oregon, California, or Massachusetts.

**Let’s put an end to Democrats representing conservative states in the U.S. Senate.** If you cannot read to the end of this note, please click this link to donate to defeat Jon Tester before closing your browser.

clean_body: Candidates like Tim only come around once in a blue moon. I know Tim is someone who I’d be honored to work with in Washington. | | "Let's put an end to Democrats representing conservative states in the U.S. Senate." \- U.S. Senator Chuck Grassley Fellow Conservative, It’s Senator Chuck Grassley reaching out because I need a favor. Former Navy SEAL Tim Sheehy is running against one of Chuck Schumer’s foot soldiers in the Senate who votes to deliver the Biden-Harris agenda of open borders and big government spending that fuels the fires of inflation. And Tim needs OUR HELP to win. You see, Jon Tester has successfully tricked the people of Montana into sending him to Washington on their behalf since 2006. How, I don’t know. Because his views are not at all in line with the views of voters in Montana – heck, he’d have a real easy time being elected in Oregon, California, or Massachusetts. Let’s put an end to Democrats representing conservative states in the U.S. Senate. If you cannot read to the end of this note, please click this link to donate to defeat Jon Tester before closing your browser. Republicans have failed to take him down in past elections because we’ve nominated candidates who couldn’t win the necessary votes to take down the incumbent despite coming close twice. After 16 years of tolerating Jon Tester, we Republicans have a real shot at ousting him next November thanks to Navy SEAL veteran Tim Sheehy who is running this go around. Tim is a very impressive candidate and I know he’d make a GREAT U.S. Senator. He needs our help, which is why I’m personally reaching out to ask you to get involved today. I’ll leave it up to you what you consider to be large, but please know that he’ll put your gift to the best possible use. Every dollar counts. Thank you, Sen. Chuck Grassley | " "I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL." | PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA Tim Sheehy is a former Navy SEAL. name: DC Daily Journal
subject: Never eat almonds, spinach and peanut butter (Here's why)
body:
Untitled Document

Please read the
following message from our sponsor.

If you've been led to believe
that peanut butter, almonds and spinach are good for you, today's
email might shock you and is important to read, because these 3
healthy foods could be contributing to health problems in your
body.

Let's take a quick look at why...

1. Peanut butter

While peanut butter does contain
a small amount of protein and vitamins/minerals, the cons
outweigh the pros on this food.

First of all, peanuts contain one
of the highest concentrations of aflatoxin, which is a mold toxin
that is created in peanuts due to storage in moist conditions.

Peanut butter is also very high
in inflammatory omega-6 fats and due to the processing of peanut
butter, those omega 6 fats are in a harmful oxidized state.

Most people already get too much
omega 6 fats from vegetable oils (soy, corn, canola, etc), and
this contributes to insulin resistance, heart disease, brain
inflammation, cancer, and lots more health problems, since most
people are currently eating 5-10x more omega-6 fats than we
should be eating in a healthy diet.

Lastly, peanut butter also
contains medium amounts of oxalates, which are plant-based
antinutrients that when consumed in excess can contribute to
kidney stones, thyroid and gut problems, joint problems and more.

We'll talk more about oxalates in
the next food...

2. Spinach

Spinach is promoted as a healthy
green, but contains FAR more downsides than good sides. Spinach
is one of the highest oxalate foods that's commonly eaten by
modern humans (in addition to beet greens, beets, almonds, and
other veggies and nuts).

The amount of oxalates in a
serving of spinach is extremely high, up to 600 mg in a normal
sized bowl.

The "safe" amount of oxalates in
a daily diet according to world renowned oxalate expert Sally
Norton should be between 100-200 mg per day total to avoid a lot
of the health problems caused by high oxalate plants.

So, you can see how concerning
spinach is with the extremely high oxalate levels.

As mentioned above, eating too
much oxalates too frequently can cause serious issues such as
kidney stones, thyroid problems, gut damage, skin issues, and
joint pain.

In fact, some people have even
gotten "oxalate poisoning" by eating green smoothies too often
and had to go to the ER for kidney failure.

3. Almonds

Although almonds and almond milk
are marketed as healthy, they also contain many downsides,
including all of the negatives mentioned above about too much
omega 6 fats and too much oxalates.

They're probably ok in your diet
occasionally, but I personally avoid eating almonds too often
because of these issues with excess oxalates and omega 6 fats.

Now let's take a look at a fun
little quiz below and a few more foods...

Bananas vs oranges vs apples...
(the #1 WORST fruit for your gut & energy)
According to the best-selling
author and world-renowned heart surgeon, Dr. Steven Gundry,
there's one fruit people over 40 should never eat.

This fruit can damage your gut
and disrupt your hormones. Both sapping you of energy and forcing
your body to create "sticky" fat cells that can NOT be "burned
off" with normal diet and exercise.

Do you know the fruit I'm talking
about? Make sure you do by clicking the one below you think it
is, and get the answer from Dr. Gundry himself on the next page:

>> Bananas

>> Oranges

>> Apples

>> Grapes

DCDailyJournal.com

525-K East Market Street # 114

City: Leesburg
State: Virginia
Zip Code: 20176

© Copyright DCDailyJournal.com All Rights
Reserved.

with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line.

body:
Ted Cruz needs to be held accountable for his insurrection supporting, democracy destroying actions.
Texas Democrats have a candidate who CAN BEAT HIM, and they need support from grassroots donors across the country to help reach the persuadable swing voters that will determine the election. Will you help defeat terrible Ted Cruz? Chip in $15 or any amount right away. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/therealtexas_2024?refcode=012024_1]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/therealtexas_2024?refcode=012024_1 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/therealtexas_2024?refcode=012024_1]
Peter, this is SHAMEFUL.
We knew Ted Cruz was pro-insurrection. Now we have proof.
In the recording, Cruz brags that he had talked 11 of his fellow Senators into OBJECTING to certification of the election.
The Fox anchor asks: “Is there any chance you can overturn this?”
Cruz responds: “I hope so.”
Ted Cruz is unfit to serve. He’s beatable in November, and we’re raising funds to support his opponent. Will you help? Chip in any amount now to help defeat Ted Cruz. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/therealtexas_2024?refcode=012024_1]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/therealtexas_2024?express_lane=true&refcode=012024_1&amount=5]

If we learned anything in 2020, it’s that our democracy is incredibly fragile.
If our shared values are going to be protected, we MUST ensure Ted Cruz is defeated next year. Please chip in $15 or any amount now to help kick Cruz to the curb. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/therealtexas_cruz2?refcode=122023_2]
Thank you,

name: Team DeSantis
subject: FWD: Biden can't keep ignoring this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
To view this email as a web page, go to the link below, or copy and paste it into your browser's address window.
https://view.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=b419bd352661f2e1a61c1ff51b3411447e193bb046d730736d0bb161d156ece8548aa292835b6196737bda0c51d40195257ead3cdde87c7973eeed711493b5db254b38f7486efdd4eb0a534a8d4c508e

Friend 🚨

Our team is missing your submission.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=27b8d876d419f2b3fb3d2656480824e3c6d0b5e3316912de6bdc007c01711254fbf4f40827f0a103064642f26c9a79bfa082d33f0d5d132d722ba49cee6250db
VOTE NOW

IS IT TIME TO SHUT OUR BORDER DOWN?

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=27b8d876d419f2b3920d173e7e9b8543eaa6f7d48ae07414fc97f929c57e60ca298b03121ff494d3739390a35463b338a2121e08586afc2eb34b49816287632f
⭕️ YES

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=27b8d876d419f2b382eb76991222c9cd5545ab315c4b515527c13af62bffa395da3915d10c8135513a5d3920125d958ed2bc1a82b72bf0510a1807214bae060b
⭕️ NO

--------Forwarded Message--------

From:
https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=27b8d876d419f2b3fb3d2656480824e3c6d0b5e3316912de6bdc007c01711254fbf4f40827f0a103064642f26c9a79bfa082d33f0d5d132d722ba49cee6250db
Team DeSantis

Subject: Biden can't keep ignoring this

Friend,

It's no secret that potential terrorists are coming across our southern border every day. We see it. The entire world sees it. Yet Joe Biden and the Left have continued to turn a blind eye to the crisis.

Not Ron DeSantis.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=27b8d876d419f2b3fb3d2656480824e3c6d0b5e3316912de6bdc007c01711254fbf4f40827f0a103064642f26c9a79bfa082d33f0d5d132d722ba49cee6250db

As our own streets overflow with protests and hate for our country, we believe the last thing we need is to welcome in more anti-American sentiment that paves the way for division, destruction, and decline.

If you agree, it's time to make our voices heard loud and clear. Please participate in our straw poll if you believe it's time to shut our border down.

VOTE:

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=27b8d876d419f2b3920d173e7e9b8543eaa6f7d48ae07414fc97f929c57e60ca298b03121ff494d3739390a35463b338a2121e08586afc2eb34b49816287632f
SHUT IT DOWN

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=27b8d876d419f2b382eb76991222c9cd5545ab315c4b515527c13af62bffa395da3915d10c8135513a5d3920125d958ed2bc1a82b72bf0510a1807214bae060b
LEAVE IT OPEN

There will be no room for discussion when Ron DeSantis is commander-in-chief. The American people will be put first. Our border will be closed off. If you agree with his plan, please submit your response today. We need our entire team to weigh in so the Left understands that we refuse to allow this to go on.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=27b8d876d419f2b3fb3d2656480824e3c6d0b5e3316912de6bdc007c01711254fbf4f40827f0a103064642f26c9a79bfa082d33f0d5d132d722ba49cee6250db
TAKE THE POLL

Thank you,

Team DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=27b8d876d419f2b3fb3d2656480824e3c6d0b5e3316912de6bdc007c01711254fbf4f40827f0a103064642f26c9a79bfa082d33f0d5d132d722ba49cee6250db

🚨 ATTENTION 🚨

Our grassroots team drives our every success, and we know we ask a lot of you to help us win this critical election. As this race continues to heat up, we will be relying on our supporters to help us go the distance, and we want to make sure we respect your preferences when we reach out to you. If you'd like to receive fewer emails from our team, please click
https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=27b8d876d419f2b35beefa032d2c1bcae0974858edfe9ae6f238b647725ea872a6016ee64c436b7676dda8383f1cd200cf4d0d6a50baae83636d8ff07d5615fd
here.

Volunteer!

We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for.

Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today!

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=27b8d876d419f2b320986507b31802fa03d9bb8aefa6017cca862ee57df1da90ce09651a2439869e82acb6dcbc9a8ad7203ae8b13a75ad7815dad7b985c35515

Get to Know Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=27b8d876d419f2b3fb3d2656480824e3c6d0b5e3316912de6bdc007c01711254fbf4f40827f0a103064642f26c9a79bfa082d33f0d5d132d722ba49cee6250db

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=27b8d876d419f2b3fb3d2656480824e3c6d0b5e3316912de6bdc007c01711254fbf4f40827f0a103064642f26c9a79bfa082d33f0d5d132d722ba49cee6250db

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now.

name: House Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: It’s all coordinated. And it’s all preplanned.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
My fellow Americans - this is Mike Johnson.

| |

---
| | | My fellow Americans - this is Mike Johnson.

_**[This is a longer email but I'm humbly asking you to read it start to finish.](http://links.gopstateallies.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=bb727b421be34a3fae6962c283b8cadc&_e=1HDgjHbIU38bxSsoAR_X14ACnwUK6ofbZDZXOJwSj1FBJxLaOW6vd5oGQRfIB8pXEfdyQ28div88QtMXMDMSWhPnyvEFLaN2x07jH0ndP-MUWIz4wjx7uYDamrKJYyM5YCH7I6-gC6Fr9c8fzItor5oMsNkZIfcBc_rX1Z4pOOWEe3voSyaKrdCUp5gzNV8UdB7C3_jc4vQEgSHN7z7Rwv0N6NrlDX4ZFKgUWujcxUwUBYcXgRq0ccUrLNL2BsUXwHNR4SNz8fNLUGV5vlB6eD2TObljFYS9H8HwqYCUnZ7vWuYRxnrMEavegGDnZzH53G7kNTHi_XZ9UjqzYGkzk8j0R3lBGpjT3i1rI7MpJ1mo0xF1hj1HyqsFzwN8kVrEgK5gh8l3Ut17eHx-kmwTZvY6V2Oa2F2N_vQGH6BGaww%3D "This is a longer email but I’m humbly asking you to read it start to finish.")**_

Why? Because the moment I was elected Speaker by my Republican colleagues, the Radical Left IMMEDIATELY unleashed a coordinated, preplanned political hit job against me.
* The Liberal Media spun up hit piece after hit piece to smear me in the press - Biden's former Press Secretary even attacked me for being a Christian on MSNBC.
* Politico fired off this headline: _" Democrats rev up the opposition machine against Mike Johnson."_
* And I can't even begin to tell you how many Democrat fundraising emails and texts I saw in the minutes following the final vote - I'm bracing myself for the next FEC reports.

Look:

These vicious attacks are a dime a dozen in Washington. They don't intimidate me. _But I 'll let you in on a little secret: that's not _really_ the goal..._

The _real_ goal of this political ambush is two-fold: **1)** smear the good names of every House Republican to hurt them electorally, and **2)** scare Liberals enough to whip out their credit cards, fill in their info, and donate to Democrats.

**It 's about power and money. Nothing else.**

That's why it's mission-critical that we stand up for ourselves in critical moments like this. _**[So as one of my first moves as Speaker, I'm teaming up with my fellow Louisianian - Majority Leader Steve Scalise - to set a goal of raising one million dollars between now and the end of the month.](http://links.gopstateallies.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=bb727b421be34a3fae6962c283b8cadc&_e=1HDgjHbIU38bxSsoAR_X14ACnwUK6ofbZDZXOJwSj1FBJxLaOW6vd5oGQRfIB8pXEfdyQ28div88QtMXMDMSWhPnyvEFLaN2x07jH0ndP-MUWIz4wjx7uYDamrKJYyM5YCH7I6-gC6Fr9c8fzItor5oMsNkZIfcBc_rX1Z4pOOWEe3voSyaKrdCUp5gzNV8UdB7C3_jc4vQEgSHN7z7Rwv0N6NrlDX4ZFKgUWujcxUwUBYcXgRq0ccUrLNL2BsUXwHNR4SNz8fNLUGV5vlB6eL_IG5M2YC0XDXjLbp7lfaN_-T8Lei5-eDe54DQmcHld89-a4k9DnrbD0nxp_ehFwZc2agMiO0FgEZO-QGMSNn4fKlkeNi5PLipug67eyM1sONey9t_bVdunWjFs9ABYT-ZLjZ-uAcsUCS0EfozJZ2U%3D "So as one of my first moves as Speaker, I’m teaming up with my fellow Louisianian – Majority Leader Steve Scalise – to set a goal of raising one million dollars between now and the end of the month.")**_

It's ambitious. I get it. But that's the bare minimum we need to fully fund our campaign operations in battleground races across the country.

**If we fall short of that, we 'll be forced to SLASH our voter contact budgets, GUT our digital outreach efforts, and pull our ads OFF THE AIRWAVES. Nothing could be worse for our plans to defend and expand our slim House Majority.**

So here's my final pitch to you:

We urgently need your help. Not next week, not in the new year - right here and right now.

The difference between a strong Conservative Majority and one controlled by the Liberal Machine will come down to can't-miss fundraising goals just like this.

Let me make myself perfectly clear:

_I 'm not asking you to pitch in more than you can afford. If you can spare $50 or $100, I would be tremendously grateful. But if you can only spare $5 or $10, I would be equally appreciative._

_**[The ONLY thing I ask is for every Conservative in the country to chip in SOMETHING.](http://links.gopstateallies.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=bb727b421be34a3fae6962c283b8cadc&_e=1HDgjHbIU38bxSsoAR_X14ACnwUK6ofbZDZXOJwSj1FBJxLaOW6vd5oGQRfIB8pXEfdyQ28div88QtMXMDMSWhPnyvEFLaN2x07jH0ndP-MUWIz4wjx7uYDamrKJYyM5YCH7I6-gC6Fr9c8fzItor5oMsNkZIfcBc_rX1Z4pOOWEe3voSyaKrdCUp5gzNV8UdB7C3_jc4vQEgSHN7z7Rwv0N6NrlDX4ZFKgUWujcxUwUBYcXgRq0ccUrLNL2BsUXwHNR4SNz8fNLUGV5vlB6eBLFaT88AD5V0_SMlP-9QOu04bsGIziR-NZbbM0-oLAOB04d-yE2IOfy1ehvlt65ZrJEJ9xi_sKw_dd2frfaqXCiLYwOAZSzcRCkrkPQgxAysIijEI-VLF8DJgShUZb6xaTaBCPgRFzdAfqY4wdJQDo%3D "The ONLY thing I ask is for every Conservative in the country to chip in SOMETHING.")**_

That will be the difference between victory and defeat. So what do you say? Can I count you in?

clean_body: My fellow Americans - this is Mike Johnson. | | | | | My fellow Americans - this is Mike Johnson. "This is a longer email but I’m humbly asking you to read it start to finish." Why? Because the moment I was elected Speaker by my Republican colleagues, the Radical Left IMMEDIATELY unleashed a coordinated, preplanned political hit job against me. The Liberal Media spun up hit piece after hit piece to smear me in the press - Biden's former Press Secretary even attacked me for being a Christian on MSNBC. Politico fired off this headline: " Democrats rev up the opposition machine against Mike Johnson." And I can't even begin to tell you how many Democrat fundraising emails and texts I saw in the minutes following the final vote - I'm bracing myself for the next FEC reports. Look: These vicious attacks are a dime a dozen in Washington. They don't intimidate me. But I 'll let you in on a little secret: that's not really the goal... The real goal of this political ambush is two-fold: 1) smear the good names of every House Republican to hurt them electorally, and 2) scare Liberals enough to whip out their credit cards, fill in their info, and donate to Democrats. It 's about power and money. Nothing else. That's why it's mission-critical that we stand up for ourselves in critical moments like this. "So as one of my first moves as Speaker, I’m teaming up with my fellow Louisianian – Majority Leader Steve Scalise – to set a goal of raising one million dollars between now and the end of the month." It's ambitious. I get it. But that's the bare minimum we need to fully fund our campaign operations in battleground races across the country. If we fall short of that, we 'll be forced to SLASH our voter contact budgets, GUT our digital outreach efforts, and pull our ads OFF THE AIRWAVES. Nothing could be worse for our plans to defend and expand our slim House Majority. So here's my final pitch to you: We urgently need your help. Not next week, not in the new year - right here and right now. The difference between a strong Conservative Majority and one controlled by the Liberal Machine will come down to can't-miss fundraising goals just like this. Let me make myself perfectly clear: I 'm not asking you to pitch in more than you can afford. If you can spare $50 or $100, I would be tremendously grateful. But if you can only spare $5 or $10, I would be equally appreciative. "The ONLY thing I ask is for every Conservative in the country to chip in SOMETHING." That will be the difference between victory and defeat. So what do you say? Can I count you in? Thanks for all you do. In liberty, Speaker Mike Johnson | "Speaker Mike Johnson" | | | "Please take my Majority Leader Survey!" This is Steve Scalise. As your Majority Leader, I'm respectfully asking you to fill out my "MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY" at your earliest convenience. It's important. I want to have your goals, your concerns, and your priorities in mind before I do anything else. name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: Believe me
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| I’m so grateful for your commitment to this campaign.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=1881%2E35263%2EZpK5ri)
Peter — In a moment, [**I'm going to ask you to chip in to my campaign.**](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3587?c0=tbe-em-jan24.9rGJ2t&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240120_AM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=1881%2E35263%2EZpK5ri) But first, let me explain why your support makes such a difference for our campaign. Your support, whether it's through donations, signing petitions, or simply opening emails like this one, makes a profound statement about the strength of our team — a team that will need to be stronger and more engaged than ever to protect Wisconsin’s Senate seat. Eric Hovde is preparing to jump into our race, and he’s committed to spend at least $20 million of his own personal fortune to flip this seat red. And with Republicans only one seat away from securing a majority in the Senate, we cannot afford to lose this race. Believe me, I get it: These emails can be a bit pesky at times. But the truth is, the response from emails just like this one makes a huge difference for our grassroots-powered campaign. If we’re going to protect this seat (_and the Senate majority!_) from a self-funder with a virtually unlimited war chest, it’s going to take ALL of us to fight back. That’s why I’m humbly asking you to make a difference today: [**Peter, will you help me protect this seat and our Senate majority with a donation today? The stakes in this race couldn’t be higher, so I’d really appreciate anything you can spare today.**](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3587?c0=tbe-em-jan24.9rGJ2t&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240120_AM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=1881%2E35263%2EZpK5ri) _Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue._ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3604?c0=tbe-em-jan24.7tZQlC&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240120_AM1_V1_S1&t=6&akid=1881%2E35263%2EZpK5ri)

subject: re: yard signs
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77427308/450404522/-46109959?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NzhhMjA1My1jNmI3LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Pi7USJJsyCWrpVBZomxw7lJijNbkpOY5vOyIevDZIxk=)
Peter,

There are less than 50 days until our primary Election Day, and less than 3 weeks until ballots are mailed to voters in CA-27.

The countdown is on, and with time running out, we’re increasing our efforts to win our primary and move on to ultimately defeat MAGA Mike Garcia.

**One critical way to improve our name recognition is through yard signs:**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77427309/450404523/-46109959?refcode=em-1.20.24-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NzhhMjA1My1jNmI3LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Pi7USJJsyCWrpVBZomxw7lJijNbkpOY5vOyIevDZIxk=)
**[I’m laser-focused on engaging with our CA-27 community ahead of our must-win primary. But I can’t be everywhere at once – which is why funding our yard sign campaign is so important. Will you chip in $3 toward our $15,000 goal to blanket the district in yard signs?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77427310/450404524/-46109959?refcode=em-1.20.24-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NzhhMjA1My1jNmI3LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Pi7USJJsyCWrpVBZomxw7lJijNbkpOY5vOyIevDZIxk=)**
| ****[Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77427311/450404525/-46109959?refcode=em-1.20.24-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NzhhMjA1My1jNmI3LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Pi7USJJsyCWrpVBZomxw7lJijNbkpOY5vOyIevDZIxk=)****
---

Like our billboards on the highways, yard signs have the potential to reach thousands of undecided voters.

Increasing my name recognition and getting people excited about our people-powered campaign is critical to our success.

**Here’s why it matters: Mike Garcia is failing CA-27. His recent votes for a national abortion ban and against protecting our health care prove how extreme he has become.**

That’s why we need to win this race and prove to Garcia that our communities deserve better.

**[Any amount – whether it’s $1 or $25 or even $100 – helps our team put up more yard signs and get more voters on our side. Will you chip in $3 or any amount toward our $15,000 yard sign fund today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77427312/450404526/-46109959?refcode=em-1.20.24-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NzhhMjA1My1jNmI3LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Pi7USJJsyCWrpVBZomxw7lJijNbkpOY5vOyIevDZIxk=)**

Friend, the Democrats have a bridge to sell you. They want you to believe that the deal they’re offering to the American people is a “compromise.” **_[Schumer wants you to sign off on:](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=8909a96b828047818c4ed0dc489a2739&_e=Uv2oLB-hIcw3dalYlrUB_DDt8UjF3gwWpSMi0tuyUxEmD9uTh3VHuPZf-L28MmPgiKDJ_gOXSw8b3623iGbA999h32aXh5P11iEyH-lr6wG_oee5i0yIEW82H7DMsKkVQVJDC1hSpwycxy1-LbcOftQyZOglkKnMGGSpnsl-1-J-QqDLUcC6R6nG7Y0vNqvClLbrX05nDY3J_adzC3zOAPHVOmp0K2RFqcJb3aTwEjeQk-CXtPuzX-JflMW7L_V8Pamh3hCUDweQfd9LC2r3kMf0NJ_J88wF2gX15Tim8iamENU_awrIOvz_c_TghZzLLxy90eZ2iqxLb2716O7j9exjvpzPX20FSeudYmwxsR3mI74gfcQEQkHQi4w2msk_Gj_VRyWJsxCIyF1eRlGMbAeTtJlFwb63XVA1mlh6FmY%3D)_**

\- 150,000 illegal immigrants entering the country uninhibited per month. (That’s nearly the population of my hometown in Louisiana) \- Work permits for EVERY illegal alien who’s been released into the country **_\- And they want YOU to pay for their legal fees._** My answer is NO. Absolutely NOT. Friend, Democrats have become the Party of open borders lawlessness and I need your help to stop them. **[This is the hill I’ll die on. ](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=8909a96b828047818c4ed0dc489a2739&_e=Uv2oLB-hIcw3dalYlrUB_DDt8UjF3gwWpSMi0tuyUxEmD9uTh3VHuPZf-L28MmPgiKDJ_gOXSw8b3623iGbA999h32aXh5P11iEyH-lr6wG_oee5i0yIEW82H7DMsKkVQVJDC1hSpwycxy1-LbcOftQyZOglkKnMGGSpnsl-1-J-QqDLUcC6R6nG7Y0vNqvClLbrX05nDY3J_adzC3zOAPHVOmp0K2RFqcJb3aTwEjeQk-CXtPuzX-JflMW7L_V8lGJGnEwmS4Y_k8v7kxg9t2u7fAnp-Y57G2ukrxkHqG9frEIt9jKYGGBCgMBlgUATP1WvPPlZ-CcjdQcJr1jL2ttGgxMLlukwd2ag0ub9jqNhIaqmqurw5L8bIUclaaqDpCu6tNhZ6AhHjJ8uQwZP-Ydrbp5pprTsw48DaIfd8tM%3D)** **Will you step up to help me and House Republicans end the Biden Border Crisis today?** Let me put this in the clearest terms possible: Since the day Joe Biden took office, he’s been blatantly ignoring federal law. _In 2006, Republicans passed a law that directed the President and the executive branch to build the border wall._ **Every Democrat President since has done everything in their power to IGNORE the law. ** I’ve said it before and I’ll say it again. If Joe Biden would just get out of our way, we could end the Biden Border Crisis tomorrow. **_My promise to you is that I’ll do everything in my power to ensure that Democrats respect the rule of law and fight to ensure that our border is strong._** But I need your help to ensure that after this election REPUBLICANS are in the driver’s seat. **[**Would you chip in $15, $20, or $25 today to take back control of our border?**](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=8909a96b828047818c4ed0dc489a2739&_e=Uv2oLB-hIcw3dalYlrUB_DDt8UjF3gwWpSMi0tuyUxEmD9uTh3VHuPZf-L28MmPgiKDJ_gOXSw8b3623iGbA999h32aXh5P11iEyH-lr6wG_oee5i0yIEW82H7DMsKkVQVJDC1hSpwycxy1-LbcOftQyZOglkKnMGGSpnsl-1-J-QqDLUcC6R6nG7Y0vNqvClLbrX05nDY3J_adzC3zOAPHVOmp0K2RFqcJb3aTwEjeQk-CXtPuzX-JflMW7L_V88UzP-83f1x1apBKEt1DeVarIUzDoxwq5k3ZtFaLa7T0SjuSbbaP6_dJ9DvsJKHgPcMNCJYdsCYuoq_v-wrUY3Lv0CYJ-JbknU_T0K6g1FSlNTgjOy368YMYYGoSops7NdqfI46SIN7Bp64kVtFCmHSNSg-TZvAyFp5l57ti4UxA%3D)**
---
[**END THE BIDEN BORDER CRISIS**](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=8909a96b828047818c4ed0dc489a2739&_e=Uv2oLB-hIcw3dalYlrUB_DDt8UjF3gwWpSMi0tuyUxEmD9uTh3VHuPZf-L28MmPgiKDJ_gOXSw8b3623iGbA999h32aXh5P11iEyH-lr6wG_oee5i0yIEW82H7DMsKkVQVJDC1hSpwycxy1-LbcOftQyZOglkKnMGGSpnsl-1-J-QqDLUcC6R6nG7Y0vNqvClLbrX05nDY3J_adzC3zOAPHVOmp0K2RFqcJb3aTwEjeQk-CXtPuzX-JflMW7L_V8Yk2KOeYEl6Zg3b8sY0VMegyFyNBk8U_2Jlhg1b8-xH9tAeTuEnjjBtBIw7N5EoVmbrt5i1-QoSMphw9JgiIwd8Yi0uWz2F2Jsr1SHExEn2nNOfRj6rnSFwB-tHwXuhHe3sr9M3a0PYlm0Ecsm0iMr-JEBQGnJ3Hz7t_ap6nTe9k%3D)

Thank you in advance for your support.

Sincerely,

name: American Update
subject: ‘I Don’t Believe Them’: Jim Clyburn Tries To Hastily Downplay Polls Showing Black Americans Deserting Biden
body:
And Leader Of Harvard Antisemitism Task Force Signed On To Letter Branding Israel As ‘Regime Of Apartheid’

https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c681924%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=7AY%2bhka4moW7%2bh6JizIuZw&sysid=1 ‘I Don’t Believe Them’: Jim Clyburn Tries To Hastily Downplay Polls Showing Black Americans Deserting Biden

Democratic Rep. James Clyburn of South Carolina dismissed polls showing President Joe Biden losing support among black voters Friday. Multiple polls have pointed to Biden’s declining popularity among the black electorate, signaling a shift from 2020 where he received 92% of the vote. Clyburn pushed back when GMA3 co-host Eva Pilgrim mentioned the apparent drop in support. “I’m concerned when I see this,” Clyburn told Pilgrim.

name: Team Swalwell
subject: No lost causes — only lost opportunities
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Swalwell For Congress
body:
Sharing a very special thank you from the leading activist to get abortion access on Florida’s ballots this November. |
---
_Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District. _
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77427857/450406194/-1194906751?refcode=headerfooter-header&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NmM4NGNjZi1jNmI3LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OtZcPP_CEzk5h9NHs8_Upwqro1QcGTMHHs62DQfASu4=)
Friends, so often, Washington politicians advocate for change in their own districts while neglecting the areas across the nation that also need our help. But if you know Eric, you know there’s no such thing as a lost cause — _only lost opportunities._ **That’s why we’re incredibly proud to share this video from Anna Hochkammer, the Executive director of the Florida Women’s Freedom Coalition — because of Eric’s support, their team is poised to get abortion access on Florida ballots this November![Take a second to watch her thank you video, then consider chipping in so Eric can keep fighting the good fight here »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77427858/450406195/-1652979995?refcode=E6043-20240120-FLAbortion-SL-AbortionReproRights&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NmM4NGNjZi1jNmI3LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OtZcPP_CEzk5h9NHs8_Upwqro1QcGTMHHs62DQfASu4=)** **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77427859/450406196/-1652979995?refcode=E6043-20240120-FLAbortion-Image-AbortionReproRights&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NmM4NGNjZi1jNmI3LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OtZcPP_CEzk5h9NHs8_Upwqro1QcGTMHHs62DQfASu4=)** Friend, because of YOUR donations, Eric’s been able to work behind the scenes for the last 6 months fighting to ensure Florida, like California, can be a place where everyone can live with dignity and autonomy. **[Eric’s campaign isn’t just about fighting for progress in his own backyard — it’s about enacting lasting change throughout our entire country. | Hi, here’s what I want to make sure everyone understands now that we’re in the election year.

Our freedoms are at stake with the next election. Our opponents have made it clear that they will support those plans to undercut reproductive health care access, despite the clear will of Kansas voters.

If we want to protect abortion rights, we don’t have any time to waste—this is go-time.

Our team has a deadline of midnight to get another 100 Founding Election Year Members on our team. Will you stand with me and join up today?

clean_body: | Hi, here’s what I want to make sure everyone understands now that we’re in the election year. Our freedoms are at stake with the next election. Our opponents have made it clear that they will support those plans to undercut reproductive health care access, despite the clear will of Kansas voters. If we want to protect abortion rights, we don’t have any time to waste—this is go-time. Our team has a deadline of midnight to get another 100 Founding Election Year Members on our team. Will you stand with me and join up today? = Thanks, Sharice * | = | Click here to from Sharice Davids' email list. name: Rush for Congress
subject: Why Your Small Donation Matters:
body:
Why Your Small Donation Matters:

| | | [ ](https://rush.nationbuilder.com/donate?e=e968aee815e99eb2794c5f162255fab5&utm_source=rush&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=small_donation&n=1&v=41)
---
Dear Friend I hope this message finds you well. Today, I'm reaching out with an invitation to be a part of a movement that aims to bring positive change to NJ-2. Why Your Small Donation Matters:
* Community Impact: Your small donation of $10, $25, $50, or $100 directly impacts our ability to engage with the community, spread our message, and work towards a brighter future for NJ-2.
* Accessible Advocacy: We believe in making advocacy accessible to everyone. Your contribution, no matter the size, helps build a diverse and inclusive movement that truly represents the voices of our district.
* Investing in Change: Your donation is an investment in the change we aspire to bring to NJ-2. It supports our campaign initiatives, allowing us to connect with voters, share our vision, and work towards a representation that puts the community first.

Donate Today: [Contribution Link] How Your Donation Breaks Down:
* $10: Covers outreach materials to inform more voters about our cause.
* $25: Supports our online presence, spreading awareness through social media.
* $50: Contributes to campaign events that bring our message to the community.
* $100: Powers targeted outreach initiatives to engage voters on key issues.

Spread the Word: Beyond your generous contribution, you can further support our cause by sharing this email with friends, family, and fellow advocates. Together, we can create a groundswell of support for positive change in NJ-2. Donate Now to Shape NJ-2's Future :[Donate](https://rush.nationbuilder.com/donate?e=e968aee815e99eb2794c5f162255fab5&utm_source=rush&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=small_donation&n=2&v=41) Thank you for considering being a part of this movement. Your support, regardless of the amount, is instrumental in building a better future for NJ-2. Best regards, Carolyn Rush
---
| [](https://rush.nationbuilder.com/donate?e=e968aee815e99eb2794c5f162255fab5&utm_source=rush&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=small_donation&n=3&v=41 "DONATE") [DONATE](https://rush.nationbuilder.com/donate?e=e968aee815e99eb2794c5f162255fab5&utm_source=rush&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=small_donation&n=3&v=41)
---

Your contribution, no matter the size, helps build a diverse and inclusive movement that truly represents the voices of our district. Investing in Change: Your donation is an investment in the change we aspire to bring to NJ-2. It supports our campaign initiatives, allowing us to connect with voters, share our vision, and work towards a representation that puts the community first. Donate Today: [Contribution Link] How Your Donation Breaks Down: $10: Covers outreach materials to inform more voters about our cause. $25: Supports our online presence, spreading awareness through social media. $50: Contributes to campaign events that bring our message to the community. $100: Powers targeted outreach initiatives to engage voters on key issues. Spread the Word: Beyond your generous contribution, you can further support our cause by sharing this email with friends, family, and fellow advocates. Together, we can create a groundswell of support for positive change in NJ-2. Donate Now to Shape NJ-2's Future : Thank you for considering being a part of this movement. Your support, regardless of the amount, is instrumental in building a better future for NJ-2. Best regards, Carolyn Rush | "DONATE" Rush for Congress · NJ 08243, United States

Peter, This Republican-led Congress is the most dysfunctional Congress in decades. In its first year, it passed less than half as many laws as its predecessors as the Republican infighting continues. It’s no wonder that four Indiana Republicans won’t seek reelection, including Greg Pence, Victoria Spartz, and Larry Buschon. **[2024 will be the first election in over 20 years without a Pence on the ballot. This is our chance to take Indiana in a new direction that ends the harm that Pence-style politics has had on our state.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77429898/450409546/405560545?refcode=240120Retire&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMDNjMGY3Mi1jOWI3LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sgfbol-KaMdQH4UUk8v-3XkcS0uUw-vBiUHUXfP9rBE=)** Hoosiers deserve a Congressional delegation that’s focused on the kitchen-table issues that impact everyday life, from lowering costs, giving every kid a world-class education, and creating more healthcare and childcare options for folks. **[With your help, we can elect new Democratic leaders who will make the next 20 years better than the last. > _Join me, Todd Watson - NEGOP Political Director as I host a series of interviews with Republican elected officials, 2024 candidates, coalition organizers, and leaders from across Nebraska. > This is where I ask the hard questions to bring you truth in Nebraska politics. This is where 2024 candidates can have an opportunity to voice their values outside of the liberal media "gotcha" ugliness.

clean_body: A brand-new poll | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | I'll cut right to it, Peter: A brand-new poll shows us just 2 points behind Ted Cruz — a statistical TIE! This comes after Inside Elections upgraded Texas from a "solid Republican" seat to a "Battleground," and CNN called Ted Cruz the most vulnerable Republican in the country! It couldn't be more clear, Peter, — we can win this race. But now, Republican extremists are ready to spend millions to prop up Ted Cruz. They know just how vulnerable Cruz is, and they'll spare no expense to keep him in the Senate. That's why we set a critical goal to raise $100,000 tonight: | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and split between Colin Allred and The Collective PAC. | | | | | | I know we can win this thing, fire Ted Cruz, and give Texans the leadership we deserve. Thank you. name: Live Petition
subject: Sign on to support abortion rights!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
Your signature is needed on our official Democratic petition...
| | | **ALERT: This week would've marked over 50 years of _Roe v. Wade._**

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/17203?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20240120-LivePetition-RoeAnniversaryFTNPetition-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20240120-LivePetition-RoeAnniversaryFTNPetition-ETG-sl1&akid=13269%2E9716520%2EFgazle)
[**We need _every Democrat_ to take a stand now: Sign our emergency petition to support abortion rights!**](https://go.dscc.org/go/17203?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20240120-LivePetition-RoeAnniversaryFTNPetition-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20240120-LivePetition-RoeAnniversaryFTNPetition-ETG-sl1&akid=13269%2E9716520%2EFgazle)

| | [Add My Name](https://go.dscc.org/go/17203?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20240120-LivePetition-RoeAnniversaryFTNPetition-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20240120-LivePetition-RoeAnniversaryFTNPetition-ETG-sl1&akid=13269%2E9716520%2EFgazle)
---

**FIRST:** 51 years ago Monday, the Supreme Court decided _Roe v. Wade_ and PROTECTED the right to abortion nationwide.

**THEN:** After decades of safe, legal abortion, Trump's ultra-conservative Supreme Court OVERTURNED _Roe_ \-- stripping reproductive rights away from _millions_ of Americans overnight!

**NOW:** We’ve organized a massive petition to PROVE that Americans are ready to fight for our reproductive freedom -- _but we're missing your response!_

[**We still need 25,000 signatures before _Roe_ 's 51st anniversary -- so please: Sign the petition to support abortion rights!**](https://go.dscc.org/go/17203?ask=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20240120-LivePetition-RoeAnniversaryFTNPetition-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20240120-LivePetition-RoeAnniversaryFTNPetition-ETG-sl1&akid=13269%2E9716520%2EFgazle)

| [Add My Name](https://go.dscc.org/go/17203?ask=5&t=9&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20240120-LivePetition-RoeAnniversaryFTNPetition-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20240120-LivePetition-RoeAnniversaryFTNPetition-ETG-sl1&akid=13269%2E9716520%2EFgazle)

Thank you,

Team DSCC

name: Mike Rogers
subject: No gimmicks, no lies, no exaggerations.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rogers for Senate
body:
Just God’s honest truth.| | |
---
[](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=12be9db236264bbeb9999916d66ab8a4&_e=_LLaVAv1fV1fWMH4wNaRqsLqAYIQ4elDF10debRq2N7eifvGtJowpHo95wPdcS6oqQHdZwHSGLkBXUQircy-xmpXlj9CvfrXBNfqajEX-H0_HLpcnWvTm5fOMVxeDLDnnYGeW6hSvu3qtFXIwm2X3N1YT9loqAWU6ZneeuAD3vKHho_nKuDo5rWfQYjxz22wkhZQSEu3wZ6X2nlJIRhXs5Skw9w1eJ_UDAoArhPs6QhohHgP4Y9rLoaPnloWZE-G7Da48-T6eZqT_sZFuy4vOanJGywnbAm0LXeLichLY2KqWleNcVOUFgytIXKbWUgWrSFZ55nDtaJbZR5TSIN37Jrak28lP_fjLgFn5i1GXyODTonqxkg6nYzPtM6sZbnC6WBRzU0JU7_IvuSpdIo3n3oRB2BdzIIWsFMbEDUBi30%3D)
