I'm going to be honest with you, Friend. Your donation isn't going to be matched a thousand times. It’s not going to bring about world peace.

It’s not going to get you into the drawing for a brand new car. **[But it just might help us flip the Senate for Republicans and reverse our country’s decline.](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=12be9db236264bbeb9999916d66ab8a4&_e=_LLaVAv1fV1fWMH4wNaRqsLqAYIQ4elDF10debRq2N7eifvGtJowpHo95wPdcS6oqQHdZwHSGLkBXUQircy-xmpXlj9CvfrXBNfqajEX-H0_HLpcnWvTm5fOMVxeDLDnnYGeW6hSvu3qtFXIwm2X3N1YT9loqAWU6ZneeuAD3vKHho_nKuDo5rWfQYjxz22wkhZQSEu3wZ6X2nlJIRhXs5Skw9w1eJ_UDAoArhPs6QhohHgP4Y9rLoaPnloWZE-G7Da48-T6eZqT_sZFuy4vOQVtampeGr3c5Jh8RZZPBbxqHjpn0N5l3soVzp1HbEuPJ5PHsamducVT7cF4pduGWhb4rb8L7CB58CxTEnXkdpVq74xKUWZ9zi68NOMSJTRXXgesoa5yVkl5HYxHDPEFHCDSJAoQsgkejoONHz1LatI%3D)**
---
[**CHIP IN TO FLIP THE SENATE**](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=12be9db236264bbeb9999916d66ab8a4&_e=_LLaVAv1fV1fWMH4wNaRqsLqAYIQ4elDF10debRq2N7eifvGtJowpHo95wPdcS6oqQHdZwHSGLkBXUQircy-xmpXlj9CvfrXBNfqajEX-H0_HLpcnWvTm5fOMVxeDLDnnYGeW6hSvu3qtFXIwm2X3N1YT9loqAWU6ZneeuAD3vKHho_nKuDo5rWfQYjxz22wkhZQSEu3wZ6X2nlJIRhXs5Skw9w1eJ_UDAoArhPs6QhohHgP4Y9rLoaPnloWZE-G7Da48-T6eZqT_sZFuy4vOYFppI8s7eGBoCCXt0EUW6xduQB7eQMj6Dhw7kGD16oc32wBk2DKa0GQUefQNaIr88PZdrJxiaU4hvYTPKRez_bqgFCnjgTRlZLF4FZiTceLkrSIUgIl__Bytm7JjpxM5hwMWkVgYiF25qjHtQXw1YI%3D)
---
This is U.S. Senate candidate Mike Rogers. Your inbox is probably filled with gimmicks, promises, and exaggerations – _I know that mine is_ – from politicians trying to get your attention and support. **I’m not going to do any of that. I won’t scream, shout, or promise you things that I can’t deliver on.** You see, Friend,** ** I’ve always believed that being honest, working hard, and earning people’s trust is far more important than silly little attention-grabbing gimmicks.** ** So here’s the straight truth:** ** My home state of Michigan is going to be one of the most competitive Senate races in the entire country – if not _THE_ most competitive.** ** A recent poll showed me neck and neck with my far-left opponent, but she’s outraised me by a country mile. **_Over the past four presidential cycles, the party that wins Michigan wins not only control of the Senate, but also the White House._** Friend, your donation won't produce supernatural miracles... **[But it WILL be used to help spread my message, mobilize voters, and flip the Senate into Republican hands._And that’s God’s honest truth._](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=12be9db236264bbeb9999916d66ab8a4&_e=_LLaVAv1fV1fWMH4wNaRqsLqAYIQ4elDF10debRq2N7eifvGtJowpHo95wPdcS6oqQHdZwHSGLkBXUQircy-xmpXlj9CvfrXBNfqajEX-H0_HLpcnWvTm5fOMVxeDLDnnYGeW6hSvu3qtFXIwm2X3N1YT9loqAWU6ZneeuAD3vKHho_nKuDo5rWfQYjxz22wkhZQSEu3wZ6X2nlJIRhXs5Skw9w1eJ_UDAoArhPs6QhohHgP4Y9rLoaPnloWZE-G7Da48-T6eZqT_sZFuy4vOQUwgraTrGJKuS4gO7ve4ODMRL3Ui_lvuGHcKpKCHfSUFBHkUQpdCjt09pHvO7Zm07gbA918RUC0aHIJ4baqssjOdqvXGnELLn6H4y9wU202jcoZJ4LnX9bY2mwnYej-mVRd3x77cNC1SC63RJHQb5U%3D)** clean_body: Just God’s honest truth.| | | I'm going to be honest with you, Friend. Your donation isn't going to be matched a thousand times. It’s not going to bring about world peace. It’s not going to get you into the drawing for a brand new car. This is U.S. Senate candidate Mike Rogers. Your inbox is probably filled with gimmicks, promises, and exaggerations – I know that mine is – from politicians trying to get your attention and support. I’m not going to do any of that. I won’t scream, shout, or promise you things that I can’t deliver on. You see, Friend, I’ve always believed that being honest, working hard, and earning people’s trust is far more important than silly little attention-grabbing gimmicks. So here’s the straight truth: My home state of Michigan is going to be one of the most competitive Senate races in the entire country – if not THE most competitive. A recent poll showed me neck and neck with my far-left opponent, but she’s outraised me by a country mile. Over the past four presidential cycles, the party that wins Michigan wins not only control of the Senate, but also the White House. Friend, your donation won't produce supernatural miracles... So, Friend, to help me win this extremely competitive Senate election? I told you I don’t make promises that I can’t follow through on. Here’s a promise I WILL follow through on – when I’m elected I’ll give the American people everything I have. I’ll fight for freedom, to protect our constitution, and to restore integrity to our government while dismantling Biden’s big-goverment. We’ve got a lot at stake this year. I hope I can count on your help. Sincerely, Mike Rogers Paid for by Rogers for Senate.

I never thought I'd have running water, let alone be running for Congress.

My name is Mazi Melesa Pilip, but you can call me Mazi for short!

I'm the Republican nominee running in the New York special election that was just declared.

If you don't already know- this is the one & only seat we absolutely have to win to defend the House Majority.

I'm a black, Jewish woman & I'm not afraid to tell you that I am 100% Pro-Law Enforcement, Pro-Border security, and Pro-Family.

Democrats & the liberal media have spent years saying the GOP will never support someone of my ethnicity & my creed.

They say women like me don't exist & that we can't be any of those things.

And now they're spending millions to bury me in negative headlines, hit pieces, and TV commercials.

They take great pleasure in laying waste to minority women who don't fall in line with their sacred narrative.

And without your help today- I'm afraid I'm going to be one of them.

The only way to stop them is to come out of the gates strong with the full weight and might of the conservative movement behind me.

My team is putting together our fundraising numbers from the final quarter of 2023, and I am so proud of our MASSIVE showing of strength from grassroots donors like yourself.
The truth is that fundraising for a campaign in a purple state like Ohio means we need to think ahead at all times and plan strategically to make sure we pull off a big win in November. We know Jim Jordan will have dark money working on his behalf.
But, **I am ready to fight harder and out work Jim Jordan.** I have speant the last 3 years securing Independent and Republican votes.
I have been very active in the district. I went to several MLK events this week and I attended the Richland County City Council meeting to address the child predator issue in Mansfield, Ashland, and Marion. As you know, stopping all abuse is very important to me. It's time for change. I have been working hard for all of us in the district for 3 years, but I am ready to be the people's Congresswoman in D.C...

subject: Wanted to make sure you don’t miss this chance to make your voice heard
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FAIR FIGHT ACTION
body:
We’re counting on your support. |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77431541/450413422/1793776944?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20240120_e_protectthevote2_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MmY4OWFiMi1jZWI3LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cj3SR3lVPoDSSKERIuY3y5UD4XkGvCL7puqYaRRqV1s=&emci=67f89ab2-ceb7-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=72f89ab2-ceb7-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=1037277)

| | Since we emailed yesterday, hundreds of Fair Fight Action supporters have added their name to support Representative Summer Lee’s Protect the Vote Act. **And we wanted to make sure you don’t miss this chance to make your voice heard.** **[Will you sign your name to say you’re in favor of the Protect the Vote Act? The more noise we can make now, the more likely we are to get this critical piece of legislation across the finish line.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77431542/450413423/-2094032000?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20240120_e_protectthevote2_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MmY4OWFiMi1jZWI3LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cj3SR3lVPoDSSKERIuY3y5UD4XkGvCL7puqYaRRqV1s=&emci=67f89ab2-ceb7-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=72f89ab2-ceb7-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=1037277)**
* * *
We are in a fight for our democracy. As anti-voter forces continue their efforts to rip away voting rights and decide elections by themselves, we must push back with a vision of our democracy that includes _all of us_. **That’s why we need to pass Representative Summer Lee’s Protect the Vote Act. It would restore a critical pillar of the Voting Rights Act. And it would preserve the ability of civil and voting rights groups to fight on behalf of — and deliver relief to — voters across the country.** [**Add your name if you agree: We must pass the Protect the Vote Act to ensure our democracy actually represents all our voices.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77431543/450413424/-2094032000?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20240120_e_protectthevote2_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MmY4OWFiMi1jZWI3LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cj3SR3lVPoDSSKERIuY3y5UD4XkGvCL7puqYaRRqV1s=&emci=67f89ab2-ceb7-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=72f89ab2-ceb7-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=1037277) | [ADD YOUR NAME NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77431544/450413425/-2094032000?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20240120_e_protectthevote2_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MmY4OWFiMi1jZWI3LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cj3SR3lVPoDSSKERIuY3y5UD4XkGvCL7puqYaRRqV1s=&emci=67f89ab2-ceb7-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=72f89ab2-ceb7-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=1037277)
---
The ongoing erosion of the freedom to vote in the U.S. is a direct result of a decade of rulings by the federal courts that have whittled away the protections of the Voting Rights Act.
As anti-voter extremists continue waging a nationally coordinated effort to push ballot access as far out of reach as possible — particularly for Black and brown voters — the Protect the Vote Act could not come at a more urgent time.
This critical piece of legislation would make it easier to defend the freedom to vote by lowering a burdensome threshold imposed by the Supreme Court for those types of legal challenges. And it would help ensure all of our communities can participate in the democratic process.
**Let’s do everything we can to get this bill over the finish line. We need every Fair Fight Action member to add their voice to this fight. **

clean_body: We’re counting on your support. | | | Since we emailed yesterday, hundreds of Fair Fight Action supporters have added their name to support Representative Summer Lee’s Protect the Vote Act. And we wanted to make sure you don’t miss this chance to make your voice heard. We are in a fight for our democracy. As anti-voter forces continue their efforts to rip away voting rights and decide elections by themselves, we must push back with a vision of our democracy that includes all of us. That’s why we need to pass Representative Summer Lee’s Protect the Vote Act. It would restore a critical pillar of the Voting Rights Act. And it would preserve the ability of civil and voting rights groups to fight on behalf of — and deliver relief to — voters across the country. | The ongoing erosion of the freedom to vote in the U.S. is a direct result of a decade of rulings by the federal courts that have whittled away the protections of the Voting Rights Act. As anti-voter extremists continue waging a nationally coordinated effort to push ballot access as far out of reach as possible — particularly for Black and brown voters — the Protect the Vote Act could not come at a more urgent time. This critical piece of legislation would make it easier to defend the freedom to vote by lowering a burdensome threshold imposed by the Supreme Court for those types of legal challenges. And it would help ensure all of our communities can participate in the democratic process. Let’s do everything we can to get this bill over the finish line. We need every Fair Fight Action member to add their voice to this fight. Thanks for taking action, The Fair Fight Action Team | 1270 Caroline Street | Suite D120-430 | Atlanta, GA 30307 ©2024 Fair Fight Action - All rights reserved. **I’m very proud of the campaign we’re running.** Every day, I’m connecting with folks across Montana—on family farms or in high schools or with Montana’s veterans. I always keep those conversations in mind when fighting for Montana’s priorities in the Senate. All of that work is powered by folks like you, and I’m deeply appreciative of your support.
But while I’m focused on defending Montana’s values and fighting to keep our state the Last Best Place, you better believe that out-of-state super PACs are gearing up to spread lies and attack my record.
This is just the beginning. We’ll only face more attacks from here on out as my opponents pour more money into this race. The bottom line is that we’ve got to be ready to take them on.
**Mitch McConnell is trying to buy this Senate seat—and we can’t let him.**
[_**That’s why I’d really appreciate anything you can pitch in a split donation ahead of our next fundraising deadline. We’ve got a strong grassroots team, and we’re building a campaign operation that can weather the attacks, but we can’t win without your help.**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/77432395/450415935/1231903508?amount=3&refcode=UTS_FR_90DO_240120_1_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA3NzNhZjkxLWQwYjctZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=3fo6KByKWMNq_lYEuxfGoCzXZIADKA3YC_JR4rv5us4=)

clean_body: = = I’m very proud of the campaign we’re running. Every day, I’m connecting with folks across Montana—on family farms or in high schools or with Montana’s veterans. I always keep those conversations in mind when fighting for Montana’s priorities in the Senate. All of that work is powered by folks like you, and I’m deeply appreciative of your support. But while I’m focused on defending Montana’s values and fighting to keep our state the Last Best Place, you better believe that out-of-state super PACs are gearing up to spread lies and attack my record. This is just the beginning. We’ll only face more attacks from here on out as my opponents pour more money into this race. The bottom line is that we’ve got to be ready to take them on. Mitch McConnell is trying to buy this Senate seat—and we can’t let him. = If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: = = = = = = Thank you for your support. —Jon Tester | | Paid for by Upset The Setup PAC (www.upsetsetup.org) Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 600 Pennsylvania Ave. SE #15180, Washington, DC 20003 Upset The Setup is working everyday to elect young, diverse, progressive Democrats to critical local offices so we can build up our communities, increase opportunity, and eliminate poverty. name: Nikki Budzinski
subject: A brighter future for our children
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki Budzinski for Congress**
body:
|
#
---
Folks, My grandmother is a big part of why I ran for Congress. She was a public school teacher, and she taught me the importance of the value of a good education. **That’s why I am proud to announce that we’re delivering more than $1.2 million in federal funding to Baby TALK, an educational nonprofit based in Decatur.** Early education and care are critical to the success of our children, their families, and our economy — and investments like this one are a major step forward in our efforts to build a more equitable education system for all. This funding will ensure Baby TALK has the resources to promote school readiness for young children and their families, and will give them the foundational tools to succeed far beyond their childhood. I know that more needs to be done, so this is just the beginning of my efforts to build a brighter future for our children in IL-13 and across the country. **[If you’re standing with me, will you pitch in $5 or more today to keep me fighting in Congress for our students — from early childhood until they graduate?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77432748/450416545/1042890097?amount=5&refcode=AU_NJB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240120_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YjRlYjBhZS1kMmI3LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5fGp5R8rVm-5QPLGW8LfId0NuQIJD3OjFGCwAyn7894=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77432749/450416546/1042890097?refcode=AU_NJB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240120_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YjRlYjBhZS1kMmI3LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5fGp5R8rVm-5QPLGW8LfId0NuQIJD3OjFGCwAyn7894=) ** | | **[CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77432750/450416547/-1000696272?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=AU_NJB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240120_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YjRlYjBhZS1kMmI3LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5fGp5R8rVm-5QPLGW8LfId0NuQIJD3OjFGCwAyn7894=)**

Fellow Democrats,

The Illinois Democratic County Chairs’ Association was formed over 50 years ago — and folks rely on us to help elect Democrats across the state.

If there is one principle that we live by, it’s that all politics is local.

Our mission is to build a dynamic and sustainable resource organization for Democrats across Illinois. That’s why we provide training, resources, and best practices guidance to all 102 Illinois Democratic County Parties and their members.

Fellow Democrats, candidate training and all of the services we offer to Democrats are vital, but they also cost money. As an organization that works all year, every year, every dollar we make in contributions from grassroots donors like you matters. We all benefit when Democrats have the resources they need to win. And those resources are expensive to build. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. = = = = = = Thank you so much for standing with us. Dan Kovats Executive Director | | | | GET TEXT UPDATES FROM THE IDCCA! | | | | | | = = | | | | Contributions or gifts to the Illinois Democratic County Chairs' Association are not tax deductible. Please note your contribution may be used in connection with a federal election. Federal law requires political committees use their “best efforts” to report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose contributions exceed $200 per election cycle. State law requires that we report the occupation and name of the employer of any individual who contributes over $500. A copy of our reports are available for free online at FEC.gov. name: Gallego for Arizona
subject: Our apologies
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
We know you can’t donate to every email we send, but with Trump’s rally in Arizona coming up fast and the stakes of this race what they are, we hope you can donate to this one.
#

Imagine this, Peter.
U.S. Senator Kari Lake.
Get used to pictures like this, too:
[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-jan24.RCwesN&refcode=em240120-2-90&t=1&akid=1773%2E734936%2Em0XsUE)
We’re sorry to put all that in your head, but Kari Lake almost won the last time she ran. She’s learned a few things since then.
That’s why we are asking you to donate $3 to Ruben’s campaign today.
$3 because these two will be together again when Trump comes to Arizona next week.
$3 because this race will go down to the wire and be decided by a few thousand votes.
$3 because it’s not just Arizona’s Senate seat we’re campaigning for, it’s control of the U.S. Senate.
We know you can’t donate to every email we send, but with Trump’s rally in Arizona coming up fast and the stakes of this race what they are, we hope you can donate to this one. Please.
[**Make a donation of $3 to Ruben Gallego’s campaign for U.S. Senate in Arizona. We need a huge amount of donations to be ready when Trump gets here.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-jan24.RCwesN&refcode=em240120-2-90&t=2&akid=1773%2E734936%2Em0XsUE)

Being raised in Philly, Sharif saw firsthand the hardships of poverty and ineffective policy. He helped create one of the first green city initiatives, and continues to advocate for underserved communities across Pennsylvania. Not only will Senator Street lift up voices that are often overlooked, but Sharif will fight to make a better Philadelphia—and Pennsylvania—for all. That's why we were so proud to be joined by Mayor Cherelle Parker, Council President Kenyatta Johnson, Congressman Evans, Sharif's colleagues in the State Senate, House, and City Council, and so many friends from labor. __**This election will take ALL OF US.**__
---

clean_body: | | | | | Peter, Earlier today Senator Street launched his re-election campaign for the 3rd Senatorial District here in North Philadelphia. Thanks to supporters like you, it was a massive success! = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = | = | = | = Being raised in Philly, Sharif saw firsthand the hardships of poverty and ineffective policy. He helped create one of the first green city initiatives, and continues to advocate for underserved communities across Pennsylvania. Not only will Senator Street lift up voices that are often overlooked, but Sharif will fight to make a better Philadelphia—and Pennsylvania—for all. That's why we were so proud to be joined by Mayor Cherelle Parker, Council President Kenyatta Johnson, Congressman Evans, Sharif's colleagues in the State Senate, House, and City Council, and so many friends from labor. This election will take ALL OF US. | | | | | | So please, if you're able— or = Thank You! -Team Street | | | | | ---|---|--- Friends of Sharif Street 1421 West Susquehanna Avenue Philadelphia, PA 19121 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

body:
We are thrilled to announce "A Milestone for Change: Liz's Birthday

[https://email.email.talkswithliz.com/c/eJxskU-L1TAUxT9Ns5uS3vxfZCFqBWFgXIjo5nGbpG1m0kls4iv66aVPkFm87eVwfuec6y7R2-dvhynms_nyUT2y9xP9-qn-IN5qqtFJEuygqFBagBYkbBjTpf0uwTrcCsbl9c3tNJMC3aBRK6GCQjBeoQaYZrLaIGbDDRg_OAp8Zn7iNHjPtJZS6NmTaIECpwNQGAbORQ9SMDnhbOgkjdTYcXqj9Q3TSz1iW1P807u8kWTX1krt2LsOxg7G2vKOS-iXnJcUsMR6yjoYt7rUV793MLLM_Qc8VH1cv_98emLXEdopCD5iB-O_InLgRssZJ60ZGwSKuX8uYSEp36a750G20NbsLZZIduvLEVOKVaqO0-UW_sxb86_dBXtr8xDr9eHI-0vYSbOhXf5P2-zJuQtp1uXtcu91fwMAAP__tKqWlQ]

> Hey Peter,
>
> We are thrilled to announce “A Milestone for Change: Liz’s Birthday/Campaign Launch!”
>
>
> As we countdown to celebrating Liz’s Milestone for Change on February 4th, let's reflect on Elizabeth “Liz“ Johnson’s remarkable
> journey. For years, Liz has been a beacon of hope and progress in the 12th District of Georgia, tirelessly advocating for
> stronger and more connected communities.
>
> This isn't just a birthday celebration; it's a testament to a lifetime dedicated to public service and empowering families,
> women, communities and humanity.

Sponsor Liz's Birthday/Campaign Launch [https://email.email.talkswithliz.com/c/eJxskU2rnTAQQH9NslOSiflwkUVpa6Hw4HVRSruRmMRn3o3Gmnil99cXXZQu7nYY5hzO2D44_f7jaNf2a_vts3xhHwfy_Uv-hZ1WRBkrsNdUEi4VB8Wxn02Iffmzem3NvJrwtvw3O48JbixVRkkuvTTQOmkUwDDiSVsycOI4U3QUloFggisHklKvBg7c46CBQEMoEKC0aXgNgjMxmLElg2iFMqghF60uJt7yEcoUw6O2acZRT6WsGbEPCDoEXfZ233xtbBni7s8VBJ1LiykeQRfDo3pP05LTUo1pq_ZcneSKIuhwTFcVlhr3yRwyv0w_f7--snsHBc--TMlpswa8abceIcaQhUQNebu8TpWc9s16fYlWId-rI203v-Gifen_VSv65DyFFG3T3D_7yt8AAAD__-hTiqo]

> What better way to wish Liz a happy birthday than to show your support and commitment for her vision of our future.

Donate to Attend [https://email.email.talkswithliz.com/c/eJxskU2rnTAQQH9NslOSiflwkUVpa6Hw4HVRSruRmMRn3o3Gmnil99cXXZQu7nYY5hzO2D44_f7jaNf2a_vts3xhHwfy_Uv-hZ1WRBkrsNdUEi4VB8Wxn02Iffmzem3NvJrwtvw3O48JbixVRkkuvTTQOmkUwDDiSVsycOI4U3QUloFggisHklKvBg7c46CBQEMoEKC0aXgNgjMxmLElg2iFMqghF60uJt7yEcoUw6O2acZRT6WsGbEPCDoEXfZ233xtbBni7s8VBJ1LiykeQRfDo3pP05LTUo1pq_ZcneSKIuhwTFcVlhr3yRwyv0w_f7--snsHBc--TMlpswa8abceIcaQhUQNebu8TpWc9s16fYlWId-rI203v-Gifen_VSv65DyFFG3T3D_7yt8AAAD__-hTiqo]

> Let's come together to honor Liz's legacy and continue our collective mission. Every contribution brings us closer to a future
> where every member of Georgia’s 12th district thrives.
>
>
> With much gratitude,
>
> Team Liz Johnson For Us 2024

Watch the Video for Highlights of Liz's Journey [https://email.email.talkswithliz.com/c/eJxs0L9vqzAQwPG_Bm9B9uGfg4en9x6VKkVKhypqF2QbE9xATbAJSv_6KgxVh6w33Ofu65rQ6o_jqib1rF7-i3311-LXp_SOWi2xNI4jr4nATEgGkiE_mjA0-TZ57cw4mXD6_DW7L-PMOCKNFEx4YUC1wkgA26FedwLajlrHO08F71ylHAeBO8uMEswRFDRgoJgABkIoZSVwVnFrOoUtV1yaguJNK7MZzmkNuR_CV-niiAbd5zylovpTQF1AfYtLXkrrC6gluXq1WHI5SjTE7eMq0vafWUXa92-Xw6G61pDR6HMfW22mgGbdTmsYhpC4KCg-beadSXGZndfbEbuQrrs1zmc_o6x9bn6KZH13HiJZuzg2j4p_BwAA__9b_H9g]

clean_body: We are thrilled to announce "A Milestone for Change: Liz's Birthday [] Hey Peter, We are thrilled to announce “A Milestone for Change: Liz’s Birthday/Campaign Launch!” As we countdown to celebrating Liz’s Milestone for Change on February 4th, let's reflect on Elizabeth “Liz“ Johnson’s remarkable journey. For years, Liz has been a beacon of hope and progress in the 12th District of Georgia, tirelessly advocating for stronger and more connected communities. This isn't just a birthday celebration; it's a testament to a lifetime dedicated to public service and empowering families, women, communities and humanity. Sponsor Liz's Birthday/Campaign Launch [] What better way to wish Liz a happy birthday than to show your support and commitment for her vision of our future. Donate to Attend [] Let's come together to honor Liz's legacy and continue our collective mission. Every contribution brings us closer to a future where every member of Georgia’s 12th district thrives. With much gratitude, Team Liz Johnson For Us 2024 Watch the Video for Highlights of Liz's Journey [] YOUR VOICE, YOUR SUPPORT, AND OUR FUTURES MATTER! THANK YOU IN ADVANCE FOR YOUR EARLY SUPPORT! [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [ ] Liz Johnson for Us 2024 P.O. BOX 1404 Statesboro, GA 30459 United States Want to change how you receive these emails? You can update your preferences [] or unsubscribe from this list []. [] []

Monday marks the 51st anniversary of the landmark _Roe v. Wade_ decision, which affirmed the constitutional right to abortion access. Yet, here in Arizona and across the country, that right is under attack from anti-choice politicians like Kari. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77434857/450422118/1055223086?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240120_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzFkNGRmYjAtZDhiNy1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=XSSBctZR17ieIPRv4HkVDAVfnJV8Aszbh4fhsga51x0=) Kari's dangerous comments about abortion show just how out of touch she is with Arizonans. She believes that abortion is "not a choice someone gets to make." But it's not just her opinion that matters: everyone should have the freedom to make their own medical decisions, without political interference. We can't let MAGA extremists like Kari win. body:
https://www.engelforarizona.com/ [https://www.engelforarizona.com/]
Hi Peter,
It’s 2024. This is the year that we have an opportunity to elect Kirsten and flip one of the most competitive House seats in the country from red to blue.
But it’s going to take a lot of hard work first.
We hate to reach out over a weekend, but every day counts. Will you support our people-powered campaign by donating now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_012024_weekend_act]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_012024_weekend_act]
Kirsten is standing up for the issues that matter most: reproductive freedom, water security, Social Security and Medicare, and workers’ rights.
Her opponent is a MAGA puppet who cares more about the approval of the Republican party than the interests of his constituents. He’s rated as one of the most vulnerable Republicans in Congress — but flipping this seat won’t be easy.
In 2022, our campaign was outspent 6:1.
We can’t let that happen again, Peter.
We’ll need your help to win in November. Your grassroots support is critical in this race, so we have to ask: can you chip in now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_012024_weekend_act]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_012024_weekend_act]
Thank you so much. With your support, we can elect Kirsten to Congress and have leadership who will fight for all of us.
Team Engel

She’s ready to take that fight to Washington to find common-sense solutions to the challenges we’re facing here in Arizona's Sixth Congressional District.
In 2022, Kirsten lost her race by one of the smallest margins in the country. Will you make sure she can build a winning campaign early by chipping in now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_012024_weekend_act]

name: FP Team
subject: Is 2024 the BIGGEST year for abortion rights?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Fairness Project The Fairness Project
body:
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/77435011/450422457/765663662?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMTFhMzYzZS1kOWI3LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VIEpve-GgHCg7S2e2ob1G3r_rFfe4XUuDPtzlMvP5fw=&emci=f3c93aba-f9b6-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=d11a363e-d9b7-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=561582) | Team, We can’t stress this enough: 2024 will be the most critical election season for reproductive freedom since _Dobbs._ **11 states could potentially put abortion on the ballot in November.** The landscape for reproductive rights continues to shift, and we have to stay light on our feet to respond. [**This isn’t our first rodeo. We know what it takes to get the right to choose on the ballot and WIN. One of the biggest components of a winning campaign is being able to fund the work on the ground. We know we can win this, but we have to be one step ahead of our opponents. ### Binkley Gains on DeSantis
In a recent poll last Thursday, Ryan Binkley is now polling within 4% of Governor Ron DeSantis. That's huge, and a sign that Ryan's _[Binkmentum](https://binkley2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5894b488eac5a196e1e5d6896&id=5a32eca371&e=c1403f41d3)_ is growing after the Iowa Caucus. ### Ryan Enters Kansas Special Election
The Presidential Preference Primary is a few months away. Ryan joined this week and plans to secure enough delegates to win the national convention. Go Binkley! [_Read here_](https://binkley2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5894b488eac5a196e1e5d6896&id=4fc58bf7ea&e=c1403f41d3)

### Thank you Colbert!
Stephen Colbert told some hilarious jokes about Ryan during this week's The Late Show. He appreciates the attention and hopes to meet Colbert in person so he can give him his own WTF hate to wear. [_Watch here_](https://binkley2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5894b488eac5a196e1e5d6896&id=544f5103c0&e=c1403f41d3)

### WFEA 1370 Interview
Ryan talks with Drew Cline about New Hampshire, polling numbers, and federal spending. _[Listen here](https://binkley2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5894b488eac5a196e1e5d6896&id=597f5a94de&e=c1403f41d3)_

He appreciates the attention and hopes to meet Colbert in person so he can give him his own WTF hate to wear. | | WFEA 1370 Interview Ryan talks with Drew Cline about New Hampshire, polling numbers, and federal spending. | Coming Up | | Red Arrow Diner Ryan will host a meet and greet at Red Arrow Diner, where he'll talk with the people of New Hampshire about his plans to unify the nation. The event starts at 4:00 PM on January 20th, at 61 Lowell St, Manchester, NH 03031. | | "Contribute Today!" | • LIKE AND COMMENT on all social media posts • A simple "I support Ryan Binkley for President" goes a long way! • Ignore any argumentative comments that may follow • Lastly, DONATE & SHARE the link with everyone you know! | | | | Coming up: Click to stay up to date with events. | | | | | | | | PAID FOR BY BINKLEY FOR PRESIDENT 2024 | | Copyright © 2024 Binkley for President 2024, All rights reserved.

name: John Fetterman
subject: Unprecedented
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
Hi there Peter,
URGENT news in the PA Senate race — 🚨 **David McCormick outraised my friend + fellow PA Senator Bob Casey last quarter.** 🚨
McCormick even cut himself a $1 million check, and with his massive personal fortune that he is using to self-fund his campaign, million$ more could be on the way. To fight back, we need to step up for Bob — _big time_.
**[So please, please, please🙏 Will you chip in right now to support my friend Bob Casey + defend this seat from Mitch McConnell and David McCormick? ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240120-2?refcode=em20240120-2&recurring=1&refcode2=1757_552475_umaTpc&akid=1757%2E552475%2EumaTpc)**
_Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue._
[Donate $15 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240120-2?recurring=1&amount=15&refcode=em20240120-2-el&refcode2=1757_552475_umaTpc&akid=1757%2E552475%2EumaTpc) [Donate $25 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240120-2?recurring=1&amount=25&refcode=em20240120-2-el&refcode2=1757_552475_umaTpc&akid=1757%2E552475%2EumaTpc) [Donate $50 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240120-2?recurring=1&amount=50&refcode=em20240120-2-el&refcode2=1757_552475_umaTpc&akid=1757%2E552475%2EumaTpc) [Donate $100 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240120-2?recurring=1&amount=100&refcode=em20240120-2-el&refcode2=1757_552475_umaTpc&akid=1757%2E552475%2EumaTpc) [Donate $250 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240120-2?recurring=1&amount=250&refcode=em20240120-2-el&refcode2=1757_552475_umaTpc&akid=1757%2E552475%2EumaTpc) [Other amount ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240120-2?recurring=1&refcode=em20240120-2&refcode2=1757_552475_umaTpc&akid=1757%2E552475%2EumaTpc)
---
Just like in 2022, Pennsylvania’s going to be one of the closest + most expensive Senate races in the country. Mitch McConnell and the GOP are going to throw in everything they’ve got to flip this seat red. A super PAC supporting McCormick already raised an unprecedented $18 million, not to mention the immense support he’s been promised by McConnell.
If we’re going to keep the Senate blue, we have to have Bob’s back.
**[We made history in 2022 — let’s do it again in 2024. Chip in any amount right away to keep Bob in the Senate.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240120-2?refcode=em20240120-2&recurring=1&refcode2=1757_552475_umaTpc&akid=1757%2E552475%2EumaTpc)**
Thanks to your help, Bob and I are fighting for working PA families in the Senate. Let’s keep it that way.
THANK YOU!! 🙏

❤️ John
John Fetterman
U.S. Senator from Pennsylvania

* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=1&akid=1757%2E552475%2EumaTpc)
* [Update Your Information](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://go.bobcasey.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=1757%2E552475%2EumaTpc)

To give by check:
Bob Casey for Senate
PO Box 58746
Philadelphia, PA 19102
Email us: [info@bobcasey.com](mailto:info@bobcasey.com)

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jan2024_abs_em.zPsl9O&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20240120_PM2_V1_S1&t=1011&akid=5144%2E5257348%2EPwY-jy ]Photo of Trump on stage at his rally in Concord, NH

“Guys like Adam Schiff, Shifty Schiff, Pencil Neck.... he’s a structural
marvel... How that neck can hold up that big, oversized, ugly head is hard
to believe. It’s like your finger on a basketball... He’s a terrible guy.”

Without a doubt, I am living rent-free in Trump’s head, and let me tell
you — it’s pretty scary in here. But Trump is attacking me because he
knows how effective I am. He fears what I can — and will — do as a Senator
to stand up to him and his MAGA allies.

Because when I stood up to him, I secured the first bipartisan vote in
history to convict a sitting president in his Senate impeachment trial.

Because I shined a light on what happened on January 6 — and his
involvement in trying to usurp our democracy.

Because the evidence I gathered on the January 6 Committee has helped
authorities make a case to indict him — dozens of times.

Because he knows I will hold those who abuse their power accountable —
whether it’s him, big corporations, or any other special interests rigging
the rules against hard-working families.

Trump sees the grassroots movement we’re building, and no wonder he’s
worried. With just a few weeks until voting begins in our primary
election, the attacks are only going to ramp up.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jan2024_abs_em.zPsl9O&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20240120_PM2_V1_S1&email=&amount=10&t=1012&akid=5144%2E5257348%2EPwY-jy ]Help me respond to Trump’s latest attack before our first televised

body:
| |

| | [](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=de35a68ab3f54055bd9780cf0a86e716&_e=masefCX2Vgffad8CBo8nEabfVxeO-r0yN8MccOUbukUxAEY18aCDnTyoIBydMH2b1ArX6VjiMIueRLhLshe-TRkOKCbT4g-0EnHpZ9EjcZ4RheJj99xfR3Se2IsPVDGOBTnHJ9BfFQSloiH8jC4tUcIwryot9UVBsSJvoMyQLJYYqM5GCzTrMYvc-X6dAj8x-Ra3_jWfOVDR1jkJwR10q1tdMOYCF7e0H4F8JDjtJWXgfpgDN6r2VKjSpQx8jtg0PwoDvYzb9LQBPdx7Dz9gbl2P0Yjj1D2N3poX0pRE8pv1lBpgcT1D3ZOFgj-4nB-gaHg4J1qCy5CdYPWUMyLTb8zbNb5-StrFgwjfryk9relDi1OvVVrfPLR_s_Sez_gUCsYoVFoxEmNnYIMSl130Ew%3D%3D)

| | Fellow American, **[**Will you help me strikeout the liberal lineup of Adam Schiff, Katie Porter, and Barbara Lee on March 5th?**](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=de35a68ab3f54055bd9780cf0a86e716&_e=masefCX2Vgffad8CBo8nEabfVxeO-r0yN8MccOUbukUxAEY18aCDnTyoIBydMH2b1ArX6VjiMIueRLhLshe-TRkOKCbT4g-0EnHpZ9EjcZ4RheJj99xfR3Se2IsPVDGOBTnHJ9BfFQSloiH8jC4tUcIwryot9UVBsSJvoMyQLJYYqM5GCzTrMYvc-X6dAj8x-Ra3_jWfOVDR1jkJwR10q1tdMOYCF7e0H4F8JDjtJWXbGIXnOKzP0t0mADlnMq8X9qEBltVXD5wYutyXScAqdkLqaT5iipOFbYe5BraTjzxT0trx-RGnv6CqtnYlc29tQt0mnxAugHEx0ALNqZIWFPIQdkQ4cdS-2zt7pTSrm_4401TbN55PtCr57T-SjovDFmN_xiLNX0c7jNrjLUs0rg%3D%3D)** That's the day of the California primary. The top two go head-to-head in November. I can think of only one thing worse than a General Election ballot that forces Californians to "choose" between three dyed-in-the-wool leftists like Schiff, Porter, or Lee... ...and that's being forced to endure six years of Schiff, Porter, or Lee in the U.S. Senate. I need your help to go "three up...three down" against this lineup of liberal career politicians. That's a bit of baseball vernacular. No surprise, right? It means you record three outs against the first three batters in an inning. Then, it's your team's turn to go on offense. Well, that's very much the case in this election... ...you and I need to strike out this lineup of liberals so we can get to work saving our country. Liberals straight out of Congress where all three have spent a combined 51 years - most recently acting as rubberstamps for the Biden agenda that has done so much harm to our state and our nation. Which is why I'm reaching out to you today. **[Will you step up and help strike out this"lineup of liberals" through a contribution of $15, $25, $50, or more today?](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=de35a68ab3f54055bd9780cf0a86e716&_e=masefCX2Vgffad8CBo8nEabfVxeO-r0yN8MccOUbukUxAEY18aCDnTyoIBydMH2b1ArX6VjiMIueRLhLshe-TRkOKCbT4g-0EnHpZ9EjcZ4RheJj99xfR3Se2IsPVDGOBTnHJ9BfFQSloiH8jC4tUcIwryot9UVBsSJvoMyQLJYYqM5GCzTrMYvc-X6dAj8x-Ra3_jWfOVDR1jkJwR10q1tdMOYCF7e0H4F8JDjtJWXE2PWdoSSng4aI68pntA1sjOtkc1ou85nDsNw_c-tGltbHYwjfZmzZxMuC7r3swt28l_Jn_MkxkVqeR5JFtDoQ1McvpoDJgrbC-uDvUtPyP2jKOKNH7oNbo4xn-FGl4y5NWXuvZwrCvTtrb8NY_M3r2teAGHMyKpRzDV4EvyeINg%3D%3D)** Think about the crumbling quality of life in my once-great state of California. Think about the daily reality of:
---
• Fear of walking down the street, taking their kids to school, or running a small business because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. • The exploding cost of living (gas, food, shelter) which for the first time in our history is causing more people to leave California. • Failing public schools and plummeting test scores. The numbers don't lie... prolonged school closings not only robbed our kids of learning but of social interaction.
---
If you believe, as I do, that voters deserve better than a "false choice" between Schiff, Porter, and Lee on November 5, 2024, **[**then I need you to take immediate action and rush a contribution of $15, $25, $50, or more today.**](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=de35a68ab3f54055bd9780cf0a86e716&_e=masefCX2Vgffad8CBo8nEabfVxeO-r0yN8MccOUbukUxAEY18aCDnTyoIBydMH2b1ArX6VjiMIueRLhLshe-TRkOKCbT4g-0EnHpZ9EjcZ4RheJj99xfR3Se2IsPVDGOBTnHJ9BfFQSloiH8jC4tUcIwryot9UVBsSJvoMyQLJYYqM5GCzTrMYvc-X6dAj8x-Ra3_jWfOVDR1jkJwR10q1tdMOYCF7e0H4F8JDjtJWUD0Xz6kXWObBToAXyiim3_NzG-WRuHcBWWl7zgb3k4AKdW7yh4XNA5ntMULQr1k62C4-KfcptOlm3IL2dCZYVLy8iyO7kwkx8kknXf0CRjLNpj_25fJexsIWENkdY0KKP3eEmxjZSfHqGIyWU44ASM8H4FPBblX-s7JT0LuIt3-g%3D%3D)** Winning this election requires a one-two punch:
---
1\. Finish in the top two on March 5th (very doable as the Democrat vote will be split three ways). 2\. An eight-month grassroots and TV, radio, and online campaign "connecting the dots" between the policies pushed by Schiff/Porter/Lee and the brutal reality facing Californians every day.
---
In my playing days, I would never be out-worked or out-hustled. That's my approach to this campaign. Door-knocks, phone-calls, rallies, townhalls, you name it. **[But I need your help. I'd consider it a great honor to have you on my campaign team. I also consider your support a must have in order to win this race.](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=de35a68ab3f54055bd9780cf0a86e716&_e=masefCX2Vgffad8CBo8nEabfVxeO-r0yN8MccOUbukUxAEY18aCDnTyoIBydMH2b1ArX6VjiMIueRLhLshe-TRkOKCbT4g-0EnHpZ9EjcZ4RheJj99xfR3Se2IsPVDGOBTnHJ9BfFQSloiH8jC4tUcIwryot9UVBsSJvoMyQLJYYqM5GCzTrMYvc-X6dAj8x-Ra3_jWfOVDR1jkJwR10q1tdMOYCF7e0H4F8JDjtJWWUqQRt7oXf9ptuggNPhH6AfH4lx8a0LIbi3jN68xgM2KmSZ6KBuNW1DK30FRlnP4v6hxMlH-RFE7jj4H7Q2dWYeZHaavW6keP9IlEJLiBiCqh4dWOVluO7Kafy1N5oa0rQgYrdWRE5FcWWl32mCeSxSi91d5Vj2HscpWdmjPWBhg%3D%3D)** With you on our side, I'm confident we can not only give voters a real choice, but someone who remembers how great California was and knows how great it can be again.
---
| | With deepest appreciation,
---
---
Steve Garvey Republican for United States Senate

**MY VISION**
---
My campaign is focused on quality-of-life issues, public safety, and education. As your U.S. Senator, I will serve with commonsense, compassion, and will work to build consensus to benefit all of the people of California. I've been fortunate to wear many hats in life - from professional athlete to businessman to philanthropist. But the one thing that has remained consistent is my love for this great state and my desire to make a difference. In baseball, it's not about the individual; it's about the team. I believe the same holds true for politics. It's time we come together, find common ground, and work towards a brighter future.

Folks,

There's no beating around the bush.

This has been a tough month for Republicans.

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: I’m used to being written off
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
|
#
Hi there, this is Senator Tammy Baldwin. I’m used to being written off. When I first ran for Congress in Wisconsin in 1997, no one thought I could win — especially when an extremely popular opponent jumped into the race. I remember huddling with one of my staffers at the time, and she said, “Well Tammy, maybe you want to rethink what you’re doing because it’s going to be tough.” I looked her right in the eye and asked, “Do you think I should wait my turn?” The next thing I said was this: I believe that women have to run — especially when it’s hard — and not wait our turn. We can’t wait until we get a tap on our shoulder or we’ll never get anywhere. **I ended up winning that race and became the very first woman elected to the House of Representatives from Wisconsin. And it wouldn’t be the last time our team would make history.** When I ran for U.S. Senate in 2012, an incredible team of grassroots supporters like you fought alongside me — even as some people wrote us off. You helped me become the first woman elected to the chamber from our state and the first openly gay Senator in our nation’s history. In 2018, despite being a top target for national Republicans and enduring over a year of attacks, you stood with me again, and we won. Time and again, grassroots supporters like you have defied the odds. The battle to protect this seat will be no different, and it will require all of us working together to overcome the millions of dollars right-wing mega-donors will spend to defeat us and hand the Senate majority over to Mitch McConnell. **[Together, I know we can defy the odds once again. So folks, I’m humbly asking: Will you help us protect this seat and the Senate majority with it by splitting a donation today between my campaign in Wisconsin and Tina Smith?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77435671/450423026/-83437346?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_TSM_FR_TAN_GEN_AC60_20240120_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NmUxZGJlZS1kZGI3LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K3kHyyY11Uq-wnG8ZquPm3l9o6-Y5drQbvGZc534gpk=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Tina Smith and Tammy Baldwin will go through immediately:_ | | [SPLIT $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77435672/450423027/-83437346?express_lane=true&amount=10&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_TSM_FR_TAN_GEN_AC60_20240120_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NmUxZGJlZS1kZGI3LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K3kHyyY11Uq-wnG8ZquPm3l9o6-Y5drQbvGZc534gpk=)

clean_body: | Hi there, this is Senator Tammy Baldwin. I’m used to being written off. When I first ran for Congress in Wisconsin in 1997, no one thought I could win — especially when an extremely popular opponent jumped into the race. I remember huddling with one of my staffers at the time, and she said, “Well Tammy, maybe you want to rethink what you’re doing because it’s going to be tough.” I looked her right in the eye and asked, “Do you think I should wait my turn?” The next thing I said was this: I believe that women have to run — especially when it’s hard — and not wait our turn. We can’t wait until we get a tap on our shoulder or we’ll never get anywhere. I ended up winning that race and became the very first woman elected to the House of Representatives from Wisconsin. And it wouldn’t be the last time our team would make history. When I ran for U.S. Senate in 2012, an incredible team of grassroots supporters like you fought alongside me — even as some people wrote us off. You helped me become the first woman elected to the chamber from our state and the first openly gay Senator in our nation’s history. In 2018, despite being a top target for national Republicans and enduring over a year of attacks, you stood with me again, and we won. Time and again, grassroots supporters like you have defied the odds. The battle to protect this seat will be no different, and it will require all of us working together to overcome the millions of dollars right-wing mega-donors will spend to defeat us and hand the Senate majority over to Mitch McConnell. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Tina Smith and Tammy Baldwin will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Your support has made all the difference time and time again, and I can’t thank you enough for that. I’m so glad to have you on this historic team. — Tammy Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota Tina Smith for Minnesota PO Box 14362 St. Paul, MN 55114 United States | | Contributions or gifts to Tina Smith for Minnesota are not tax-deductible.

**This November’s election is the most important of our lifetimes.** We’re living in unprecedented times. There’s a lot on the line this election. Now, more than ever, we have to work _so much harder_ to reelect President Biden and Vice President Harris, keep the Senate, and flip the House. Though the language may be trite and clichéd, it’s true. You’ve heard pundits, candidates like me, or your aunt who watches a _liiiiittle_ too much MSNBC say it all before. **But the reality is that when you are always just one election away from democracy being at risk, then every election becomes the most important election of our lifetimes.** **We’ve done our best to #Resist — to fight for our democracy — and we’ve won.** We flipped the House in 2018, the White House and the Senate in 2020, and beat the odds by holding the Senate in 2022. But we don’t just vote to prevent bad things from happening. We vote — and I’m running — because of what _is possible_. I know that we can work together to make meaningful progress that will improve the lives of every single American (even for those who may not agree with us). **It’s going to take all of us chipping in our dollars and our time in order to win this November.**
* **Protecting our democracy:** Now that we know Trump is on track to be the nominee, the stakes are _that much higher_. He, himself, said that he’ll be a dictator in his next term. On national television, no less. _We MUST re-elect Biden-Harris, and defeat Trump’s enablers in Congress._
* **Restoring reproductive rights:** Since _Roe_ was overturned, one-third of women now live in a state where they cannot access abortion care. A stalemated Congress means the Supreme Court is the chief arbiter of all reproductive policy. _We must flip the House to protect abortion rights and access to critical reproductive care._
* **Empowering workers and families:** Too many families are struggling under rising costs. From child care to health care to housing, the American Dream is unaffordable and inaccessible for too many of our neighbors. _Congress must pass affordable child care, paid leave, universal health care, and meaningful investments in housing so that every American has a fair shot to stay afloat and get ahead._
* **Combatting climate change:** The greatest act of love and care we can provide to our neighbors and the generations after us is to address climate change — from preparedness and relief efforts to cutting emissions and curbing harmful practices. _We need a Democratic trifecta — the House, the Senate, and the Presidency — in order to move**any** policy on the environment._
* **Stopping gun violence:** There were more mass shootings in 2023 than any other year on record. It’s unconscionable that our leaders refuse to act despite tragedy after tragedy. This week, the Justice Department released a report on the "significant failure" by police in the Uvalde shooting nearly two years ago. _We need to address the problem at the root of the issue: we need a ban on automatic weapons and universal background checks, commonsense laws that will save lives and reduce gun violence._

One year from today (366 days because 2024 is a leap year!), we’ll see the efforts of the contributions we made bear out when our president is sworn in on January 20, 2025, and the 119th Congress begins its work. **With you, I know we can and we will win again.** Thanks for hearing me out, Sarah | [DonaTE $20.24](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77435741/450423079/1954656641?refcode=EM_FL_MCB_20240120_na_oneyear_cand_nc_act_xx_sbt&amount=20.24&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjI0OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjQ4MzhmOC1kZWI3LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fiU7_aEUK3T6k3GZG0JGkgLEU0REatv2iGtOTx_sK1I=)

name: Katie Porter HQ
subject: Not what we planned…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
We won’t BS you, this wasn’t the email we planned to send you today.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=36727%2E3422442%2E92zCjZ)
Derek, we won’t BS you, this wasn’t the email we planned to send you today.
With only 6 weeks and 3 days until our critical primary election, we’re setting weekly fundraising goals that are critical to hit in order to reach the voters who will decide the March 5th election.
**→ But we’re sending this email today because we’re currently falling short of our weekly fundraising goal.** If enough supporters contribute in response to this email, we’ll be able to make up the shortfall in time to ramp up our ads THIS week.
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20240120-2?refcode=em20240120-36727&refcode2=36727_3422442_92zCjZ&akid=36727%2E3422442%2E92zCjZ)
We need to ramp up now, because our celebrity Republican opponent is rising in the polls, and he could prevent Katie from advancing to the General Election in November.
**We can’t afford to lose Katie Porter’s voice in Congress.**
So what do you say, Derek? **[Will you contribute $5 right now to help us catch up on our current fundraising shortfall?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20240120-2?refcode=em20240120-36727&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=36727_3422442_92zCjZ&akid=36727%2E3422442%2E92zCjZ)**
Team Porter has never let us down before, and we know we can count on you this time, too.
All the best,
-KPHQ

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=em20240120-36727&amounts=&t=2&refcode2=36727_3422442_92zCjZ&akid=36727%2E3422442%2E92zCjZ)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4s-emails/?t=3&akid=36727%2E3422442%2E92zCjZ)

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4s-unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=36727%2E3422442%2E92zCjZ)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Senate
PO Box 5176
Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)
Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate

subject: Your EOY Survey Responses >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Foushee for Congress
body:
Valerie is committed to ensuring these rights are protected, and your voices are heard loud and clear.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77437045/450425690/2125913804?refcode=BLU_EM_VFC_2024-01-20_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNjA4ZDZkOS1lM2I3LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ip771KS0vys7bsRypGZiRB1ZL3V4VzMMpE1-d17nVTQ=)
---
| Peter,

We’re in for a difficult year ahead. Amidst another major election season, Republicans are amping up their efforts to roll back voting and reproductive rights and continue peddling their extremist rhetoric.

Valerie is committed to ensuring these rights are protected, and your voices are heard loud and clear. Last year, we sent an end-of-year survey asking you: _**What issues would you like to see prioritized in 2024?**_

---
This week, Houthis attacked our commercial and military ships in the Gulf of Aden. And it’s just the latest example of global conflicts impacting our military readiness here and abroad. **Yet Rep. Jack Bergman continues to let us down on veterans and military issues.** Rather than doing everything in his power to ensure the U.S. military is up to the challenge, Bergman has spent his time in Congress playing politics. Just this week he voted against keeping the government funded and running. Before that, when Sen. Tuberville spent _10 months_ blocking more than 400 crucial military appointments, Bergman _supported_ his obstruction. This is all to the detriment not just to our service members, but also to our national security. You can’t vote to not fund the government, refuse to work with your colleagues, and then complain that the government isn’t working. You can’t use our service members and veterans as political pawns and call yourself a veterans' champion. With rising tensions around the world putting our national security at risk, we must have strong leaders who will prioritize our nation over their own agenda. [**Callie’s lifelong commitment to supporting veterans and military families is exactly what we need in Congress. Chip in to defeat Bergman and elect a proven fighter to represent Michigan’s 1st District →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77437349/450425940/-1010367505?refcode=EM_FL_BAR_20240120_fr_readiness_team_kw_90da_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmQ3NWYzY2UtZTViNy1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ItWsRPYpFGomuTON2QC1N11x97pZFBcHLcyuSviiuA8=) | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

clean_body: | = This week, Houthis attacked our commercial and military ships in the Gulf of Aden. And it’s just the latest example of global conflicts impacting our military readiness here and abroad. Yet Rep. Jack Bergman continues to let us down on veterans and military issues. Rather than doing everything in his power to ensure the U.S. military is up to the challenge, Bergman has spent his time in Congress playing politics. Just this week he voted against keeping the government funded and running. Before that, when Sen. Tuberville spent 10 months blocking more than 400 crucial military appointments, Bergman supported his obstruction. This is all to the detriment not just to our service members, but also to our national security. You can’t vote to not fund the government, refuse to work with your colleagues, and then complain that the government isn’t working. You can’t use our service members and veterans as political pawns and call yourself a veterans' champion. body:
|

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77437373/450425981/227139380?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MzAwN2NmMS1lNWI3LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VXmnStEr2MOWqr3HW7EcStW11Q8DdbjWueq-w-vQx9Q=&emci=cd112f6b-2db6-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=53007cf1-e5b7-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=43566853)

| | Hi there, Peter —

I know you’ve gotten a lot of emails this week, but we email you only because it’s important.

[**_We’re quickly nearing our first deadline of 2024 – but right now, we are short of our projections. Could you split a $10 donation between my campaign and the GA Dems now? Let me explain further:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77437374/450425982/1536759036?refcode=20240120.2_JS_1AE&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MzAwN2NmMS1lNWI3LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VXmnStEr2MOWqr3HW7EcStW11Q8DdbjWueq-w-vQx9Q=)**_

Hitting every single online fundraising goal is critical to building a winning campaign.

What’s involved in a winning campaign? It starts with talking to as many voters as possible. There are also bills to pay – like our HQ office for staff and volunteers to work out of – and travel costs as I continue to hit the road and talk to voters and community leaders.

Some of our biggest expenses are in our voter communication and engagement budget. This summer and fall, our campaign will make huge investments in TV and digital ads, direct mail pieces, and an aggressive ground campaign to get out the vote before the election. What we raise now plays a major role in determining how big our budget can be and how many voters we can reach.

**Early polling shows me in a dead heat with my extremist Republican opponent. This campaign will be won or lost by the smallest of margins. We really can’t afford to miss any of our internal budget goals because failing to hit our monthly projections translates into budget cuts on direct voter outreach.**

[**_That’s why your contribution today is so deeply important. It’s an investment into winning this campaign for a brighter future for North Carolina. Please split a contribution of $10 – or whatever is right for you – before our critical deadline:_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77437375/450425983/1536759036?refcode=20240120.2_JS_1AE&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MzAwN2NmMS1lNWI3LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VXmnStEr2MOWqr3HW7EcStW11Q8DdbjWueq-w-vQx9Q=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

name: Team Kennedy
subject: Submit or Lose Your Job:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
The United States of America is sick and in need of a miracle cure.

|
---
| | | **The United States of America is sick and in need of a miracle cure.
**
---
---
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=speech_1_20_24_email_1_1_nd&n=1)
|
---
Dear Peter,
The breaking news that a Canadian Court is forcing psychiatrist Jordan Peterson to undergo state-sanctioned media training because of “demeaning” social media posts is an assault to the fundamental tenets of Democracy and Freedom.
Authoritarianism was tried by many nations in the 20th century, and it failed every single time—because people of the free world opposed those regimes that sought to terminate fundamental human rights.
That a Canadian court would force anyone to submit to their speech codes or else lose his or her ability to earn a living more resembles Communist-led China, not a free nation.
In fact, our campaign is currently facing mainstream media censorship, social media companies throttling down our news stories and events, and two hostile political parties who want us eliminated.
One party, the Democrats, have fully embraced censorship of those who don’t toe the line and hold to their narrative. Many Republicans also push back against those like Robert F. Kennedy Jr., who take on the military-iIndustrial Complex and never-ending wars.
_Both parties will stop at nothing to ensure their collective uniparty agenda is accomplished._
You and I simply do not count.
We the People are not on their agenda.
That the middle class is decimated, that the cost of housing is out of reach for most of us, that our jobs no longer pay us a living wage, that our test scores rank dead last among free nations and trap our children in perpetual mediocrity, that life expectancy is dropping, that drug use and the death rates from drug overdoses and suicide are at record highs...
**_...the politicians from both parties do not give a damn about you or me._**
The United States of America is sick and in need of a miracle cure.
The cure begins with honesty and a commitment to our shared American values: free speech, the Constitution, transparency, and accountability.
And each one of us has a unique opportunity, right now, to stand up for what we know is right. We can support one another, encourage one another, and stand alongside one another to see that a new vision, a new voice, and a new direction comes to fruition—centered first and foremost on We The People.
Benjamin Franklin, referring to the great risk our Founding Fathers took when they fought for their Independence, said: “Either we stand together or we hang separately.”
_This campaign is asking, and will continue to ask, a lot from each of you._ We need contributions, both large and small. We need volunteers, full-time and part-time. We need advocates. We need door knockers and people making phone calls.
The easiest part is donating. The maximum amount an individual can donate to Kennedy 24 is $6,000—$3,000 during the primary season and $3,000 during the general election season.
**Please consider making the maximum contribution to our effort during this primary season.**
[**Your maximum gift of $3,000 will propel this campaign into the mainstream news cycle, onto the debate stage, on your state ballot, and into the White House in 2025.**](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=speech_1_20_24_email_1_1_nd&n=2)
If you are not in a position to give the maximum amount, know that every single penny our campaign raises will be spent very carefully and with the utmost honesty and transparency.
[**Gifts of $5, $10, $15, or even $25 or more will help us in this historic effort.**](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=speech_1_20_24_email_1_1_nd&n=3)
**We’re currently behind our monthly goal, and we need your support to bridge the gap.** Any amount you can give will help us achieve the 100% participation we need to sustain the incredible momentum we’ve built together!
First and foremost, we must ensure RFK Jr.'s name is on the ballot in all 50 states.
While the candidates from the two major parties are automatically on the ballot, we face a different challenge. To secure our spot, we need to mobilize a 50-state ground game, _and this effort comes with a price tag of $18 million_.
Your financial support is the lifeblood of our campaign. Every dollar brings us closer to securing ballot access and reaching our monthly goal.
[CONTRIBUTE $5 >>](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?amount=5&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=speech_1_20_24_email_1_1_nd&n=4)

[CONTRIBUTE $100 >> ](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?amount=100&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=speech_1_20_24_email_1_1_nd&n=6)
[CONTRIBUTE $240 >> ](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?amount=240&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=speech_1_20_24_email_1_1_nd&n=7)

[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT >> ](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=speech_1_20_24_email_1_1_nd&n=9)

clean_body: The United States of America is sick and in need of a miracle cure. | | | | The United States of America is sick and in need of a miracle cure. | Dear Peter, The breaking news that a Canadian Court is forcing psychiatrist Jordan Peterson to undergo state-sanctioned media training because of “demeaning” social media posts is an assault to the fundamental tenets of Democracy and Freedom. Authoritarianism was tried by many nations in the 20th century, and it failed every single time—because people of the free world opposed those regimes that sought to terminate fundamental human rights. That a Canadian court would force anyone to submit to their speech codes or else lose his or her ability to earn a living more resembles Communist-led China, not a free nation. In fact, our campaign is currently facing mainstream media censorship, social media companies throttling down our news stories and events, and two hostile political parties who want us eliminated. One party, the Democrats, have fully embraced censorship of those who don’t toe the line and hold to their narrative. Many Republicans also push back against those like Robert F. Kennedy Jr., who take on the military-iIndustrial Complex and never-ending wars. Both parties will stop at nothing to ensure their collective uniparty agenda is accomplished. You and I simply do not count. We the People are not on their agenda. That the middle class is decimated, that the cost of housing is out of reach for most of us, that our jobs no longer pay us a living wage, that our test scores rank dead last among free nations and trap our children in perpetual mediocrity, that life expectancy is dropping, that drug use and the death rates from drug overdoses and suicide are at record highs... ...the politicians from both parties do not give a damn about you or me. The United States of America is sick and in need of a miracle cure. The cure begins with honesty and a commitment to our shared American values: free speech, the Constitution, transparency, and accountability. And each one of us has a unique opportunity, right now, to stand up for what we know is right. We can support one another, encourage one another, and stand alongside one another to see that a new vision, a new voice, and a new direction comes to fruition—centered first and foremost on We The People. clean_body: What do Nixon and Clinton have in common? | | | | Can't see this email? | | | | | | Dear Patriot,, Remember when America was GREAT? Remember when we had respect around the world? When our economy was booming? When our border was safe? We need to bring those days back! Not long ago both sides of the political aisle wanted to be friends with me. From President Richard Nixon, to Princess Diana, and even Oprah, no book offers a glimpse into history quite like ! | | | This letter from President Nixon highlights one of the many letters that have been handpicked by myself and featured in . Show your support today and pick up your copy at . Thank you for your unwavering support as we fight to save our nation. Best, President Donald J. Trump | | | | | | FOLLOW US! | | No longer want to receive these emails? . Winning Team Publishing 520 Beau Pre Rd Lafayette, Louisiana 70508

body:
Pennsylvania needs our attention: With the House tied 101-101 and a key special election just weeks away, defending our majority depends on the actions we take right now. | | |
---
| |
---|---
🚨**UPDATE: The Pennsylvania House is TIED** 🚨 A tied House means that _control of the chamber could go either way._ But let’s be real, **we cannot let Republicans flip House control** so they can continue attacking our communities at the ballot box, in schools, and beyond. The chamber is tied at **101-101** , and we're less than one month away __ until next month’s special election to defend our majority. _That means the support we receive _right now_ could tip the scale and provide more resources for Democrats._ [Will you own a piece of the fight and chip in $7 today to help elect state Democrats in key battlegrounds like Pennsylvania? ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xuG0DIvBkTCI0Lr6bZYKgpl2gOxhUzXPMSwByOSES6PugsBLwKsvRP_NFnxoYJIKjuff5Pq7fTJrNAMQhoR5lOo81pxnTFMg14hcAIqSEJS12hxUc-p5XVMiJyeyiiLl-fWOMADyGhjeywY7n9vYXuAU91s-nXeKyp5qz3HDROvRgFPJupeXeMDJgg0OM8rdiQaWXevxEb1qOTY2yfiXvxeVzC_GYGwgPzgAYoqvcihN_Xt7BFE1IN2EofHUmp4cWGXP0tydxC5MYhx4hxsKNaLkLdgdrfNix6wul7r7e-P3ogvfYlArREsMoIHH8LMzrxc8cchateWbv1MjRu2TTAdi4ENTUNqp-91lrPGY9nVsEO1_z_bnLosLyOnsckgPs/435/fhVMvZ-BTbeQxsWi98C16g/h0/IXiYBl1hga_-tdszR07JVg-W3rsqSjmjD128yURIJcc) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately.

The GOP still holds control of the Pennsylvania Senate, and they’re using their majority to oppose gun safety measures and other progressive legislation. **Losing next month means Republicans would have full legislative control and the power to put our fundamental freedoms on the line.**
And this election has consequences that reach further than state lines – winning means building Democratic power, fighting back against the GOP’s extreme agenda, and protecting President Biden’s path to the presidency come November.
[Here is the bottom line: Right now Pennsylvania needs our attention. Join Democrats in our fight by rushing a donation of $7 before our tie-breaking special election. ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xuG0DIvBkTCI0Lr6bZYKgpl2gOxhUzXPMSwByOSES6PugsBLwKsvRP_NFnxoYJIKjuff5Pq7fTJrNAMQhoR5lOo81pxnTFMg14hcAIqSEJS12hxUc-p5XVMiJyeyiiLl-fWOMADyGhjeywY7n9vYXuAU91s-nXeKyp5qz3HDROvRgFPJupeXeMDJgg0OM8rdhydjK4DE2EuAehEMLt7Lnre5Z_oHslXI-99XOyoxW9ITCkUAPyfDhZ0cROx_FBKOkI6cf9H7W9oTJD5pk45T88G7CbIdVziznpEhTltPEzFgY0orFhqXT6MYWTYSXcTMJyWt3OuKBtGT_VQm9pY_XwgPNBx8MirBAsMgkR7o609rxcnxAwkh3jioif2OMVK7U/435/fhVMvZ-BTbeQxsWi98C16g/h6/agFfZEsSf-zXC1qRvjCb7wD75vkLD1yZgPcymg8_OZQ)

But let’s be real, we cannot let Republicans flip House control so they can continue attacking our communities at the ballot box, in schools, and beyond. The chamber is tied at 101-101 , and we're less than one month away until next month’s special election to defend our majority. That means the support we receive right now could tip the scale and provide more resources for Democrats. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | The GOP still holds control of the Pennsylvania Senate, and they’re using their majority to oppose gun safety measures and other progressive legislation. name: Adam Schiff
subject: Becoming a Founding Donor
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Upset The Setup PAC
body:
# [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/77439261/450427693/18334046?refcode=UTS_FR_90DO_240120_1_3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjAwNzcyMDQ2LWVhYjctZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=pnve6zgoBgydstj2eWnz7qK-GbGFEo3nqMrHFgWp6ZY=)
Hi Peter,
We are officially in the election year, and it’s been just under a year since we launched this campaign for U.S. Senate.
We’ve been steadfast in our commitment to fight for America’s democracy and build a better economy for everyone.
But here’s the truth: none of this would have been possible without the help of this grassroots team.
From holding Trump accountable through impeachment to my service on the January 6 Select Committee, you have consistently stood by my side.
Your unwavering support, resilience in fighting back, commitment to speaking truth to power, and tireless dedication to our shared mission to ensure our government upholds the promise of this country have been pivotal.
While we made significant strides this past year, the true challenge lies ahead.

We’ve been steadfast in our commitment to fight for America’s democracy and build a better economy for everyone. But here’s the truth: none of this would have been possible without the help of this grassroots team. From holding Trump accountable through impeachment to my service on the January 6 Select Committee, you have consistently stood by my side. Your unwavering support, resilience in fighting back, commitment to speaking truth to power, and tireless dedication to our shared mission to ensure our government upholds the promise of this country have been pivotal. name: Mazie Hirono
subject: Speaking out comes with a price
body:
|
#
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77439374/450427786/296097457?refcode=AU_MKH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240120_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZTJlOWM2OS1lYWI3LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O09uL0FxnThIXx_6YU0mzdHysRaD3iAgWObEtFHrhzk=) Aloha Peter, I know how important it is to speak out against injustice. Before I explain more, **will you pitch in $10 or any amount to help me continue fighting for working families in the Senate? Here’s a personal link to give: ****[secure.actblue.com/donate/mkh-em-jan24/dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77439375/450427787/296097457?amount=10&refcode=AU_MKH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240120_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZTJlOWM2OS1lYWI3LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O09uL0FxnThIXx_6YU0mzdHysRaD3iAgWObEtFHrhzk=)** For most of my career in public service, I engaged in this work stolidly and without much fuss. In the cultures I was raised in, we were not rewarded for speaking up, or speaking out. So I simply focused on doing the work, and letting it speak for itself. This was the case until Donald Trump’s presidency — when his administration implemented horrific, racist policies and the president himself engaged in bigoted tirades on a near daily basis. I knew I had to speak out, and so I did. When the Trump administration separated children from their parents at the border, I wasted no time calling the policy what it was: **Racist, cruel, and anti-immigrant.** And when the ultra-conservative, ideologically-driven Supreme Court majority overturned _Roe v. Wade_ — the culmination of a years-long scheme by Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and anti-choice Republicans to ban abortion nationwide — I told the truth about what this really is: **An outright attack on women in this country.** But as an Asian woman, and as the only immigrant serving in the Senate, when I spoke up for what’s right, MAGA Republicans and the right-wing media sphere began distorting my record and unleashed racist tropes in an attempt to silence me. **But I will not be silent._WE_ will not be silent.** When I began speaking out, this grassroots team stood right behind me. And together, we made history — flipping the White House and winning the Senate majority in 2020, and _expanding_ that majority in 2022. **[**It’s time to beat the odds once again and defend our Senate majority.
