clean_body: | = Aloha Peter, I know how important it is to speak out against injustice. Before I explain more, will you pitch in $10 or any amount to help me continue fighting for working families in the Senate? Here’s a personal link to give: = For most of my career in public service, I engaged in this work stolidly and without much fuss. In the cultures I was raised in, we were not rewarded for speaking up, or speaking out. So I simply focused on doing the work, and letting it speak for itself. This was the case until Donald Trump’s presidency — when his administration implemented horrific, racist policies and the president himself engaged in bigoted tirades on a near daily basis. I knew I had to speak out, and so I did. When the Trump administration separated children from their parents at the border, I wasted no time calling the policy what it was: Racist, cruel, and anti-immigrant. And when the ultra-conservative, ideologically-driven Supreme Court majority overturned Roe v. Wade — the culmination of a years-long scheme by Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and anti-choice Republicans to ban abortion nationwide — I told the truth about what this really is: An outright attack on women in this country. But as an Asian woman, and as the only immigrant serving in the Senate, when I spoke up for what’s right, MAGA Republicans and the right-wing media sphere began distorting my record and unleashed racist tropes in an attempt to silence me. But I will not be silent.WE will not be silent. When I began speaking out, this grassroots team stood right behind me. And together, we made history — flipping the White House and winning the Senate majority in 2020, and expanding that majority in 2022. = | | | ****=** | **=** | | **=** | **=** | | **=** | **=** ** Mahalo and thank you for your support, Mazie Friends of Mazie Hirono Friends of Mazie Hirono 335 Merchant Street #677 Honolulu, HI 96809 United States

**Tell us before midnight: Will you DEFINITELY vote for President Biden?**

| | | [Yes](https://go.dscc.org/go/17130?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20240120-AnswerNow-DefinitelySupportBiden2024RF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20240120-AnswerNow-DefinitelySupportBiden2024RF-Pros-sl1&akid=13261%2E9716520%2EOWy-ga)

| [No](https://go.dscc.org/go/17130?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20240120-AnswerNow-DefinitelySupportBiden2024RF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20240120-AnswerNow-DefinitelySupportBiden2024RF-Pros-sl1&akid=13261%2E9716520%2EOWy-ga)
---

Team -- It’s officially 2024, so **we need Democrats rallying behind President Biden more than ever!**

name: Debbie Mucarsel-Powell
subject: Rick Scott will have to buy this seat if he wants it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Defeat Republicans PAC (www

|

Peter, I know you're busy, so I'll get right to it.

2024 has barely even begun, and MAGA Republican Rick Scott has already spent _**$3 MILLION**_ this cycle on attack ads against Democrats like me. **That's more than any other GOP Senate candidate so far this cycle.**

He wants you to think this means that his campaign is strong. But the truth is, _Rick Scott is terrified._

**Honestly, I don't blame him: Polling shows our team in the lead, and experts at CNN ranked Florida as one of the most likely Senate seats to flip blue.**

Rick Scott knows that the only way that he can win is by _buying_ this seat. But as a mega-millionaire, he's more than ready to do just that — he shelled out $64 MILLION last time around. We can't let him get away with it again. [So, Peter, if you have anything extra to spare today, will you split a donation between my campaign and Defeat Republicans to help me win in Florida and defend Democrats' Senate majority?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/77439933/450428213/2046139600?refcode=DR_SPLIT_FR_90DO_240120_1_2&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ3OWY2MGNmLWVjYjctZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=JoZXIRMrQ5vaqbjcvszh2TTEnv1rab4FKwWyJkVNmtU=)

**[SPLIT $50 »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/77439941/450428221/2046139600?refcode=DR_SPLIT_FR_90DO_240120_1_2&amount=50&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ3OWY2MGNmLWVjYjctZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=JoZXIRMrQ5vaqbjcvszh2TTEnv1rab4FKwWyJkVNmtU=)**
**[SPLIT $100 »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/77439944/450428224/2046139600?refcode=DR_SPLIT_FR_90DO_240120_1_2&amount=100&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ3OWY2MGNmLWVjYjctZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=JoZXIRMrQ5vaqbjcvszh2TTEnv1rab4FKwWyJkVNmtU=)**
**[Other Amount](https://click.everyaction.com/k/77439947/450428227/2046139600?refcode=DR_SPLIT_FR_90DO_240120_1_2&amount=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ3OWY2MGNmLWVjYjctZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=JoZXIRMrQ5vaqbjcvszh2TTEnv1rab4FKwWyJkVNmtU=)**

Listen, Peter, we cannot let these attacks go unanswered. Rick Scott is trying to paint Democrats like me as out-of-touch politicians who've "rigged the game against hard-working Americans.” Seriously?

I'm here to tell you myself **— that is a bold-faced lie.** Rick Scott made his fortune as the CEO of a hospital chain convicted of the biggest Medicare fraud scheme in history at that time. He made off with millions and faced no consequences. Now, he's pushing a far-right agenda that would ban abortions, raise taxes on working families, and end Social Security and Medicare. _Talk about rigging the game against hard-working Americans._

My story is different. As a teen immigrant from Ecuador, I fought hard to create my own American dream. In high school, I worked early morning shifts before homeroom to help my family afford rent for our one room apartment.

I studied hard to earn a scholarship that made college possible for me and dedicated my career to public service. Eventually, I ran for Congress, defeated a Republican incumbent, and became the first South American immigrant elected to the House. In Congress, I fought tirelessly to expand Medicare access, lower the cost of living, end gun violence, and protect families like yours.

**I've spent my life giving back to the communities that gave me so much and fighting to protect the opportunities that made my story possible.** **Rick Scott has spent his career getting rich and leaving working families behind. Floridians deserve better.** That's why I'm running to defeat Rick Scott and actually fight for the families that he claims to care so much about.

We have a huge opportunity to flip Florida blue this time around, but only if we have the resources to fight back against our opponent's massive wealth and set the record straight. I'm counting on your help to do it: [Please, will you split $15 between Defeat Republicans and my campaign to help us retire Rick Scott and flip Florida blue? With your help, this race is truly ours to win.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/77439949/450428230/2046139600?refcode=DR_SPLIT_FR_90DO_240120_1_2&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ3OWY2MGNmLWVjYjctZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=JoZXIRMrQ5vaqbjcvszh2TTEnv1rab4FKwWyJkVNmtU=)
**[CHIP IN NOW »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/77439952/450428232/2046139600?refcode=DR_SPLIT_FR_90DO_240120_1_2&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ3OWY2MGNmLWVjYjctZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=JoZXIRMrQ5vaqbjcvszh2TTEnv1rab4FKwWyJkVNmtU=)**

With immense gratitude,

Debbie Mucarsel-Powell
